abomasnow.spoken: Abomasnow! National Number 460. The Frost Tree Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Ice type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 135.5 kilograms. It whips up blizzards in mountains that are always buried in snow. It is the abominable snowman. Evolution: Snover to Abomasnow.

abra.spoken: Abra! National Number 63. The Psi Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 19.5 kilograms. Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and Teleport to safety. Evolution: Abra to Kadabra to Alakazam.

absol.spoken: Absol! National Number 359. The Disaster Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 47.0 kilograms. Every time Absol appears before people, it is followed by a disaster such as an earthquake or a tidal wave. As a result, it came to be known as the disaster Pokemon. Absol does not evolve.

accelgor.spoken: Accelgor! National Number 617. The Shell Out Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 25.3 kilograms. When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane. Evolution: Shelmet to Accelgor.

aegislash.spoken: Aegislash! National Number 681. The Royal Sword Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Ghost type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 53.0 kilograms. Generations of kings were attended by these Pokemon, which used their spectral power to manipulate and control people and Pokemon. Evolution: Honedge to Doublade to Aegislash.

aerodactyl.spoken: Aerodactyl! National Number 142. The Fossil Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Flying type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 59.0 kilograms. A ferocious, pre­ historic Pokemon that goes for the enemy's throat with its serrated saw-like fangs. Aerodactyl does not evolve.

aggron.spoken: Aggron! National Number 306. The Iron Armor Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Rock type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 360.0 kilograms. Aggron claims an entire mountain as its own territory. It mercilessly beats up anything that violates its environment. This Pokemon vigilantly patrols its territory at all times. Evolution: Aron to Lairon to Aggron.

aipom.spoken: Aipom! National Number 190. The Long Tail Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 11.5 kilograms. Its tail is so powerful that it can use it to grab a tree branch and hold itself up in the air. Evolution: Aipom to Ambipom.

alakazam.spoken: Alakazam! National Number 65. The Psi Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 48.0 kilograms. Its brain can out­ perform a super­ computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000. Evolution: Abra to Kadabra to Alakazam.

alcremie.spoken: Alcremie! National Number 869. The Cream Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 0.5 kilograms. When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it's decorated with cream. Evolution: Milcery to Alcremie.

alomomola.spoken: Alomomola! National Number 594. The Caring Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 31.6 kilograms. The special membrane enveloping Alomomola has the ability to heal wounds. Alomomola does not evolve.

altaria.spoken: Altaria! National Number 334. The Humming Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Flying type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 20.6 kilograms. Altaria dances and wheels through the sky among billowing, cotton-like clouds. By singing melodies in its crystal-clear voice, this Pokemon makes its listeners experience dreamy wonderment. Evolution: Swablu to Altaria.

amaura.spoken: Amaura! National Number 698. The Tundra Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ice type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 25.2 kilograms. This ancient Pokemon was restored from part of its body that had been frozen in ice for over 100 million years. Evolution: Amaura to Aurorus.

ambipom.spoken: Ambipom! National Number 424. The Long Tail Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 20.3 kilograms. To eat, it deftly shucks nuts with its two tails. It rarely uses its arms now. Evolution: Aipom to Ambipom.

amoonguss.spoken: Amoonguss! National Number 591. The Mushroom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 10.5 kilograms. It lures prey close by dancing and waving its arm caps, which resemble Poke Balls, in a swaying motion. Evolution: Foongus to Amoonguss.

ampharos.spoken: Ampharos! National Number 181. The Light Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 61.5 kilograms. The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people. Evolution: Mareep to Flaaffy to Ampharos.

annihilape.spoken: Annihilape! National Number 979. The Rage Monkey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Ghost type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 56.0 kilograms. When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokemon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body. Evolution: Mankey to Primeape to Annihilape.

anorith.spoken: Anorith! National Number 347. The Old Shrimp Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Bug type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 12.5 kilograms. Anorith was regenerated from a prehistoric fossil. This primitive Pokemon once lived in warm seas. It grips its prey firmly between its two large claws. Evolution: Anorith to Armaldo.

appletun.spoken: Appletun! National Number 842. The Apple Nectar Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Dragon type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 13.0 kilograms. Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokemon it preys on. Evolution: Applin to Flapple to Appletun to Dipplin to Hydrapple.

applin.spoken: Applin! National Number 840. The Apple Core Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Dragon type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.5 kilograms. It spends its entire life inside an apple. It hides from its natural enemies, bird Pokemon, by pretending it's just an apple and nothing more. Evolution: Applin to Flapple to Appletun to Dipplin to Hydrapple.

araquanid.spoken: Araquanid! National Number 752. The Water Bubble Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Bug type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 82.0 kilograms. It delivers headbutts with the water bubble on its head. Small Pokemon get sucked into the bubble, where they drown. Evolution: Dewpider to Araquanid.

arbok.spoken: Arbok! National Number 24. The Cobra Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 3.5 meters tall and weighing 65.0 kilograms. It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area. Evolution: Ekans to Arbok.

arboliva.spoken: Arboliva! National Number 930. The Olive Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Normal type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 48.2 kilograms. This calm Pokemon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokemon. Evolution: Smoliv to Dolliv to Arboliva.

arcanine.spoken: Arcanine! National Number 59. The Legendary Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 155.0 kilograms. A Pokemon that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings. Evolution: Growlithe to Arcanine.

arceus.spoken: Arceus! National Number 493. The Alpha Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 3.2 meters tall and weighing 320.0 kilograms. It is said to have emerged from an egg in a place where there was nothing, then shaped the world. Arceus does not evolve.

archaludon.spoken: Archaludon! National Number 1018. The Alloy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Dragon type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful. Evolution: Duraludon to Archaludon.

archen.spoken: Archen! National Number 566. The First Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Flying type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.5 kilograms. Said to be an ancestor of bird Pokemon, they were unable to fly and moved about by hopping from one branch to another. Evolution: Archen to Archeops.

archeops.spoken: Archeops! National Number 567. The First Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Flying type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 32.0 kilograms. They are intelligent and will cooperate to catch prey. From the ground, they use a running start to take flight. Evolution: Archen to Archeops.

arctibax.spoken: Arctibax! National Number 997. The Ice Fin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Ice type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice. Evolution: Frigibax to Arctibax to Baxcalibur.

arctovish.spoken: Arctovish! National Number 883. The Fossil Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ice type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 175.0 kilograms. Though it's able to capture prey by freezing its surroundings, it has trouble eating the prey afterward because its mouth is on top of its head. Arctovish does not evolve.

arctozolt.spoken: Arctozolt! National Number 881. The Fossil Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Ice type, standing 2.3 meters tall and weighing 150.0 kilograms. The shaking of its freezing upper half is what generates its electricity. It has a hard time walking around. Arctozolt does not evolve.

ariados.spoken: Ariados! National Number 168. The Long Leg Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 33.5 kilograms. It spins string not only from its rear but also from its mouth. It is hard to tell which end is which. Evolution: Spinarak to Ariados.

armaldo.spoken: Armaldo! National Number 348. The Plate Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Bug type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 68.2 kilograms. Armaldo's tough armor makes all attacks bounce off. This Pokemon's two enormous claws can be freely extended or contracted. They have the power to punch right through a steel slab. Evolution: Anorith to Armaldo.

armarouge.spoken: Armarouge! National Number 936. The Fire Warrior Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 85.0 kilograms. Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokemon is incredibly loyal. Evolution: Charcadet to Armarouge to Ceruledge.

aromatisse.spoken: Aromatisse! National Number 683. The Fragrance Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 15.5 kilograms. It devises various scents, pleasant and unpleasant, and emits scents that its enemies dislike in order to gain an edge in battle. Evolution: Spritzee to Aromatisse.

aron.spoken: Aron! National Number 304. The Iron Armor Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Rock type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. This Pokemon has a body of steel. To make its body, Aron feeds on iron ore that it digs from mountains. Occasionally, it causes major trouble by eating bridges and rails. Evolution: Aron to Lairon to Aggron.

arrokuda.spoken: Arrokuda! National Number 846. The Rush Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. If it sees any movement around it, this Pokemon charges for it straightaway, leading with its sharply pointed jaw. It's very proud of that jaw. Evolution: Arrokuda to Barraskewda.

articuno.spoken: Articuno! National Number 144. The Freeze Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Flying type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 55.4 kilograms. A legendary bird Pokemon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains. Articuno does not evolve.

audino.spoken: Audino! National Number 531. The Hearing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 31.0 kilograms. It touches others with the feelers on its ears, using the sound of their heartbeats to tell how they are feeling. Audino does not evolve.

aurorus.spoken: Aurorus! National Number 699. The Tundra Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ice type, standing 2.7 meters tall and weighing 225.0 kilograms. The diamond-shaped crystals on its body expel air as cold as -240 degrees Fahrenheit, surrounding its enemies and encasing them in ice. Evolution: Amaura to Aurorus.

avalugg.spoken: Avalugg! National Number 713. The Iceberg Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 505.0 kilograms. Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way. Evolution: Bergmite to Avalugg.

axew.spoken: Axew! National Number 610. The Tusk Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 18.0 kilograms. They use their tusks to crush the berries they eat. Repeated regrowth makes their tusks strong and sharp. Evolution: Axew to Fraxure to Haxorus.

azelf.spoken: Azelf! National Number 482. The Willpower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 0.3 kilograms. It is thought that Uxie, Mesprit, and Azelf all came from the same egg. Azelf does not evolve.

azumarill.spoken: Azumarill! National Number 184. The Aqua Rabbit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Fairy type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 28.5 kilograms. By keeping still and listening in­ tently, it can tell what is in even wild, fast- moving rivers. Evolution: Azurill to Marill to Azumarill.

azurill.spoken: Azurill! National Number 298. The Polka Dot Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Fairy type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 2.0 kilograms. Azurill spins its tail as if it were a lasso, then hurls it far. The momentum of the throw sends its body flying, too. Using this unique action, one of these Pokemon managed to hurl itself a record 33 feet. Evolution: Azurill to Marill to Azumarill.

bagon.spoken: Bagon! National Number 371. The Rock Head Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 42.1 kilograms. Bagon has a dream of one day soaring in the sky. In doomed efforts to fly, this Pokemon hurls itself off cliffs. As a result of its dives, its head has grown tough and as hard as tempered steel. Evolution: Bagon to Shelgon to Salamence.

baltoy.spoken: Baltoy! National Number 343. The Clay Doll Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Psychic type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 21.5 kilograms. Baltoy moves while spinning around on its one foot. Primitive wall paintings depicting this Pokemon living among people were discovered in some ancient ruins. Evolution: Baltoy to Claydol.

banette.spoken: Banette! National Number 354. The Marionette Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 12.5 kilograms. A doll that became a Pokemon over its grudge from being junked. It seeks the child that disowned it. Evolution: Shuppet to Banette.

barbaracle.spoken: Barbaracle! National Number 689. The Collective Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Water type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 96.0 kilograms. When they evolve, two Binacle multiply into seven. They fight with the power of seven Binacle. Evolution: Binacle to Barbaracle.

barboach.spoken: Barboach! National Number 339. The Whiskers Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ground type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 1.9 kilograms. Barboach's sensitive whiskers serve as a superb radar system. This Pokemon hides in mud, leaving only its two whiskers exposed while it waits for prey to come along. Evolution: Barboach to Whiscash.

barraskewda.spoken: Barraskewda! National Number 847. The Skewer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. This Pokemon has a jaw that's as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewda's flesh is surprisingly tasty, too. Evolution: Arrokuda to Barraskewda.

basculegion.spoken: Basculegion! National Number 902. The Big Fish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ghost type, standing 3.0 meters tall and weighing 110.0 kilograms. Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal. Evolution: Basculin to Basculegion.

basculin.spoken: Basculin! National Number 550. The Hostile Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 18.0 kilograms. Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they'll start fighting instantly. These Pokemon are very hostile. Evolution: Basculin to Basculegion.

bastiodon.spoken: Bastiodon! National Number 411. The Shield Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Steel type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 149.5 kilograms. Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokemon that feeds on grass and berries. Evolution: Shieldon to Bastiodon.

baxcalibur.spoken: Baxcalibur! National Number 998. The Ice Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Ice type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 210.0 kilograms. This Pokemon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava. Evolution: Frigibax to Arctibax to Baxcalibur.

bayleef.spoken: Bayleef! National Number 153. The Leaf Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 15.8 kilograms. The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight. Evolution: Chikorita to Bayleef to Meganium.

beartic.spoken: Beartic! National Number 614. The Freezing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 2.6 meters tall and weighing 260.0 kilograms. It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey. Evolution: Cubchoo to Beartic.

beautifly.spoken: Beautifly! National Number 267. The Butterfly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 28.4 kilograms. Beautifly's favorite food is the sweet pollen of flowers. If you want to see this Pokemon, just leave a potted flower by an open window. Beautifly is sure to come looking for pollen. Evolution: Wurmple to Silcoon to Beautifly to Cascoon to Dustox.

beedrill.spoken: Beedrill! National Number 15. The Poison Bee Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 29.5 kilograms. Flies at high speed and attacks using its large venomous stingers on its forelegs and tail. Evolution: Weedle to Kakuna to Beedrill.

beheeyem.spoken: Beheeyem! National Number 606. The Cerebral Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 34.5 kilograms. It can manipulate an opponent's memory. Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three different-colored fingers. Evolution: Elgyem to Beheeyem.

beldum.spoken: Beldum! National Number 374. The Iron Ball Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Psychic type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 95.2 kilograms. It converses with others by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison. Evolution: Beldum to Metang to Metagross.

bellibolt.spoken: Bellibolt! National Number 939. The EleFrog Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 113.0 kilograms. When this Pokemon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity. Evolution: Tadbulb to Bellibolt.

bellossom.spoken: Bellossom! National Number 182. The Flower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 5.8 kilograms. Bellossom gather at times and appear to dance. They say that the dance is a ritual to summon the sun. Evolution: Oddish to Gloom to Vileplume to Bellossom.

bellsprout.spoken: Bellsprout! National Number 69. The Flower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. A carnivorous Pokemon that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture. Evolution: Bellsprout to Weepinbell to Victreebel.

bergmite.spoken: Bergmite! National Number 712. The Ice Chunk Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 99.5 kilograms. It blocks opponents' attacks with the ice that shields its body. It uses cold air to repair any cracks with new ice. Evolution: Bergmite to Avalugg.

bewear.spoken: Bewear! National Number 760. The Strong Arm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Fighting type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 135.0 kilograms. This immensely dangerous Pokemon possesses overwhelming physical strength. Its habitat is generally off-limits. Evolution: Stufful to Bewear.

bibarel.spoken: Bibarel! National Number 400. The Beaver Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Water type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 31.5 kilograms. It makes its nest by damming streams with bark and mud. It is known as an industrious worker. Evolution: Bidoof to Bibarel.

bidoof.spoken: Bidoof! National Number 399. The Plump Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 20.0 kilograms. A comparison revealed that Bidoof's front teeth grow at the same rate as Rattata's. Evolution: Bidoof to Bibarel.

binacle.spoken: Binacle! National Number 688. The Two-Handed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 31.0 kilograms. Two Binacle live together on one rock. When they fight, one of them will move to a different rock. Evolution: Binacle to Barbaracle.

bisharp.spoken: Bisharp! National Number 625. The Sword Blade Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Steel type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 70.0 kilograms. It leads a group of Pawniard. It battles to become the boss, but will be driven from the group if it loses. Evolution: Pawniard to Bisharp to Kingambit.

blacephalon.spoken: Blacephalon! National Number 806. The Fireworks Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Ghost type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 13.0 kilograms. It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. It's apparently one kind of Ultra Beast. Blacephalon does not evolve.

blastoise.spoken: Blastoise! National Number 9. The Shellfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 85.5 kilograms. A brutal Pokemon with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles. Evolution: Squirtle to Wartortle to Blastoise.

blaziken.spoken: Blaziken! National Number 257. The Blaze Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Fighting type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 52.0 kilograms. Flames spout from its wrists, enveloping its knuckles. Its punches scorch its foes. Evolution: Torchic to Combusken to Blaziken.

blipbug.spoken: Blipbug! National Number 824. The Larva Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 8.0 kilograms. A constant collector of information, this Pokemon is very smart. Very strong is what it isn't. Evolution: Blipbug to Dottler to Orbeetle.

blissey.spoken: Blissey! National Number 242. The Happiness Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 46.8 kilograms. Anyone who takes even one bite of Blissey's egg be­ comes unfailingly caring and pleas­ ant to everyone. Evolution: Happiny to Chansey to Blissey.

blitzle.spoken: Blitzle! National Number 522. The Electrified Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 29.8 kilograms. Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use their flashing manes to communicate with one another. Evolution: Blitzle to Zebstrika.

boldore.spoken: Boldore! National Number 525. The Ore Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 102.0 kilograms. When it overflows with power, the orange crystal on its body glows. It looks for underground water in caves. Evolution: Roggenrola to Boldore to Gigalith.

boltund.spoken: Boltund! National Number 836. The Dog Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 34.0 kilograms. This Pokemon generates electricity and channels it into its legs to keep them going strong. Boltund can run nonstop for three full days. Evolution: Yamper to Boltund.

bombirdier.spoken: Bombirdier! National Number 962. The Item Drop Pokemon. This Pokemon is Flying / Dark type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 42.9 kilograms. It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokemon's chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun. Bombirdier does not evolve.

bonsly.spoken: Bonsly! National Number 438. The Bonsai Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. It looks as if it is always crying. It is actually adjusting its body's fluid levels by eliminating excess. Evolution: Bonsly to Sudowoodo.

bouffalant.spoken: Bouffalant! National Number 626. The Bash Buffalo Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 94.6 kilograms. Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt. Bouffalant does not evolve.

bounsweet.spoken: Bounsweet! National Number 761. The Fruit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.2 kilograms. A delectable aroma pours from its body. They are often swallowed whole by Toucannon lured by that wafting deliciousness. Evolution: Bounsweet to Steenee to Tsareena.

braixen.spoken: Braixen! National Number 654. The Fox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 14.5 kilograms. It has a twig stuck in its tail. With friction from its tail fur, it sets the twig on fire and launches into battle. Evolution: Fennekin to Braixen to Delphox.

brambleghast.spoken: Brambleghast! National Number 947. The Tumbleweed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Ghost type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 6.0 kilograms. It will open the branches of its head to envelop its prey. Once it absorbs all the life energy it needs, it expels the prey and discards it. Evolution: Bramblin to Brambleghast.

bramblin.spoken: Bramblin! National Number 946. The Tumbleweed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Ghost type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 0.6 kilograms. A soul unable to move on to the afterlife was blown around by the wind until it got tangled up with dried grass and became a Pokemon. Evolution: Bramblin to Brambleghast.

braviary.spoken: Braviary! National Number 628. The Valiant Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 41.0 kilograms. They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying. Evolution: Rufflet to Braviary.

breloom.spoken: Breloom! National Number 286. The Mushroom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Fighting type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 39.2 kilograms. Breloom closes in on its foe with light and sprightly footwork, then throws punches with its stretchy arms. This Pokemon's fighting technique puts boxers to shame. Evolution: Shroomish to Breloom.

brionne.spoken: Brionne! National Number 729. The Pop Star Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 17.5 kilograms. A skillful dancer, it creates a sequence of water balloons as it dances, and briskly bombards its enemies. Evolution: Popplio to Brionne to Primarina.

bronzong.spoken: Bronzong! National Number 437. The Bronze Bell Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Psychic type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 187.0 kilograms. One caused a news sensation when it was dug up at a construction site after a 2,000-year sleep. Evolution: Bronzor to Bronzong.

bronzor.spoken: Bronzor! National Number 436. The Bronze Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Psychic type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 60.5 kilograms. Implements shaped like it were discovered in ancient tombs. It is unknown if they are related. Evolution: Bronzor to Bronzong.

brute-bonnet.spoken: Brute Bonnet! National Number 986. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Dark type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 21.0 kilograms. It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokemon. Brute Bonnet does not evolve.

bruxish.spoken: Bruxish! National Number 779. The Gnash Teeth Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Psychic type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 19.0 kilograms. When it unleashes its psychic power from the protuberance on its head, the grating sound of grinding teeth echoes through the area. Bruxish does not evolve.

budew.spoken: Budew! National Number 406. The Bud Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 1.2 kilograms. Over the winter, it closes its bud and endures the cold. In spring, the bud opens and releases pollen. Evolution: Budew to Roselia to Roserade.

buizel.spoken: Buizel! National Number 418. The Sea Weasel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 29.5 kilograms. It has a flotation sac that is like an inflatable collar. It floats on water with its head out. Evolution: Buizel to Floatzel.

bulbasaur.spoken: Bulbasaur! National Number 1. The Seed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 6.9 kilograms. A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokemon. Evolution: Bulbasaur to Ivysaur to Venusaur.

buneary.spoken: Buneary! National Number 427. The Rabbit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 5.5 kilograms. It slams foes by sharply uncoiling its rolled ears. It stings enough to make a grown-up cry in pain. Evolution: Buneary to Lopunny.

bunnelby.spoken: Bunnelby! National Number 659. The Digging Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 5.0 kilograms. They use their large ears to dig burrows. They will dig the whole night through. Evolution: Bunnelby to Diggersby.

burmy.spoken: Burmy! National Number 412. The Bagworm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 3.4 kilograms. To shelter itself from cold, wintry winds, it covers itself with a cloak made of twigs and leaves. Evolution: Burmy to Wormadam to Mothim.

butterfree.spoken: Butterfree! National Number 12. The Butterfly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 32.0 kilograms. In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air. Evolution: Caterpie to Metapod to Butterfree.

buzzwole.spoken: Buzzwole! National Number 794. The Swollen Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Fighting type, standing 2.4 meters tall and weighing 333.6 kilograms. This Ultra Beast appeared from another world. It shows off its body, but whether that display is a boast or a threat remains unclear. Buzzwole does not evolve.

cacnea.spoken: Cacnea! National Number 331. The Cactus Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 51.3 kilograms. Cacnea lives in arid locations such as deserts. It releases a strong aroma from its flower to attract prey. When prey comes near, this Pokemon shoots sharp thorns from its body to bring the victim down. Evolution: Cacnea to Cacturne.

cacturne.spoken: Cacturne! National Number 332. The Scarecrow Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Dark type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 77.4 kilograms. During the daytime, Cacturne remains unmoving so that it does not lose any moisture to the harsh desert sun. This Pokemon becomes active at night when the temperature drops. Evolution: Cacnea to Cacturne.

calyrex.spoken: Calyrex! National Number 898. The King Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Grass type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 7.7 kilograms. Calyrex is a merciful Pokemon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore. Calyrex does not evolve.

camerupt.spoken: Camerupt! National Number 323. The Eruption Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Ground type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 220.0 kilograms. Camerupt has a volcano inside its body. Magma of 18,000 degrees F courses through its body. Occasionally, the humps on this Pokemon's back erupt, spewing the superheated magma. Evolution: Numel to Camerupt.

capsakid.spoken: Capsakid! National Number 951. The Spicy Pepper Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.0 kilograms. The more sunlight this Pokemon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become. Evolution: Capsakid to Scovillain.

carbink.spoken: Carbink! National Number 703. The Jewel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Fairy type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 5.7 kilograms. Born from the temperatures and pressures deep underground, it fires beams from the stone in its head. Carbink does not evolve.

carkol.spoken: Carkol! National Number 838. The Coal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Fire type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 78.0 kilograms. It forms coal inside its body. Coal dropped by this Pokemon once helped fuel the lives of people in the Galar region. Evolution: Rolycoly to Carkol to Coalossal.

carnivine.spoken: Carnivine! National Number 455. The Bug Catcher Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 27.0 kilograms. It attracts prey with its sweet- smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey. Carnivine does not evolve.

carracosta.spoken: Carracosta! National Number 565. The Prototurtle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Rock type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 81.0 kilograms. They can live both in the ocean and on land. A slap from one of them is enough to open a hole in the bottom of a tanker. Evolution: Tirtouga to Carracosta.

carvanha.spoken: Carvanha! National Number 318. The Savage Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Dark type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 20.8 kilograms. Carvanha's strongly developed jaws and its sharply pointed fangs pack the destructive power to rip out boat hulls. Many boats have been attacked and sunk by this Pokemon. Evolution: Carvanha to Sharpedo.

cascoon.spoken: Cascoon! National Number 268. The Cocoon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 11.5 kilograms. Cascoon makes its protective cocoon by wrapping its body entirely with a fine silk from its mouth. Once the silk goes around its body, it hardens. This Pokemon prepares for its evolution inside the cocoon. Evolution: Wurmple to Silcoon to Beautifly to Cascoon to Dustox.

castform.spoken: Castform! National Number 351. The Weather Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 0.8 kilograms. Castform's appearance changes with the weather. This Pokemon gained the ability to use the vast power of nature to protect its tiny body. Castform does not evolve.

caterpie.spoken: Caterpie! National Number 10. The Worm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.9 kilograms. Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls. Evolution: Caterpie to Metapod to Butterfree.

celebi.spoken: Celebi! National Number 251. The Time Travel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Grass type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 5.0 kilograms. This Pokemon wan­ ders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests in which it has appeared. Celebi does not evolve.

celesteela.spoken: Celesteela! National Number 797. The Launch Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Flying type, standing 9.2 meters tall and weighing 999.9 kilograms. It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. Witnesses observed it flying across the sky at high speed. Celesteela does not evolve.

centiskorch.spoken: Centiskorch! National Number 851. The Radiator Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Bug type, standing 3.0 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies. Evolution: Sizzlipede to Centiskorch.

ceruledge.spoken: Ceruledge! National Number 937. The Fire Blades Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Ghost type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 62.0 kilograms. The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal. Evolution: Charcadet to Armarouge to Ceruledge.

cetitan.spoken: Cetitan! National Number 975. The Terra Whale Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 4.5 meters tall and weighing 700.0 kilograms. This Pokemon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin. Evolution: Cetoddle to Cetitan.

cetoddle.spoken: Cetoddle! National Number 974. The Terra Whale Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 45.0 kilograms. This species left the ocean and began living on land a very long time ago. It seems to be closely related to Wailmer. Evolution: Cetoddle to Cetitan.

chandelure.spoken: Chandelure! National Number 609. The Luring Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Fire type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 34.3 kilograms. It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance. Evolution: Litwick to Lampent to Chandelure.

chansey.spoken: Chansey! National Number 113. The Egg Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 34.6 kilograms. A rare and elusive Pokemon that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it. Evolution: Happiny to Chansey to Blissey.

charcadet.spoken: Charcadet! National Number 935. The Fire Child Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 10.5 kilograms. Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokemon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents. Evolution: Charcadet to Armarouge to Ceruledge.

charizard.spoken: Charizard! National Number 6. The Flame Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Flying type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 90.5 kilograms. It is said that Charizard's fire burns hotter if it has experienced harsh battles. Evolution: Charmander to Charmeleon to Charizard.

charjabug.spoken: Charjabug! National Number 737. The Battery Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Electric type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 10.5 kilograms. Its body is capable of storing electricity. On camping trips, people are grateful to have one around. Evolution: Grubbin to Charjabug to Vikavolt.

charmander.spoken: Charmander! National Number 4. The Lizard Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 8.5 kilograms. Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail. Evolution: Charmander to Charmeleon to Charizard.

charmeleon.spoken: Charmeleon! National Number 5. The Flame Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 19.0 kilograms. When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels. Evolution: Charmander to Charmeleon to Charizard.

chatot.spoken: Chatot! National Number 441. The Music Note Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 1.9 kilograms. It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying. Chatot does not evolve.

cherrim.spoken: Cherrim! National Number 421. The Blossom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.3 kilograms. It blooms during times of strong sunlight. It tries to make up for everything it endured as a bud. Evolution: Cherubi to Cherrim.

cherubi.spoken: Cherubi! National Number 420. The Cherry Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 3.3 kilograms. The small ball holds the nutrients needed for evolution. Apparently, it is very sweet and tasty. Evolution: Cherubi to Cherrim.

chesnaught.spoken: Chesnaught! National Number 652. The Spiny Armor Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Fighting type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 90.0 kilograms. Its Tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton tank. It shields its allies from danger with its own body. Evolution: Chespin to Quilladin to Chesnaught.

chespin.spoken: Chespin! National Number 650. The Spiny Nut Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 9.0 kilograms. The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock. Evolution: Chespin to Quilladin to Chesnaught.

chewtle.spoken: Chewtle! National Number 833. The Snapping Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 8.5 kilograms. Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it. Evolution: Chewtle to Drednaw.

chi-yu.spoken: Chi-Yu! National Number 1004. The Ruinous Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Fire type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.9 kilograms. It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand. Chi-Yu does not evolve.

chien-pao.spoken: Chien-Pao! National Number 1002. The Ruinous Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Ice type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 152.2 kilograms. This Pokemon can control 100 tons of fallen snow. It plays around innocently by leaping in and out of avalanches it has caused. Chien-Pao does not evolve.

chikorita.spoken: Chikorita! National Number 152. The Leaf Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 6.4 kilograms. It uses the leaf on its head to determine the temperature and humidity. It loves to sunbathe. Evolution: Chikorita to Bayleef to Meganium.

chimchar.spoken: Chimchar! National Number 390. The Chimp Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 6.2 kilograms. It agilely scales sheer cliffs to live atop craggy mountains. Its fire is put out when it sleeps. Evolution: Chimchar to Monferno to Infernape.

chimecho.spoken: Chimecho! National Number 358. The Wind Chime Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. Chimecho makes its cries echo inside its hollow body. When this Pokemon becomes enraged, its cries result in ultrasonic waves that have the power to knock foes flying. Evolution: Chingling to Chimecho.

chinchou.spoken: Chinchou! National Number 170. The Angler Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Electric type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 12.0 kilograms. It shoots positive and negative elec­ tricity between the tips of its two antennae and zaps its enemies. Evolution: Chinchou to Lanturn.

chingling.spoken: Chingling! National Number 433. The Bell Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.6 kilograms. It emits cries by agitating an orb at the back of its throat. It moves with flouncing hops. Evolution: Chingling to Chimecho.

cinccino.spoken: Cinccino! National Number 573. The Scarf Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 7.5 kilograms. Their white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it easy for them to deflect attacks. Evolution: Minccino to Cinccino.

cinderace.spoken: Cinderace! National Number 815. The Striker Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 33.0 kilograms. It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots strike opponents hard and leave them scorched. Evolution: Scorbunny to Raboot to Cinderace.

clamperl.spoken: Clamperl! National Number 366. The Bivalve Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 52.5 kilograms. Clamperl's sturdy shell is not only good for protection - it is also used for clamping and catching prey. A fully grown Clamperl's shell will be scored with nicks and scratches all over. Evolution: Clamperl to Huntail to Gorebyss.

clauncher.spoken: Clauncher! National Number 692. The Water Gun Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 8.3 kilograms. They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol. Evolution: Clauncher to Clawitzer.

clawitzer.spoken: Clawitzer! National Number 693. The Howitzer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 35.3 kilograms. Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls. Evolution: Clauncher to Clawitzer.

claydol.spoken: Claydol! National Number 344. The Clay Doll Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 108.0 kilograms. Claydol are said to be dolls of mud made by primitive humans and brought to life by exposure to a mysterious ray. This Pokemon moves about while levitating. Evolution: Baltoy to Claydol.

clefable.spoken: Clefable! National Number 36. The Fairy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 40.0 kilograms. A timid fairy Pokemon that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people. Evolution: Cleffa to Clefairy to Clefable.

clefairy.spoken: Clefairy! National Number 35. The Fairy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 7.5 kilograms. Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas. Evolution: Cleffa to Clefairy to Clefable.

cleffa.spoken: Cleffa! National Number 173. The Star Shape Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.0 kilograms. Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor. Evolution: Cleffa to Clefairy to Clefable.

clobbopus.spoken: Clobbopus! National Number 852. The Tantrum Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. It's very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles. The search for food is what brings it onto land. Evolution: Clobbopus to Grapploct.

clodsire.spoken: Clodsire! National Number 980. The Spiny Fish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Ground type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 223.0 kilograms. When attacked, this Pokemon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It's a risky move that puts everything on the line. Evolution: Wooper to Quagsire to Clodsire.

cloyster.spoken: Cloyster! National Number 91. The Bivalve Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ice type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 132.5 kilograms. When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen. Evolution: Shellder to Cloyster.

coalossal.spoken: Coalossal! National Number 839. The Coal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Fire type, standing 2.8 meters tall and weighing 310.5 kilograms. It's usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit. Evolution: Rolycoly to Carkol to Coalossal.

cobalion.spoken: Cobalion! National Number 638. The Iron Will Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Fighting type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 250.0 kilograms. This legendary Pokemon battled against humans to protect Pokemon. Its personality is calm and composed. Cobalion does not evolve.

cofagrigus.spoken: Cofagrigus! National Number 563. The Coffin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 76.5 kilograms. It has been said that they swallow those who get too close and turn them into mummies. They like to eat gold nuggets. Evolution: Yamask to Cofagrigus to Runerigus.

combee.spoken: Combee! National Number 415. The Tiny Bee Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 5.5 kilograms. A Pokemon formed by three others. It busily carries sweet floral honey to Vespiquen. Evolution: Combee to Vespiquen.

combusken.spoken: Combusken! National Number 256. The Young Fowl Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Fighting type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 19.5 kilograms. Combusken toughens up its legs and thighs by running through fields and mountains. This Pokemon's legs possess both speed and power, enabling it to dole out ten kicks in one second. Evolution: Torchic to Combusken to Blaziken.

comfey.spoken: Comfey! National Number 764. The Posy Picker Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.1 meters tall and weighing 0.3 kilograms. It attaches flowers to its highly nutritious vine. This revitalizes the flowers, and they give off an aromatic scent. Comfey does not evolve.

conkeldurr.spoken: Conkeldurr! National Number 534. The Muscular Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 87.0 kilograms. It is thought that Conkeldurr taught humans how to make concrete more than 2,000 years ago. Evolution: Timburr to Gurdurr to Conkeldurr.

copperajah.spoken: Copperajah! National Number 879. The Copperderm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel type, standing 3.0 meters tall and weighing 650.0 kilograms. They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water. Evolution: Cufant to Copperajah.

corphish.spoken: Corphish! National Number 341. The Ruffian Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 11.5 kilograms. Corphish were originally foreign Pokemon that were imported as pets. They eventually turned up in the wild. This Pokemon is very hardy and has greatly increased its population. Evolution: Corphish to Crawdaunt.

corsola.spoken: Corsola! National Number 222. The Coral Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Rock type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 5.0 kilograms. It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty. Evolution: Corsola to Cursola.

corviknight.spoken: Corviknight! National Number 823. The Raven Pokemon. This Pokemon is Flying / Steel type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 75.0 kilograms. This Pokemon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe. Evolution: Rookidee to Corvisquire to Corviknight.

corvisquire.spoken: Corvisquire! National Number 822. The Raven Pokemon. This Pokemon is Flying type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 16.0 kilograms. Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokemon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies. Evolution: Rookidee to Corvisquire to Corviknight.

cosmoem.spoken: Cosmoem! National Number 790. The Protostar Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.1 meters tall and weighing 999.9 kilograms. Motionless as if dead, its body is faintly warm to the touch. In the distant past, it was called the cocoon of the stars. Evolution: Cosmog to Cosmoem to Solgaleo to Lunala.

cosmog.spoken: Cosmog! National Number 789. The Nebula Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.1 kilograms. Its body is gaseous and frail. It slowly grows as it collects dust from the atmosphere. Evolution: Cosmog to Cosmoem to Solgaleo to Lunala.

cottonee.spoken: Cottonee! National Number 546. The Cotton Puff Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Fairy type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 0.6 kilograms. When attacked, it escapes by shooting cotton from its body. The cotton serves as a decoy to distract the attacker. Evolution: Cottonee to Whimsicott.

crabominable.spoken: Crabominable! National Number 740. The Woolly Crab Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Ice type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 180.0 kilograms. It aimed for the top but got lost and ended up on a snowy mountain. Being forced to endure the cold, this Pokemon evolved and grew fur. Evolution: Crabrawler to Crabominable.

crabrawler.spoken: Crabrawler! National Number 739. The Boxing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 7.0 kilograms. While guarding its weak points with its pincers, it looks for an opening and unleashes punches. When it loses, it foams at the mouth and faints. Evolution: Crabrawler to Crabominable.

cradily.spoken: Cradily! National Number 346. The Barnacle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Grass type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 60.4 kilograms. Cradily roams around the ocean floor in search of food. This Pokemon freely extends its tree trunk-like neck and captures unwary prey using its eight tentacles. Evolution: Lileep to Cradily.

cramorant.spoken: Cramorant! National Number 845. The Gulp Pokemon. This Pokemon is Flying / Water type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 18.0 kilograms. It's so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it's battling midfight. Cramorant does not evolve.

cranidos.spoken: Cranidos! National Number 408. The Head Butt Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 31.5 kilograms. It lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its skull is as hard as iron. Evolution: Cranidos to Rampardos.

crawdaunt.spoken: Crawdaunt! National Number 342. The Rogue Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Dark type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 32.8 kilograms. Crawdaunt has an extremely violent nature that compels it to challenge other living things to battle. Other life-forms refuse to live in ponds inhabited by this Pokemon, making them desolate places. Evolution: Corphish to Crawdaunt.

cresselia.spoken: Cresselia! National Number 488. The Lunar Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 85.6 kilograms. Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon. Cresselia does not evolve.

croagunk.spoken: Croagunk! National Number 453. The Toxic Mouth Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Fighting type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 23.0 kilograms. Its cheeks hold poison sacs. It tries to catch foes off guard to jab them with toxic fingers. Evolution: Croagunk to Toxicroak.

crobat.spoken: Crobat! National Number 169. The Bat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Flying type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 75.0 kilograms. Having four wings allows it to fly more quickly and quietly so it can sneak up on prey without its noticing. Evolution: Zubat to Golbat to Crobat.

crocalor.spoken: Crocalor! National Number 910. The Fire Croc Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 30.7 kilograms. The combination of Crocalor's fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on the Pokemon's head. Evolution: Fuecoco to Crocalor to Skeledirge.

croconaw.spoken: Croconaw! National Number 159. The Big Jaw Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 25.0 kilograms. If it loses a fang, a new one grows back in its place. There are always 48 fangs lining its mouth. Evolution: Totodile to Croconaw to Feraligatr.

crustle.spoken: Crustle! National Number 558. The Stone Home Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Rock type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 200.0 kilograms. Competing for territory, Crustle fight viciously. The one whose boulder is broken is the loser of the battle. Evolution: Dwebble to Crustle.

cryogonal.spoken: Cryogonal! National Number 615. The Crystallizing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 148.0 kilograms. When its body temperature goes up, it turns into steam and vanishes. When its temperature lowers, it returns to ice. Cryogonal does not evolve.

cubchoo.spoken: Cubchoo! National Number 613. The Chill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 8.5 kilograms. When it is not feeling well, its mucus gets watery and the power of its Ice-type moves decreases. Evolution: Cubchoo to Beartic.

cubone.spoken: Cubone! National Number 104. The Lonely Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this Pokemon's real face. Evolution: Cubone to Marowak.

cufant.spoken: Cufant! National Number 878. The Copperderm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 100.0 kilograms. It digs up the ground with its trunk. It's also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all. Evolution: Cufant to Copperajah.

cursola.spoken: Cursola! National Number 864. The Coral Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 0.4 kilograms. Its shell is overflowing with its heightened otherworldly energy. The ectoplasm serves as protection for this Pokemon's core spirit. Evolution: Corsola to Cursola.

cutiefly.spoken: Cutiefly! National Number 742. The Bee Fly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Fairy type, standing 0.1 meters tall and weighing 0.2 kilograms. It feeds on the nectar and pollen of flowers. Because it's able to sense auras, it can identify which flowers are about to bloom. Evolution: Cutiefly to Ribombee.

cyclizar.spoken: Cyclizar! National Number 967. The Mount Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Normal type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 63.0 kilograms. Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals. Cyclizar does not evolve.

cyndaquil.spoken: Cyndaquil! National Number 155. The Fire Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 7.9 kilograms. It is timid, and always curls it­ self up in a ball. If attacked, it flares up its back for protection. Evolution: Cyndaquil to Quilava to Typhlosion.

dachsbun.spoken: Dachsbun! National Number 927. The Dog Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 14.9 kilograms. The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokemon's body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages. Evolution: Fidough to Dachsbun.

darkrai.spoken: Darkrai! National Number 491. The Pitch-Black Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 50.5 kilograms. It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon. Darkrai does not evolve.

darmanitan.spoken: Darmanitan! National Number 555. The Blazing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 92.9 kilograms. Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch. Evolution: Darumaka to Darmanitan.

dartrix.spoken: Dartrix! National Number 723. The Blade Quill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Flying type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 16.0 kilograms. A bit of a dandy, it spends its free time preening its wings. Its preoccupation with any dirt on its plumage can leave it unable to battle. Evolution: Rowlet to Dartrix to Decidueye.

darumaka.spoken: Darumaka! National Number 554. The Zen Charm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 37.5 kilograms. When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep. Evolution: Darumaka to Darmanitan.

decidueye.spoken: Decidueye! National Number 724. The Arrow Quill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Ghost type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 36.6 kilograms. It fires arrow quills from its wings with such precision, they can pierce a pebble at distances over a hundred yards. Evolution: Rowlet to Dartrix to Decidueye.

dedenne.spoken: Dedenne! National Number 702. The Antenna Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Fairy type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 2.2 kilograms. Its whiskers serve as antennas. By sending and receiving electrical waves, it can communicate with others over vast distances. Dedenne does not evolve.

deerling.spoken: Deerling! National Number 585. The Season Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Grass type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 19.5 kilograms. The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass. Evolution: Deerling to Sawsbuck.

deino.spoken: Deino! National Number 633. The Irate Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Dragon type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 17.3 kilograms. It tends to bite everything, and it is not a picky eater. Approaching it carelessly is dangerous. Evolution: Deino to Zweilous to Hydreigon.

delcatty.spoken: Delcatty! National Number 301. The Prim Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 32.6 kilograms. Delcatty prefers to live an unfettered existence in which it can do as it pleases at its own pace. Because this Pokemon eats and sleeps whenever it decides, its daily routines are completely random. Evolution: Skitty to Delcatty.

delibird.spoken: Delibird! National Number 225. The Delivery Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Flying type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 16.0 kilograms. It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had. Delibird does not evolve.

delphox.spoken: Delphox! National Number 655. The Fox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 39.0 kilograms. It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future. Evolution: Fennekin to Braixen to Delphox.

deoxys.spoken: Deoxys! National Number 386. The DNA Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 60.8 kilograms. The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in Deoxys. The crystalline organ on this Pokemon's chest appears to be its brain. Deoxys does not evolve.

dewgong.spoken: Dewgong! National Number 87. The Sea Lion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ice type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters. Evolution: Seel to Dewgong.

dewott.spoken: Dewott! National Number 502. The Discipline Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 24.5 kilograms. Strict training is how it learns its flowing double-scalchop technique. Evolution: Oshawott to Dewott to Samurott.

dewpider.spoken: Dewpider! National Number 751. The Water Bubble Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Bug type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. It crawls onto the land in search of food. Its water bubble allows it to breathe and protects its soft head. Evolution: Dewpider to Araquanid.

dhelmise.spoken: Dhelmise! National Number 781. The Sea Creeper Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Grass type, standing 3.9 meters tall and weighing 210.0 kilograms. Swinging its massive anchor, it can knock out Wailord in a single blow. What appears to be green seaweed is actually its body. Dhelmise does not evolve.

dialga.spoken: Dialga! National Number 483. The Temporal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Dragon type, standing 5.4 meters tall and weighing 683.0 kilograms. It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity. Dialga does not evolve.

diancie.spoken: Diancie! National Number 719. The Jewel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Fairy type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 8.8 kilograms. A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world. Diancie does not evolve.

diggersby.spoken: Diggersby! National Number 660. The Digging Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Ground type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 42.4 kilograms. With their powerful ears, they can heft boulders of a ton or more with ease. They can be a big help at construction sites. Evolution: Bunnelby to Diggersby.

diglett.spoken: Diglett! National Number 50. The Mole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.8 kilograms. Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground. Evolution: Diglett to Dugtrio.

dipplin.spoken: Dipplin! National Number 1011. The Candy Apple Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Dragon type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 9.7 kilograms. Dipplin is two creatures in one Pokemon. Its evolution was triggered by a special apple grown only in one place. Evolution: Applin to Flapple to Appletun to Dipplin to Hydrapple.

ditto.spoken: Ditto! National Number 132. The Transform Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. When it spots an enemy, its body transfigures into an almost-perfect copy of its opponent. Ditto does not evolve.

dodrio.spoken: Dodrio! National Number 85. The Triple Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 85.2 kilograms. Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake. Evolution: Doduo to Dodrio.

doduo.spoken: Doduo! National Number 84. The Twin Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 39.2 kilograms. A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints. Evolution: Doduo to Dodrio.

dolliv.spoken: Dolliv! National Number 929. The Olive Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Normal type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 11.9 kilograms. Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone. Evolution: Smoliv to Dolliv to Arboliva.

dondozo.spoken: Dondozo! National Number 977. The Big Catfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 12.0 meters tall and weighing 220.0 kilograms. This Pokemon is a glutton, but it's bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey. Dondozo does not evolve.

donphan.spoken: Donphan! National Number 232. The Armor Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its Tackle is strong enough to knock down a house. Evolution: Phanpy to Donphan.

dottler.spoken: Dottler! National Number 825. The Radome Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Psychic type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 19.5 kilograms. It barely moves, but it's still alive. Hiding in its shell without food or water seems to have awakened its psychic powers. Evolution: Blipbug to Dottler to Orbeetle.

doublade.spoken: Doublade! National Number 680. The Sword Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Ghost type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 4.5 kilograms. When Honedge evolves, it divides into two swords, which cooperate via telepathy to coordinate attacks and slash their enemies to ribbons. Evolution: Honedge to Doublade to Aegislash.

dracovish.spoken: Dracovish! National Number 882. The Fossil Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Dragon type, standing 2.3 meters tall and weighing 215.0 kilograms. Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction. Dracovish does not evolve.

dracozolt.spoken: Dracozolt! National Number 880. The Fossil Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Dragon type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 190.0 kilograms. In ancient times, it was unbeatable thanks to its powerful lower body, but it went extinct anyway after it depleted all its plant-based food sources. Dracozolt does not evolve.

dragalge.spoken: Dragalge! National Number 691. The Mock Kelp Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Dragon type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 81.5 kilograms. Their poison is strong enough to eat through the hull of a tanker, and they spit it indiscriminately at anything that enters their territory. Evolution: Skrelp to Dragalge.

dragapult.spoken: Dragapult! National Number 887. The Stealth Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Ghost type, standing 3.0 meters tall and weighing 50.0 kilograms. When it isn't battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles. Evolution: Dreepy to Drakloak to Dragapult.

dragonair.spoken: Dragonair! National Number 148. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 4.0 meters tall and weighing 16.5 kilograms. A mystical Pokemon that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions. Evolution: Dratini to Dragonair to Dragonite.

dragonite.spoken: Dragonite! National Number 149. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Flying type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 210.0 kilograms. An extremely rarely seen marine Pokemon. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans. Evolution: Dratini to Dragonair to Dragonite.

drakloak.spoken: Drakloak! National Number 886. The Caretaker Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Ghost type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 11.0 kilograms. It's capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they successfully evolve. Evolution: Dreepy to Drakloak to Dragapult.

drampa.spoken: Drampa! National Number 780. The Placid Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Dragon type, standing 3.0 meters tall and weighing 185.0 kilograms. It has a compassionate personality, but if it is angered, it completely destroys its surroundings with its intense breath. Drampa does not evolve.

drapion.spoken: Drapion! National Number 452. The Ogre Scorpion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Dark type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 61.5 kilograms. It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison. Evolution: Skorupi to Drapion.

dratini.spoken: Dratini! National Number 147. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 3.3 kilograms. Long considered a mythical Pokemon until recently when a small colony was found living underwater. Evolution: Dratini to Dragonair to Dragonite.

drednaw.spoken: Drednaw! National Number 834. The Bite Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Rock type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 115.5 kilograms. With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokemon chomps down on its unfortunate prey. Evolution: Chewtle to Drednaw.

dreepy.spoken: Dreepy! National Number 885. The Lingering Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Ghost type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 2.0 kilograms. After being reborn as a ghost Pokemon, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas. Evolution: Dreepy to Drakloak to Dragapult.

drifblim.spoken: Drifblim! National Number 426. The Blimp Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Flying type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. It's drowzy in daytime, but flies off in the evening in big groups. No one knows where they go. Evolution: Drifloon to Drifblim.

drifloon.spoken: Drifloon! National Number 425. The Balloon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Flying type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 1.2 kilograms. A Pokemon formed by the spirits of people and Pokemon. It loves damp, humid seasons. Evolution: Drifloon to Drifblim.

drilbur.spoken: Drilbur! National Number 529. The Mole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 8.5 kilograms. It can dig through the ground at a speed of 30 mph. It could give a car running aboveground a good race. Evolution: Drilbur to Excadrill.

drizzile.spoken: Drizzile! National Number 817. The Water Lizard Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 11.5 kilograms. A clever combatant, this Pokemon battles using water balloons created with moisture secreted from its palms. Evolution: Sobble to Drizzile to Inteleon.

drowzee.spoken: Drowzee! National Number 96. The Hypnosis Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 32.4 kilograms. Puts enemies to sleep then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams. Evolution: Drowzee to Hypno.

druddigon.spoken: Druddigon! National Number 621. The Cave Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 139.0 kilograms. It warms its body by absorbing sunlight with its wings. When its body temperature falls, it can no longer move. Druddigon does not evolve.

dubwool.spoken: Dubwool! National Number 832. The Sheep Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 43.0 kilograms. Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You'll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it. Evolution: Wooloo to Dubwool.

ducklett.spoken: Ducklett! National Number 580. The Water Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Flying type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 5.5 kilograms. These bird Pokemon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food--peat moss. Evolution: Ducklett to Swanna.

dudunsparce.spoken: Dudunsparce! National Number 982. The Land Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 3.6 meters tall and weighing 39.2 kilograms. This Pokemon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles. Evolution: Dunsparce to Dudunsparce.

dugtrio.spoken: Dugtrio! National Number 51. The Mole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 33.3 kilograms. A team of Diglett triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground. Evolution: Diglett to Dugtrio.

dunsparce.spoken: Dunsparce! National Number 206. The Land Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 14.0 kilograms. When spotted, this Pokemon escapes backward by furi­ ously boring into the ground with its tail. Evolution: Dunsparce to Dudunsparce.

duosion.spoken: Duosion! National Number 578. The Mitosis Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 8.0 kilograms. Since they have two divided brains, at times they suddenly try to take two different actions at once. Evolution: Solosis to Duosion to Reuniclus.

duraludon.spoken: Duraludon! National Number 884. The Alloy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Dragon type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 40.0 kilograms. Its body resembles polished metal, and it's both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily. Evolution: Duraludon to Archaludon.

durant.spoken: Durant! National Number 632. The Iron Ant Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Steel type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 33.0 kilograms. They attack in groups, covering themselves in steel armor to protect themselves from Heatmor. Durant does not evolve.

dusclops.spoken: Dusclops! National Number 356. The Beckon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 30.6 kilograms. Dusclops's body is completely hollow - there is nothing at all inside. It is said that its body is like a black hole. This Pokemon will absorb anything into its body, but nothing will ever come back out. Evolution: Duskull to Dusclops to Dusknoir.

dusknoir.spoken: Dusknoir! National Number 477. The Gripper Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 106.6 kilograms. The antenna on its head captures radio waves from the world of spirits that command it to take people there. Evolution: Duskull to Dusclops to Dusknoir.

duskull.spoken: Duskull! National Number 355. The Requiem Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. Duskull can pass through any wall no matter how thick it may be. Once this Pokemon chooses a target, it will doggedly pursue the intended victim until the break of dawn. Evolution: Duskull to Dusclops to Dusknoir.

dustox.spoken: Dustox! National Number 269. The Poison Moth Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 31.6 kilograms. Dustox is instinctively drawn to light. Swarms of this Pokemon are attracted by the bright lights of cities, where they wreak havoc by stripping the leaves off roadside trees for food. Evolution: Wurmple to Silcoon to Beautifly to Cascoon to Dustox.

dwebble.spoken: Dwebble! National Number 557. The Rock Inn Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Rock type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 14.5 kilograms. This Pokemon can easily melt holes in hard rocks with a liquid secreted from its mouth. Evolution: Dwebble to Crustle.

eelektrik.spoken: Eelektrik! National Number 603. The EleFish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 22.0 kilograms. They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns. Evolution: Tynamo to Eelektrik to Eelektross.

eelektross.spoken: Eelektross! National Number 604. The EleFish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 80.5 kilograms. They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean. Evolution: Tynamo to Eelektrik to Eelektross.

eevee.spoken: Eevee! National Number 133. The Evolution Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element Stones. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

eiscue.spoken: Eiscue! National Number 875. The Penguin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 89.0 kilograms. It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold. Eiscue does not evolve.

ekans.spoken: Ekans! National Number 23. The Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 6.9 kilograms. Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as Pidgey and Spearow, whole. Evolution: Ekans to Arbok.

eldegoss.spoken: Eldegoss! National Number 830. The Cotton Bloom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 2.5 kilograms. The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokemon can benefit from them. Evolution: Gossifleur to Eldegoss.

electabuzz.spoken: Electabuzz! National Number 125. The Electric Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities. Evolution: Elekid to Electabuzz to Electivire.

electivire.spoken: Electivire! National Number 466. The Thunderbolt Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 138.6 kilograms. It pushes the tips of its two tails against the foe, then lets loose with over 20,000 volts of power. Evolution: Elekid to Electabuzz to Electivire.

electrike.spoken: Electrike! National Number 309. The Lightning Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 15.2 kilograms. Electrike stores electricity in its long body hair. This Pokemon stimulates its leg muscles with electric charges. These jolts of power give its legs explosive acceleration performance. Evolution: Electrike to Manectric.

electrode.spoken: Electrode! National Number 101. The Ball Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 66.6 kilograms. It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation. Evolution: Voltorb to Electrode.
