elekid.spoken: Elekid! National Number 239. The Electric Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 23.5 kilograms. It rotates its arms to generate electricity, but it tires easily, so it charges up only a little bit. Evolution: Elekid to Electabuzz to Electivire.

elgyem.spoken: Elgyem! National Number 605. The Cerebral Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.0 kilograms. It uses its strong psychic power to squeeze its opponent's brain, causing unendurable headaches. Evolution: Elgyem to Beheeyem.

emboar.spoken: Emboar! National Number 500. The Mega Fire Pig Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Fighting type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 150.0 kilograms. It has mastered fast and powerful fighting moves. It grows a beard of fire. Evolution: Tepig to Pignite to Emboar.

emolga.spoken: Emolga! National Number 587. The Sky Squirrel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Flying type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 5.0 kilograms. The energy made in its cheeks' electric pouches is stored inside its membrane and released while it is gliding. Emolga does not evolve.

empoleon.spoken: Empoleon! National Number 395. The Emperor Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Steel type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 84.5 kilograms. The three horns that extend from its beak attest to its power. The leader has the biggest horns. Evolution: Piplup to Prinplup to Empoleon.

enamorus.spoken: Enamorus! National Number 905. The Love-Hate Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy / Flying type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 48.0 kilograms. When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokemon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui. Enamorus does not evolve.

entei.spoken: Entei! National Number 244. The Volcano Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 198.0 kilograms. Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Un­ able to restrain its extreme power, it races headlong around the land. Entei does not evolve.

escavalier.spoken: Escavalier! National Number 589. The Cavalry Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Steel type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 33.0 kilograms. They fly around at high speed, striking with their pointed spears. Even when in trouble, they face opponents bravely. Evolution: Karrablast to Escavalier.

espathra.spoken: Espathra! National Number 956. The Ostrich Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 90.0 kilograms. It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament. Evolution: Flittle to Espathra.

espeon.spoken: Espeon! National Number 196. The Sun Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 26.5 kilograms. Its fur is so sensitive, it can sense minute shifts in the air and predict the weather. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

espurr.spoken: Espurr! National Number 677. The Restraint Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.5 kilograms. The organ that emits its intense psychic power is sheltered by its ears to keep power from leaking out. Evolution: Espurr to Meowstic.

eternatus.spoken: Eternatus! National Number 890. The Gigantic Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Dragon type, standing 20.0 meters tall and weighing 950.0 kilograms. The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active. Eternatus does not evolve.

excadrill.spoken: Excadrill! National Number 530. The Subterrene Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Steel type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 40.4 kilograms. It can help in tunnel construction. Its drill has evolved into steel strong enough to bore through iron plates. Evolution: Drilbur to Excadrill.

exeggcute.spoken: Exeggcute! National Number 102. The Egg Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Psychic type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 2.5 kilograms. Using telepathy only they can receive, they always form a cluster of six Exeggcute. Evolution: Exeggcute to Exeggutor.

exeggutor.spoken: Exeggutor! National Number 103. The Coconut Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Psychic type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an Exeggcute. Evolution: Exeggcute to Exeggutor.

exploud.spoken: Exploud! National Number 295. The Loud Noise Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 84.0 kilograms. Exploud triggers earthquakes with the tremors it creates by bellowing. If this Pokemon violently inhales from the ports on its body, it's a sign that it is preparing to let loose a huge bellow. Evolution: Whismur to Loudred to Exploud.

falinks.spoken: Falinks! National Number 870. The Formation Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 3.0 meters tall and weighing 62.0 kilograms. Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass's orders are absolute. Falinks does not evolve.

farfetchd.spoken: Farfetch'd! National Number 83. The Wild Duck Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword. Evolution: Farfetch'd to Sirfetch'd.

farigiraf.spoken: Farigiraf! National Number 981. The Long Neck Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Psychic type, standing 3.2 meters tall and weighing 160.0 kilograms. Now that the brain waves from the head and tail are synced up, the psychic power of this Pokemon is 10 times stronger than Girafarig's. Evolution: Girafarig to Farigiraf.

fearow.spoken: Fearow! National Number 22. The Beak Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 38.0 kilograms. With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest. Evolution: Spearow to Fearow.

feebas.spoken: Feebas! National Number 349. The Fish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 7.4 kilograms. Feebas's fins are ragged and tattered from the start of its life. Because of its shoddy appearance, this Pokemon is largely ignored. It is capable of living in both the sea and in rivers. Evolution: Feebas to Milotic.

fennekin.spoken: Fennekin! National Number 653. The Fox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 9.4 kilograms. Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit. Evolution: Fennekin to Braixen to Delphox.

feraligatr.spoken: Feraligatr! National Number 160. The Big Jaw Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 2.3 meters tall and weighing 88.8 kilograms. When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up. Evolution: Totodile to Croconaw to Feraligatr.

ferroseed.spoken: Ferroseed! National Number 597. The Thorn Seed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Steel type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 18.8 kilograms. When threatened, it attacks by shooting a barrage of spikes, which gives it a chance to escape by rolling away. Evolution: Ferroseed to Ferrothorn.

ferrothorn.spoken: Ferrothorn! National Number 598. The Thorn Pod Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Steel type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 110.0 kilograms. It fights by swinging around its three spiky feelers. A hit from these steel spikes can reduce a boulder to rubble. Evolution: Ferroseed to Ferrothorn.

fezandipiti.spoken: Fezandipiti! National Number 1016. The Retainer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Fairy type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 30.1 kilograms. Fezandipiti owes its beautiful looks and lovely voice to the toxic stimulants emanating from the chain wrapped around its body. Fezandipiti does not evolve.

fidough.spoken: Fidough! National Number 926. The Puppy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 10.9 kilograms. This Pokemon is smooth and moist to the touch. Yeast in Fidough's breath induces fermentation in the Pokemon's vicinity. Evolution: Fidough to Dachsbun.

finizen.spoken: Finizen! National Number 963. The Dolphin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 60.2 kilograms. It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures. Evolution: Finizen to Palafin.

finneon.spoken: Finneon! National Number 456. The Wing Fish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 7.0 kilograms. After long exposure to sunlight, the patterns on its tail fins shine vividly when darkness arrives. Evolution: Finneon to Lumineon.

flaaffy.spoken: Flaaffy! National Number 180. The Wool Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 13.3 kilograms. As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won't grow. Evolution: Mareep to Flaaffy to Ampharos.

flabebe.spoken: Flabebe! National Number 669. The Single Bloom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.1 meters tall and weighing 0.1 kilograms. It draws out and controls the hidden power of flowers. The flower Flabebe holds is most likely part of its body. Evolution: Flabebe to Floette to Florges.

flamigo.spoken: Flamigo! National Number 973. The Synchronize Pokemon. This Pokemon is Flying / Fighting type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 37.0 kilograms. This Pokemon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak. Flamigo does not evolve.

flapple.spoken: Flapple! National Number 841. The Apple Wing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Dragon type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns. Evolution: Applin to Flapple to Appletun to Dipplin to Hydrapple.

flareon.spoken: Flareon! National Number 136. The Flame Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 25.0 kilograms. When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

fletchinder.spoken: Fletchinder! National Number 662. The Ember Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Flying type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 16.0 kilograms. From its beak, it expels embers that set the tall grass on fire. Then it pounces on the bewildered prey that pop out of the grass. Evolution: Fletchling to Fletchinder to Talonflame.

fletchling.spoken: Fletchling! National Number 661. The Tiny Robin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.7 kilograms. These friendly Pokemon send signals to one another with beautiful chirps and tail-feather movements. Evolution: Fletchling to Fletchinder to Talonflame.

flittle.spoken: Flittle! National Number 955. The Frill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 1.5 kilograms. Flittle's toes levitate about half an inch above the ground because of the psychic power emitted from the frills on the Pokemon's belly. Evolution: Flittle to Espathra.

floatzel.spoken: Floatzel! National Number 419. The Sea Weasel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 33.5 kilograms. It floats using its well-developed flotation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people. Evolution: Buizel to Floatzel.

floette.spoken: Floette! National Number 670. The Single Bloom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.9 kilograms. It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the hidden power of flowers to battle. Evolution: Flabebe to Floette to Florges.

floragato.spoken: Floragato! National Number 907. The Grass Cat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 12.2 kilograms. Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents. Evolution: Sprigatito to Floragato to Meowscarada.

florges.spoken: Florges! National Number 671. The Garden Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 10.0 kilograms. It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains power from basking in the energy emitted by flowering plants. Evolution: Flabebe to Floette to Florges.

flutter-mane.spoken: Flutter Mane! National Number 987. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Fairy type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. This Pokemon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book. Flutter Mane does not evolve.

flygon.spoken: Flygon! National Number 330. The Mystic Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Dragon type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 82.0 kilograms. Flygon is nicknamed “the elemental spirit of the desert.” Because its flapping wings whip up a cloud of sand, this Pokemon is always enveloped in a sandstorm while flying. Evolution: Trapinch to Vibrava to Flygon.

fomantis.spoken: Fomantis! National Number 753. The Sickle Grass Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.5 kilograms. During the day, it sleeps and soaks up light. When night falls, it walks around looking for a safer place to sleep. Evolution: Fomantis to Lurantis.

foongus.spoken: Foongus! National Number 590. The Mushroom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. It lures people in with its Poke Ball pattern, then releases poison spores. Why it resembles a Poke Ball is unknown. Evolution: Foongus to Amoonguss.

forretress.spoken: Forretress! National Number 205. The Bagworm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Steel type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 125.8 kilograms. Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside the armor is a total mystery. Evolution: Pineco to Forretress.

fraxure.spoken: Fraxure! National Number 611. The Axe Jaw Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 36.0 kilograms. Since a broken tusk will not grow back, they diligently sharpen their tusks on river rocks after they've been fighting. Evolution: Axew to Fraxure to Haxorus.

frigibax.spoken: Frigibax! National Number 996. The Ice Fin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Ice type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 17.0 kilograms. Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores. Evolution: Frigibax to Arctibax to Baxcalibur.

frillish.spoken: Frillish! National Number 592. The Floating Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ghost type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 33.0 kilograms. With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor. Evolution: Frillish to Jellicent.

froakie.spoken: Froakie! National Number 656. The Bubble Frog Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 7.0 kilograms. It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked. Evolution: Froakie to Frogadier to Greninja.

frogadier.spoken: Frogadier! National Number 657. The Bubble Frog Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 10.9 kilograms. It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise control, hitting empty cans up to a hundred feet away. Evolution: Froakie to Frogadier to Greninja.

froslass.spoken: Froslass! National Number 478. The Snow Land Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Ghost type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 26.6 kilograms. It freezes foes with an icy breath nearly -60 degrees F. What seems to be its body is actually hollow. Evolution: Snorunt to Glalie to Froslass.

frosmoth.spoken: Frosmoth! National Number 873. The Frost Moth Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Bug type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 42.0 kilograms. Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains. The temperature of its wings is less than −290 degrees Fahrenheit. Evolution: Snom to Frosmoth.

fuecoco.spoken: Fuecoco! National Number 909. The Fire Croc Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 9.8 kilograms. It lies on warm rocks and uses the heat absorbed by its square-shaped scales to create fire energy. Evolution: Fuecoco to Crocalor to Skeledirge.

furfrou.spoken: Furfrou! National Number 676. The Poodle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 28.0 kilograms. Trimming its fluffy fur not only makes it more elegant but also increases the swiftness of its movements. Furfrou does not evolve.

furret.spoken: Furret! National Number 162. The Long Body Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 32.5 kilograms. It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other Pokemon to enter. Evolution: Sentret to Furret.

gabite.spoken: Gabite! National Number 444. The Cave Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Ground type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 56.0 kilograms. There is a long-held belief that medicine made from its scales will heal even incurable illnesses. Evolution: Gible to Gabite to Garchomp.

gallade.spoken: Gallade! National Number 475. The Blade Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Fighting type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 52.0 kilograms. A master of courtesy and swordsmanship, it fights using extending swords on its elbows. Evolution: Ralts to Kirlia to Gardevoir to Gallade.

galvantula.spoken: Galvantula! National Number 596. The EleSpider Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Electric type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 14.3 kilograms. When attacked, they create an electric barrier by spitting out many electrically charged threads. Evolution: Joltik to Galvantula.

garbodor.spoken: Garbodor! National Number 569. The Trash Heap Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 107.3 kilograms. It clenches opponents with its left arm and finishes them off with foul-smelling poison gas belched from its mouth. Evolution: Trubbish to Garbodor.

garchomp.spoken: Garchomp! National Number 445. The Mach Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Ground type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 95.0 kilograms. When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed. Evolution: Gible to Gabite to Garchomp.

gardevoir.spoken: Gardevoir! National Number 282. The Embrace Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Fairy type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 48.4 kilograms. It unleashes psychokinetic energy at full power when protecting a Trainer it has bonded closely with. Evolution: Ralts to Kirlia to Gardevoir to Gallade.

garganacl.spoken: Garganacl! National Number 934. The Rock Salt Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 2.3 meters tall and weighing 240.0 kilograms. Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokemon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward. Evolution: Nacli to Naclstack to Garganacl.

gastly.spoken: Gastly! National Number 92. The Gas Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Poison type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 0.1 kilograms. Almost invisible, this gaseous Pokemon cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice. Evolution: Gastly to Haunter to Gengar.

gastrodon.spoken: Gastrodon! National Number 423. The Sea Slug Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ground type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 29.9 kilograms. It has a pliable body without any bones. If any part of its body is torn off, it grows right back. Evolution: Shellos to Gastrodon.

genesect.spoken: Genesect! National Number 649. The Paleozoic Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Steel type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 82.5 kilograms. Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma. Genesect does not evolve.

gengar.spoken: Gengar! National Number 94. The Shadow Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Poison type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 40.5 kilograms. Under a full moon, this Pokemon likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright. Evolution: Gastly to Haunter to Gengar.

geodude.spoken: Geodude! National Number 74. The Rock Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ground type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 20.0 kilograms. Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them. Evolution: Geodude to Graveler to Golem.

gholdengo.spoken: Gholdengo! National Number 1000. The Coin Entity Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Ghost type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokemon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody. Evolution: Gimmighoul to Gholdengo.

gible.spoken: Gible! National Number 443. The Land Shark Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Ground type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 20.5 kilograms. It nests in small, horizontal holes in cave walls. It pounces to catch prey that stray too close. Evolution: Gible to Gabite to Garchomp.

gigalith.spoken: Gigalith! National Number 526. The Compressed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 260.0 kilograms. Compressing the energy from its internal core lets it fire off an attack capable of blowing away a mountain. Evolution: Roggenrola to Boldore to Gigalith.

gimmighoul.spoken: Gimmighoul! National Number 999. The Coin Chest Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 5.0 kilograms. This Pokemon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure. Evolution: Gimmighoul to Gholdengo.

girafarig.spoken: Girafarig! National Number 203. The Long Neck Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 41.5 kilograms. Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent and bite. Evolution: Girafarig to Farigiraf.

giratina.spoken: Giratina! National Number 487. The Renegade Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Dragon type, standing 4.5 meters tall and weighing 750.0 kilograms. A Pokemon that is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours. It appears in an ancient cemetery. Giratina does not evolve.

glaceon.spoken: Glaceon! National Number 471. The Fresh Snow Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 25.9 kilograms. As a protective technique, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand like needles. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

glalie.spoken: Glalie! National Number 362. The Face Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 256.5 kilograms. Glalie has a body made of rock, which it hardens with an armor of ice. This Pokemon has the ability to freeze moisture in the atmosphere into any shape it desires. Evolution: Snorunt to Glalie to Froslass.

glameow.spoken: Glameow! National Number 431. The Catty Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 3.9 kilograms. It claws if displeased and purrs when affectionate. Its fickleness is very popular among some. Evolution: Glameow to Purugly.

glastrier.spoken: Glastrier! National Number 896. The Wild Horse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 800.0 kilograms. Glastrier emits intense cold from its hooves. It's also a belligerent Pokemon—anything it wants, it takes by force. Glastrier does not evolve.

gligar.spoken: Gligar! National Number 207. The Fly Scorpion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Flying type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 64.8 kilograms. It flies straight at its target's face then clamps down on the star­ tled victim to inject poison. Evolution: Gligar to Gliscor.

glimmet.spoken: Glimmet! National Number 969. The Ore Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Poison type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 8.0 kilograms. It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison. Evolution: Glimmet to Glimmora.

glimmora.spoken: Glimmora! National Number 970. The Ore Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Poison type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 45.0 kilograms. When this Pokemon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body. Evolution: Glimmet to Glimmora.

gliscor.spoken: Gliscor! National Number 472. The Fang Scorpion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Flying type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 42.5 kilograms. It observes prey while hanging inverted from branches. When the chance presents itself, it swoops! Evolution: Gligar to Gliscor.

gloom.spoken: Gloom! National Number 44. The Weed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 8.6 kilograms. The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey. Evolution: Oddish to Gloom to Vileplume to Bellossom.

gogoat.spoken: Gogoat! National Number 673. The Mount Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 91.0 kilograms. It can tell how its Trainer is feeling by subtle shifts in the grip on its horns. This empathic sense lets them run as if one being. Evolution: Skiddo to Gogoat.

golbat.spoken: Golbat! National Number 42. The Bat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Flying type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 55.0 kilograms. Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly. Evolution: Zubat to Golbat to Crobat.

goldeen.spoken: Goldeen! National Number 118. The Goldfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname of the Water Queen. Evolution: Goldeen to Seaking.

golduck.spoken: Golduck! National Number 55. The Duck Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 76.6 kilograms. Often seen swim­ ming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa. Evolution: Psyduck to Golduck.

golem.spoken: Golem! National Number 76. The Megaton Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ground type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 300.0 kilograms. Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage. Evolution: Geodude to Graveler to Golem.

golett.spoken: Golett! National Number 622. The Automaton Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Ghost type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 92.0 kilograms. The energy that burns inside it enables it to move, but no one has yet been able to identify this energy. Evolution: Golett to Golurk.

golisopod.spoken: Golisopod! National Number 768. The Hard Scale Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Water type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 108.0 kilograms. With a flashing slash of its giant sharp claws, it cleaves seawater—or even air—right in two. Evolution: Wimpod to Golisopod.

golurk.spoken: Golurk! National Number 623. The Automaton Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Ghost type, standing 2.8 meters tall and weighing 330.0 kilograms. It flies across the sky at Mach speeds. Removing the seal on its chest makes its internal energy go out of control. Evolution: Golett to Golurk.

goodra.spoken: Goodra! National Number 706. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 150.5 kilograms. This very friendly Dragon-type Pokemon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving that Trainer covered in sticky slime. Evolution: Goomy to Sliggoo to Goodra.

goomy.spoken: Goomy! National Number 704. The Soft Tissue Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.8 kilograms. The weakest Dragon-type Pokemon, it lives in damp, shady places, so its body doesn't dry out. Evolution: Goomy to Sliggoo to Goodra.

gorebyss.spoken: Gorebyss! National Number 368. The South Sea Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 22.6 kilograms. Gorebyss lives in the southern seas at extreme depths. Its body is built to withstand the enormous pressure of water at incredible depths. Because of this, this Pokemon's body is unharmed by ordinary attacks. Evolution: Clamperl to Huntail to Gorebyss.

gossifleur.spoken: Gossifleur! National Number 829. The Flowering Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 2.2 kilograms. It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly. Evolution: Gossifleur to Eldegoss.

gothita.spoken: Gothita! National Number 574. The Fixation Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 5.8 kilograms. Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something. Evolution: Gothita to Gothorita to Gothitelle.

gothitelle.spoken: Gothitelle! National Number 576. The Astral Body Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 44.0 kilograms. Starry skies thousands of light-years away are visible in the space distorted by their intense psychic power. Evolution: Gothita to Gothorita to Gothitelle.

gothorita.spoken: Gothorita! National Number 575. The Manipulate Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 18.0 kilograms. They use hypnosis to control people and Pokemon. Tales of Gothorita leading people astray are told in every corner. Evolution: Gothita to Gothorita to Gothitelle.

gouging-fire.spoken: Gouging Fire! National Number 1020. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Dragon type, standing 3.5 meters tall and weighing 590.0 kilograms. There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame. Gouging Fire does not evolve.

gourgeist.spoken: Gourgeist! National Number 711. The Pumpkin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Grass type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 12.5 kilograms. Singing in eerie voices, they wander town streets on the night of the new moon. Anyone who hears their song is cursed. Evolution: Pumpkaboo to Gourgeist.

grafaiai.spoken: Grafaiai! National Number 945. The Toxic Monkey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Normal type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 27.2 kilograms. The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokemon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests. Evolution: Shroodle to Grafaiai.

granbull.spoken: Granbull! National Number 210. The Fairy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 48.7 kilograms. It is actually timid and easily spooked. If at­ tacked, it flails about to fend off its attacker. Evolution: Snubbull to Granbull.

grapploct.spoken: Grapploct! National Number 853. The Jujitsu Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 39.0 kilograms. A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokemon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful. Evolution: Clobbopus to Grapploct.

graveler.spoken: Graveler! National Number 75. The Rock Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ground type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 105.0 kilograms. Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction. Evolution: Geodude to Graveler to Golem.

great-tusk.spoken: Great Tusk! National Number 984. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Fighting type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 320.0 kilograms. Sightings of this Pokemon have occurred in recent years. The name Great Tusk was taken from a creature listed in a certain book. Great Tusk does not evolve.

greavard.spoken: Greavard! National Number 971. The Ghost Dog Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 35.0 kilograms. It is said that a dog Pokemon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokemon. Evolution: Greavard to Houndstone.

greedent.spoken: Greedent! National Number 820. The Greedy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 6.0 kilograms. It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokemon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn't notice the loss. Evolution: Skwovet to Greedent.

greninja.spoken: Greninja! National Number 658. The Ninja Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Dark type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 40.0 kilograms. It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two. Evolution: Froakie to Frogadier to Greninja.

grimer.spoken: Grimer! National Number 88. The Sludge Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories. Evolution: Grimer to Muk.

grimmsnarl.spoken: Grimmsnarl! National Number 861. The Bulk Up Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Fairy type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 61.0 kilograms. With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokemon can overwhelm even Machamp. Evolution: Impidimp to Morgrem to Grimmsnarl.

grookey.spoken: Grookey! National Number 810. The Chimp Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 5.0 kilograms. When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area. Evolution: Grookey to Thwackey to Rillaboom.

grotle.spoken: Grotle! National Number 388. The Grove Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 97.0 kilograms. A Grotle that lives in the forest is said to have its own secret springwater. Evolution: Turtwig to Grotle to Torterra.

groudon.spoken: Groudon! National Number 383. The Continent Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 3.5 meters tall and weighing 950.0 kilograms. Groudon has long been described in mythology as the Pokemon that raised lands and expanded continents. This Pokemon took to sleep after a cataclysmic battle with Kyogre. Groudon does not evolve.

grovyle.spoken: Grovyle! National Number 253. The Wood Gecko Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 21.6 kilograms. The leaves growing out of Grovyle's body are convenient for camouflaging it from enemies in the forest. This Pokemon is a master at climbing trees in jungles. Evolution: Treecko to Grovyle to Sceptile.

growlithe.spoken: Growlithe! National Number 58. The Puppy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 19.0 kilograms. Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space. Evolution: Growlithe to Arcanine.

grubbin.spoken: Grubbin! National Number 736. The Larva Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.4 kilograms. Its strong jaw enables it to scrape trees and slurp out the sap. It normally lives underground. Evolution: Grubbin to Charjabug to Vikavolt.

grumpig.spoken: Grumpig! National Number 326. The Manipulate Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 71.5 kilograms. Grumpig uses the black pearls on its body to amplify its psychic power waves for gaining total control over its foe. When this Pokemon uses its special power, its snorting breath grows labored. Evolution: Spoink to Grumpig.

gulpin.spoken: Gulpin! National Number 316. The Stomach Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 10.3 kilograms. It has a small heart and brain. Its stomach comprises most of its body, with enzymes to dissolve anything. Evolution: Gulpin to Swalot.

gumshoos.spoken: Gumshoos! National Number 735. The Stakeout Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 14.2 kilograms. When it finds a trace of its prey, it patiently stakes out the location...but it's always snoozing by nightfall. Evolution: Yungoos to Gumshoos.

gurdurr.spoken: Gurdurr! National Number 533. The Muscular Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 40.0 kilograms. This Pokemon is so muscular and strongly built that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch. Evolution: Timburr to Gurdurr to Conkeldurr.

guzzlord.spoken: Guzzlord! National Number 799. The Junkivore Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Dragon type, standing 5.5 meters tall and weighing 888.0 kilograms. It has gobbled mountains and swallowed whole buildings, according to reports. It's one of the Ultra Beasts. Guzzlord does not evolve.

gyarados.spoken: Gyarados! National Number 130. The Atrocious Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Flying type, standing 6.5 meters tall and weighing 235.0 kilograms. Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage. Evolution: Magikarp to Gyarados.

hakamo-o.spoken: Hakamo-o! National Number 783. The Scaly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Fighting type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 47.0 kilograms. It leaps at its prey with a courageous shout. Its scaly punches tear its opponents to shreds. Evolution: Jangmo-o to Hakamo-o to Kommo-o.

happiny.spoken: Happiny! National Number 440. The Playhouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 24.4 kilograms. It loves round white things. It carries an egg-shaped rock in imitation of Chansey. Evolution: Happiny to Chansey to Blissey.

hariyama.spoken: Hariyama! National Number 297. The Arm Thrust Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 2.3 meters tall and weighing 253.8 kilograms. Hariyama practices its straight-arm slaps in any number of locations. One hit of this Pokemon's powerful, openhanded, straight-arm punches could snap a telephone pole in two. Evolution: Makuhita to Hariyama.

hatenna.spoken: Hatenna! National Number 856. The Calm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 3.4 kilograms. Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures' emotions. If you don't have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you. Evolution: Hatenna to Hattrem to Hatterene.

hatterene.spoken: Hatterene! National Number 858. The Silent Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Fairy type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 5.1 kilograms. It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others. Evolution: Hatenna to Hattrem to Hatterene.

hattrem.spoken: Hattrem! National Number 857. The Serene Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 4.8 kilograms. No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokemon, it will silence you violently. Evolution: Hatenna to Hattrem to Hatterene.

haunter.spoken: Haunter! National Number 93. The Gas Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Poison type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 0.1 kilograms. Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from an­ other dimension. Evolution: Gastly to Haunter to Gengar.

hawlucha.spoken: Hawlucha! National Number 701. The Wrestling Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Flying type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 21.5 kilograms. Although its body is small, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers like Machamp and Hariyama. Hawlucha does not evolve.

haxorus.spoken: Haxorus! National Number 612. The Axe Jaw Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 105.5 kilograms. They are kind but can be relentless when defending territory. They challenge foes with tusks that can cut steel. Evolution: Axew to Fraxure to Haxorus.

heatmor.spoken: Heatmor! National Number 631. The Anteater Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 58.0 kilograms. It breathes through a hole in its tail while it burns with an internal fire. Durant is its prey. Heatmor does not evolve.

heatran.spoken: Heatran! National Number 485. The Lava Dome Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Steel type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 430.0 kilograms. It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls. Heatran does not evolve.

heliolisk.spoken: Heliolisk! National Number 695. The Generator Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Normal type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 21.0 kilograms. They flare their frills and generate energy. A single Heliolisk can generate sufficient electricity to power a skyscraper. Evolution: Helioptile to Heliolisk.

helioptile.spoken: Helioptile! National Number 694. The Generator Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Normal type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 6.0 kilograms. They make their home in deserts. They can generate their energy from basking in the sun, so eating food is not a requirement. Evolution: Helioptile to Heliolisk.

heracross.spoken: Heracross! National Number 214. The Single Horn Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Fighting type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 54.0 kilograms. This powerful Pokemon thrusts its prized horn under its enemies' bellies then lifts and throws them. Heracross does not evolve.

herdier.spoken: Herdier! National Number 507. The Loyal Dog Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 14.7 kilograms. It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives. Evolution: Lillipup to Herdier to Stoutland.

hippopotas.spoken: Hippopotas! National Number 449. The Hippo Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 49.5 kilograms. It lives in arid places. Instead of perspiration, it expels grainy sand from its body. Evolution: Hippopotas to Hippowdon.

hippowdon.spoken: Hippowdon! National Number 450. The Heavyweight Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 300.0 kilograms. It blasts internally stored sand from ports on its body to create a towering twister for attack. Evolution: Hippopotas to Hippowdon.

hitmonchan.spoken: Hitmonchan! National Number 107. The Punching Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 50.2 kilograms. The arm-twisting punches it throws pulverize even concrete. It rests after three minutes of fighting. Evolution: Tyrogue to Hitmonlee to Hitmonchan to Hitmontop.

hitmonlee.spoken: Hitmonlee! National Number 106. The Kicking Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 49.8 kilograms. When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides. Evolution: Tyrogue to Hitmonlee to Hitmonchan to Hitmontop.

hitmontop.spoken: Hitmontop! National Number 237. The Handstand Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 48.0 kilograms. If you become enchanted by its smooth, elegant, dance-like kicks, you may get drilled hard. Evolution: Tyrogue to Hitmonlee to Hitmonchan to Hitmontop.

ho-oh.spoken: Ho-Oh! National Number 250. The Rainbow Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Flying type, standing 3.8 meters tall and weighing 199.0 kilograms. Legends claim this Pokemon flies the world's skies con­ tinuously on its magnificent seven- colored wings. Ho-Oh does not evolve.

honchkrow.spoken: Honchkrow! National Number 430. The Big Boss Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Flying type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 27.3 kilograms. Becoming active at night, it is known to swarm with numerous Murkrow in tow. Evolution: Murkrow to Honchkrow.

honedge.spoken: Honedge! National Number 679. The Sword Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Ghost type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 2.0 kilograms. Apparently this Pokemon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force. Evolution: Honedge to Doublade to Aegislash.

hoopa.spoken: Hoopa! National Number 720. The Mischief Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Ghost type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.0 kilograms. This troublemaker sends anything and everything to faraway places using its loop, which can warp space. Hoopa does not evolve.

hoothoot.spoken: Hoothoot! National Number 163. The Owl Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 21.2 kilograms. It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen. Evolution: Hoothoot to Noctowl.

hoppip.spoken: Hoppip! National Number 187. The Cottonweed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Flying type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 0.5 kilograms. To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though. Evolution: Hoppip to Skiploom to Jumpluff.

horsea.spoken: Horsea! National Number 116. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 8.0 kilograms. Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water. Evolution: Horsea to Seadra to Kingdra.

houndoom.spoken: Houndoom! National Number 229. The Dark Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Fire type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 35.0 kilograms. If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away. Evolution: Houndour to Houndoom.

houndour.spoken: Houndour! National Number 228. The Dark Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Fire type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 10.8 kilograms. It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing its prey. Evolution: Houndour to Houndoom.

houndstone.spoken: Houndstone! National Number 972. The Ghost Dog Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokemon, this one is most loyal to its master. Evolution: Greavard to Houndstone.

huntail.spoken: Huntail! National Number 367. The Deep Sea Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 27.0 kilograms. Huntail's presence went unnoticed by people for a long time because it lives at extreme depths in the sea. This Pokemon's eyes can see clearly even in the murky dark depths of the ocean. Evolution: Clamperl to Huntail to Gorebyss.

hydrapple.spoken: Hydrapple! National Number 1019. The Apple Hydra Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Dragon type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 93.0 kilograms. Seven syrpents live inside an apple made of syrup. The syrpent in the center is the commander. Evolution: Applin to Flapple to Appletun to Dipplin to Hydrapple.

hydreigon.spoken: Hydreigon! National Number 635. The Brutal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Dragon type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 160.0 kilograms. This brutal Pokemon travels the skies on its six wings. Anything that moves seems like a foe to it, triggering its attack. Evolution: Deino to Zweilous to Hydreigon.

hypno.spoken: Hypno! National Number 97. The Hypnosis Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 75.6 kilograms. When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of Psi moves such as Hypnosis and Confusion. Evolution: Drowzee to Hypno.

igglybuff.spoken: Igglybuff! National Number 174. The Balloon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Fairy type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop. Evolution: Igglybuff to Jigglypuff to Wigglytuff.

illumise.spoken: Illumise! National Number 314. The Firefly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 17.7 kilograms. Illumise attracts a swarm of Volbeat using a sweet fragrance. Once the Volbeat have gathered, this Pokemon leads the lit-up swarm in drawing geometric designs on the canvas of the night sky. Illumise does not evolve.

impidimp.spoken: Impidimp! National Number 859. The Wily Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Fairy type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 5.5 kilograms. Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokemon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy. Evolution: Impidimp to Morgrem to Grimmsnarl.

incineroar.spoken: Incineroar! National Number 727. The Heel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Dark type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 83.0 kilograms. This Pokemon has a violent, selfish disposition. If it's not in the mood to listen, it will ignore its Trainer's orders with complete nonchalance. Evolution: Litten to Torracat to Incineroar.

indeedee.spoken: Indeedee! National Number 876. The Emotion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Normal type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 28.0 kilograms. It uses the horns on its head to sense the emotions of others. Males will act as valets for those they serve, looking after their every need. Indeedee does not evolve.

infernape.spoken: Infernape! National Number 392. The Flame Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Fighting type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 55.0 kilograms. It uses a special kind of martial arts involving all its limbs. Its fire never goes out. Evolution: Chimchar to Monferno to Infernape.

inkay.spoken: Inkay! National Number 686. The Revolving Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Psychic type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 3.5 kilograms. Opponents who stare at the flashing of the light-emitting spots on its body become dazed and lose their will to fight. Evolution: Inkay to Malamar.

inteleon.spoken: Inteleon! National Number 818. The Secret Agent Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 45.2 kilograms. It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air. Evolution: Sobble to Drizzile to Inteleon.

iron-boulder.spoken: Iron Boulder! National Number 1022. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 162.5 kilograms. It resembles a Pokemon described in a dubious magazine as a Terrakion that had been modified by an evil organization. Iron Boulder does not evolve.

iron-bundle.spoken: Iron Bundle! National Number 991. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 11.0 kilograms. Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine article. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization. Iron Bundle does not evolve.

iron-crown.spoken: Iron Crown! National Number 1023. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Psychic type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 156.0 kilograms. It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion. Iron Crown does not evolve.

iron-hands.spoken: Iron Hands! National Number 992. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Electric type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 380.7 kilograms. It is very similar to a cyborg covered exclusively by a paranormal magazine. The cyborg was said to be the modified form of a certain athlete. Iron Hands does not evolve.

iron-jugulis.spoken: Iron Jugulis! National Number 993. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Flying type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 111.0 kilograms. It resembles a certain Pokemon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot. Iron Jugulis does not evolve.

iron-leaves.spoken: Iron Leaves! National Number 1010. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 125.0 kilograms. Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine. Iron Leaves does not evolve.

iron-moth.spoken: Iron Moth! National Number 994. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Poison type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 36.0 kilograms. This Pokemon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a Ufo sent to observe humanity. Iron Moth does not evolve.

iron-thorns.spoken: Iron Thorns! National Number 995. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Electric type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 303.0 kilograms. It has some similarities to a Pokemon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from one billion years into the future. Iron Thorns does not evolve.

iron-treads.spoken: Iron Treads! National Number 990. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Steel type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 240.0 kilograms. This Pokemon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens. Iron Treads does not evolve.

iron-valiant.spoken: Iron Valiant! National Number 1006. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy / Fighting type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 35.0 kilograms. It has some similarities to a mad scientist's invention covered in a paranormal magazine. Iron Valiant does not evolve.

ivysaur.spoken: Ivysaur! National Number 2. The Seed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 13.0 kilograms. When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs. Evolution: Bulbasaur to Ivysaur to Venusaur.

jangmo-o.spoken: Jangmo-o! National Number 782. The Scaly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 29.7 kilograms. It expresses its feelings by smacking its scales. Metallic sounds echo through the tall mountains where Jangmo-o lives. Evolution: Jangmo-o to Hakamo-o to Kommo-o.

jellicent.spoken: Jellicent! National Number 593. The Floating Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ghost type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 135.0 kilograms. The fate of the ships and crew that wander into Jellicent's habitat: all sunken, all lost, all vanished. Evolution: Frillish to Jellicent.

jigglypuff.spoken: Jigglypuff! National Number 39. The Balloon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Fairy type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 5.5 kilograms. When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep. Evolution: Igglybuff to Jigglypuff to Wigglytuff.

jirachi.spoken: Jirachi! National Number 385. The Wish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Psychic type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.1 kilograms. A legend states that Jirachi will make true any wish that is written on notes attached to its head when it awakens. If this Pokemon senses danger, it will fight without awakening. Jirachi does not evolve.

jolteon.spoken: Jolteon! National Number 135. The Lightning Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 24.5 kilograms. It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10000- volt lightning bolts. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

joltik.spoken: Joltik! National Number 595. The Attaching Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Electric type, standing 0.1 meters tall and weighing 0.6 kilograms. Joltik that live in cities have learned a technique for sucking electricity from the outlets in houses. Evolution: Joltik to Galvantula.

jumpluff.spoken: Jumpluff! National Number 189. The Cottonweed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Flying type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 3.0 kilograms. Blown by seasonal winds, it circles the globe, scattering cotton spores as it goes. Evolution: Hoppip to Skiploom to Jumpluff.

jynx.spoken: Jynx! National Number 124. The Human Shape Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Psychic type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 40.6 kilograms. It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it. Evolution: Smoochum to Jynx.

kabuto.spoken: Kabuto! National Number 140. The Shellfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 11.5 kilograms. A Pokemon that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago. Evolution: Kabuto to Kabutops.

kabutops.spoken: Kabutops! National Number 141. The Shellfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Water type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 40.5 kilograms. Kabutops slices its prey apart and sucks out the fluids. The discarded body parts become food for other Pokemon. Evolution: Kabuto to Kabutops.

kadabra.spoken: Kadabra! National Number 64. The Psi Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 56.5 kilograms. It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by. Evolution: Abra to Kadabra to Alakazam.

kakuna.spoken: Kakuna! National Number 14. The Cocoon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 10.0 kilograms. Almost incapable of moving, this Pokemon can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators. Evolution: Weedle to Kakuna to Beedrill.

kangaskhan.spoken: Kangaskhan! National Number 115. The Parent Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 80.0 kilograms. The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old. Kangaskhan does not evolve.

karrablast.spoken: Karrablast! National Number 588. The Clamping Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 5.9 kilograms. These mysterious Pokemon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet. Evolution: Karrablast to Escavalier.

kartana.spoken: Kartana! National Number 798. The Drawn Sword Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Steel type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 0.1 kilograms. This Ultra Beast came from the Ultra Wormhole. It seems not to attack enemies on its own, but its sharp body is a dangerous weapon in itself. Kartana does not evolve.

kecleon.spoken: Kecleon! National Number 352. The Color Swap Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 22.0 kilograms. Kecleon is capable of changing its body colors at will to blend in with its surroundings. There is one exception - this Pokemon can't change the zigzag pattern on its belly. Kecleon does not evolve.

keldeo.spoken: Keldeo! National Number 647. The Colt Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Fighting type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 48.5 kilograms. By blasting water from its hooves, it can glide across water. It excels at using leg moves while battling. Keldeo does not evolve.

kilowattrel.spoken: Kilowattrel! National Number 941. The Frigatebird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Flying type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 38.6 kilograms. Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokemon can fly over 430 miles in a day. Evolution: Wattrel to Kilowattrel.

kingambit.spoken: Kingambit! National Number 983. The Big Blade Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Steel type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit. Evolution: Pawniard to Bisharp to Kingambit.

kingdra.spoken: Kingdra! National Number 230. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Dragon type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 152.0 kilograms. It is said that it usually hides in underwater caves. It can create whirlpools by yawning. Evolution: Horsea to Seadra to Kingdra.

kingler.spoken: Kingler! National Number 99. The Pincer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use. Evolution: Krabby to Kingler.

kirlia.spoken: Kirlia! National Number 281. The Emotion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Fairy type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 20.2 kilograms. It is said that a Kirlia that is exposed to the positive emotions of its Trainer grows beautiful. This Pokemon controls psychokinetic powers with its highly developed brain. Evolution: Ralts to Kirlia to Gardevoir to Gallade.

klang.spoken: Klang! National Number 600. The Gear Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 51.0 kilograms. By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster. Evolution: Klink to Klang to Klinklang.

klawf.spoken: Klawf! National Number 950. The Ambush Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 79.0 kilograms. Klawf hangs upside-down from cliffs, waiting for prey. But Klawf can't remain in this position for long because its blood rushes to its head. Klawf does not evolve.

kleavor.spoken: Kleavor! National Number 900. The Axe Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Rock type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 89.0 kilograms. A violent creature that fells towering trees with its crude axes and shields itself with hard stone. If one should chance upon this Pokemon in the wilds, one's only recourse is to flee. Evolution: Scyther to Scizor to Kleavor.

klefki.spoken: Klefki! National Number 707. The Key Ring Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Fairy type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 3.0 kilograms. These key collectors threaten any attackers by fiercely jingling their keys at them. Klefki does not evolve.

klink.spoken: Klink! National Number 599. The Gear Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 21.0 kilograms. The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing. Evolution: Klink to Klang to Klinklang.

klinklang.spoken: Klinklang! National Number 601. The Gear Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 81.0 kilograms. Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the charged energy through its spikes into an area. Evolution: Klink to Klang to Klinklang.

koffing.spoken: Koffing! National Number 109. The Poison Gas Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning. Evolution: Koffing to Weezing.

komala.spoken: Komala! National Number 775. The Drowsing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 19.9 kilograms. It is born asleep, and it dies asleep. All its movements are apparently no more than the results of it tossing and turning in its dreams. Komala does not evolve.

kommo-o.spoken: Kommo-o! National Number 784. The Scaly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Fighting type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 78.2 kilograms. When it spots enemies, it threatens them by jingling the scales on its tail. Weak opponents will crack and flee in panic. Evolution: Jangmo-o to Hakamo-o to Kommo-o.

koraidon.spoken: Koraidon! National Number 1007. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Dragon type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 303.0 kilograms. This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists. Koraidon does not evolve.

krabby.spoken: Krabby! National Number 98. The River Crab Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways. Evolution: Krabby to Kingler.

kricketot.spoken: Kricketot! National Number 401. The Cricket Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.2 kilograms. It shakes its head back to front, causing its antennae to hit each other and sound like a xylophone. Evolution: Kricketot to Kricketune.

kricketune.spoken: Kricketune! National Number 402. The Cricket Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 25.5 kilograms. It crosses its knifelike arms in front of its chest when it cries. It can compose melodies ad lib. Evolution: Kricketot to Kricketune.

krokorok.spoken: Krokorok! National Number 552. The Desert Croc Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Dark type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 33.4 kilograms. They live in groups of a few individuals. Protective membranes shield their eyes from sandstorms. Evolution: Sandile to Krokorok to Krookodile.

krookodile.spoken: Krookodile! National Number 553. The Intimidation Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Dark type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 96.3 kilograms. They never allow prey to escape. Their jaws are so powerful, they can crush the body of an automobile. Evolution: Sandile to Krokorok to Krookodile.

kubfu.spoken: Kubfu! National Number 891. The Wushu Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 12.0 kilograms. Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves. Evolution: Kubfu to Urshifu.

kyogre.spoken: Kyogre! National Number 382. The Sea Basin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 4.5 meters tall and weighing 352.0 kilograms. Kyogre has the power to create massive rain clouds that cover the entire sky and bring about torrential downpours. This Pokemon saved people who were suffering from droughts. Kyogre does not evolve.

kyurem.spoken: Kyurem! National Number 646. The Boundary Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Ice type, standing 3.0 meters tall and weighing 325.0 kilograms. It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out. Kyurem does not evolve.

lairon.spoken: Lairon! National Number 305. The Iron Armor Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Rock type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. Lairon tempers its steel body by drinking highly nutritious mineral springwater until it is bloated. This Pokemon makes its nest close to springs of delicious water. Evolution: Aron to Lairon to Aggron.

lampent.spoken: Lampent! National Number 608. The Lamp Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Fire type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 13.0 kilograms. This ominous Pokemon is feared. Through cities it wanders, searching for the spirits of the fallen. Evolution: Litwick to Lampent to Chandelure.

landorus.spoken: Landorus! National Number 645. The Abundance Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Flying type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 68.0 kilograms. Lands visited by Landorus grant such bountiful crops that it has been hailed as “The Guardian of the Fields.” Landorus does not evolve.

lanturn.spoken: Lanturn! National Number 171. The Light Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Electric type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 22.5 kilograms. The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea's surface from a depth of over three miles. Evolution: Chinchou to Lanturn.

lapras.spoken: Lapras! National Number 131. The Transport Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ice type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 220.0 kilograms. A Pokemon that has been over­ hunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water. Lapras does not evolve.

larvesta.spoken: Larvesta! National Number 636. The Torch Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Fire type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 28.8 kilograms. This Pokemon was believed to have been born from the sun. When it evolves, its entire body is engulfed in flames. Evolution: Larvesta to Volcarona.

larvitar.spoken: Larvitar! National Number 246. The Rock Skin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ground type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 72.0 kilograms. It feeds on soil. After it has eaten a large mountain, it will fall asleep so it can grow. Evolution: Larvitar to Pupitar to Tyranitar.

latias.spoken: Latias! National Number 380. The Eon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Psychic type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 40.0 kilograms. Latias is highly sensitive to the emotions of people. If it senses any hostility, this Pokemon ruffles the feathers all over its body and cries shrilly to intimidate the foe. Latias does not evolve.

latios.spoken: Latios! National Number 381. The Eon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Psychic type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. Latios has the ability to make its foe see an image of what it has seen or imagines in its head. This Pokemon is intelligent and understands human speech. Latios does not evolve.

leafeon.spoken: Leafeon! National Number 470. The Verdant Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 25.5 kilograms. Just like a plant, it uses photosynthesis. As a result, it is always enveloped in clear air. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

leavanny.spoken: Leavanny! National Number 542. The Nurturing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Grass type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 20.5 kilograms. Upon finding a small Pokemon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk. Evolution: Sewaddle to Swadloon to Leavanny.

lechonk.spoken: Lechonk! National Number 915. The Hog Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 10.2 kilograms. It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn't use it for anything other than foraging. Evolution: Lechonk to Oinkologne.

ledian.spoken: Ledian! National Number 166. The Five Star Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 35.6 kilograms. When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder. Evolution: Ledyba to Ledian.

ledyba.spoken: Ledyba! National Number 165. The Five Star Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 10.8 kilograms. It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group. Evolution: Ledyba to Ledian.

lickilicky.spoken: Lickilicky! National Number 463. The Licking Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 140.0 kilograms. It wraps things with its extensible tongue. Getting too close to it will leave you soaked with drool. Evolution: Lickitung to Lickilicky.

lickitung.spoken: Lickitung! National Number 108. The Licking Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 65.5 kilograms. Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks enemies. Evolution: Lickitung to Lickilicky.

liepard.spoken: Liepard! National Number 510. The Cruel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 37.5 kilograms. These Pokemon vanish and appear unexpectedly. Many Trainers are drawn to their beautiful form and fur. Evolution: Purrloin to Liepard.

lileep.spoken: Lileep! National Number 345. The Sea Lily Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Grass type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 23.8 kilograms. It lived on the seafloor 100 million years ago and was reanimated scientifically. Evolution: Lileep to Cradily.

lilligant.spoken: Lilligant! National Number 549. The Flowering Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 16.3 kilograms. Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokemon is popular with celebrities. Evolution: Petilil to Lilligant.

lillipup.spoken: Lillipup! National Number 506. The Puppy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.1 kilograms. It faces strong opponents with great courage. But, when at a disadvantage in a fight, this intelligent Pokemon flees. Evolution: Lillipup to Herdier to Stoutland.

linoone.spoken: Linoone! National Number 264. The Rushing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 32.5 kilograms. Linoone always runs full speed and only in straight lines. If facing an obstacle, it makes a right-angle turn to evade it. This Pokemon is very challenged by gently curving roads. Evolution: Zigzagoon to Linoone to Obstagoon.

litleo.spoken: Litleo! National Number 667. The Lion Cub Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Normal type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 13.5 kilograms. The stronger the opponent it faces, the more heat surges from its mane and the more power flows through its body. Evolution: Litleo to Pyroar.

litten.spoken: Litten! National Number 725. The Fire Cat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.3 kilograms. While grooming itself, it builds up fur inside its stomach. It sets the fur alight and spews fiery attacks, which change based on how it coughs. Evolution: Litten to Torracat to Incineroar.

litwick.spoken: Litwick! National Number 607. The Candle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Fire type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.1 kilograms. Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokemon, which becomes the fuel that it burns. Evolution: Litwick to Lampent to Chandelure.

lokix.spoken: Lokix! National Number 920. The Grasshopper Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Dark type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 17.5 kilograms. When it decides to fight all out, it stands on its previously folded legs to enter Showdown Mode. It neutralizes its enemies in short order. Evolution: Nymble to Lokix.

lombre.spoken: Lombre! National Number 271. The Jolly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Grass type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 32.5 kilograms. Lombre is nocturnal - it will get active after dusk. It is also a mischief-maker. When this Pokemon spots anglers, it tugs on their fishing lines from beneath the surface and enjoys their consternation. Evolution: Lotad to Lombre to Ludicolo.

lopunny.spoken: Lopunny! National Number 428. The Rabbit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 33.3 kilograms. An extremely cautious Pokemon. It cloaks its body with its fluffy ear fur when it senses danger. Evolution: Buneary to Lopunny.

lotad.spoken: Lotad! National Number 270. The Water Weed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Grass type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 2.6 kilograms. Lotad live in ponds and lakes, where they float on the surface. It grows weak if its broad leaf dies. On rare occasions, this Pokemon travels on land in search of clean water. Evolution: Lotad to Lombre to Ludicolo.

loudred.spoken: Loudred! National Number 294. The Big Voice Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 40.5 kilograms. Loudred's bellowing can completely decimate a wood-frame house. It uses its voice to punish its foes. This Pokemon's round ears serve as loudspeakers. Evolution: Whismur to Loudred to Exploud.

lucario.spoken: Lucario! National Number 448. The Aura Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Steel type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 54.0 kilograms. It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech. Evolution: Riolu to Lucario.

ludicolo.spoken: Ludicolo! National Number 272. The Carefree Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Grass type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 55.0 kilograms. Ludicolo begins dancing as soon as it hears cheerful, festive music. This Pokemon is said to appear when it hears the singing of children on hiking outings. Evolution: Lotad to Lombre to Ludicolo.

lugia.spoken: Lugia! National Number 249. The Diving Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Flying type, standing 5.2 meters tall and weighing 216.0 kilograms. It is said that it quietly spends its time deep at the bottom of the sea because its powers are too strong. Lugia does not evolve.

lumineon.spoken: Lumineon! National Number 457. The Neon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 24.0 kilograms. It lives on the deep-sea floor. It attracts prey by flashing the patterns on its four tail fins. Evolution: Finneon to Lumineon.

lunala.spoken: Lunala! National Number 792. The Moone Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Ghost type, standing 4.0 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. It is said to be a female evolution of Cosmog. When its third eye activates, away it flies to another world. Evolution: Cosmog to Cosmoem to Solgaleo to Lunala.

lunatone.spoken: Lunatone! National Number 337. The Meteorite Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Psychic type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 168.0 kilograms. Lunatone was discovered at a location where a meteorite fell. As a result, some people theorize that this Pokemon came from space. However, no one has been able to prove this theory so far. Lunatone does not evolve.

lurantis.spoken: Lurantis! National Number 754. The Bloom Sickle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 18.5 kilograms. It requires a lot of effort to maintain Lurantis's vivid coloring, but some collectors enjoy this work and treat it as their hobby. Evolution: Fomantis to Lurantis.

luvdisc.spoken: Luvdisc! National Number 370. The Rendezvous Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 8.7 kilograms. Luvdisc live in shallow seas in the tropics. This heart-shaped Pokemon earned its name by swimming after loving couples it spotted in the ocean's waves. Luvdisc does not evolve.

luxio.spoken: Luxio! National Number 404. The Spark Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 30.5 kilograms. Its claws loose electricity with enough amperage to cause fainting. They live in small groups. Evolution: Shinx to Luxio to Luxray.

luxray.spoken: Luxray! National Number 405. The Gleam Eyes Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 42.0 kilograms. It has eyes that can see through anything. It spots and captures prey hiding behind objects. Evolution: Shinx to Luxio to Luxray.

lycanroc.spoken: Lycanroc! National Number 745. The Wolf Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 25.0 kilograms. Its quick movements confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons. Evolution: Rockruff to Lycanroc.

mabosstiff.spoken: Mabosstiff! National Number 943. The Boss Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 61.0 kilograms. This Pokemon can store energy in its large dewlap. Mabosstiff unleashes this energy all at once to blow away enemies. Evolution: Maschiff to Mabosstiff.

machamp.spoken: Machamp! National Number 68. The Superpower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 130.0 kilograms. Using its heavy muscles, it throws powerful punches that can send the victim clear over the horizon. Evolution: Machop to Machoke to Machamp.
