machoke.spoken: Machoke! National Number 67. The Superpower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 70.5 kilograms. It happily carries heavy cargo to toughen up. It willingly does hard work for people. Evolution: Machop to Machoke to Machamp.

machop.spoken: Machop! National Number 66. The Superpower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 19.5 kilograms. Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger. Evolution: Machop to Machoke to Machamp.

magby.spoken: Magby! National Number 240. The Live Coal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 21.4 kilograms. Each and every time it inhales and exhales, hot embers dribble out of its mouth and nostrils. Evolution: Magby to Magmar to Magmortar.

magcargo.spoken: Magcargo! National Number 219. The Lava Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Rock type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 55.0 kilograms. The shell on its back is just skin that has cooled and hardened. It breaks easily with a slight touch. Evolution: Slugma to Magcargo.

magearna.spoken: Magearna! National Number 801. The Artificial Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Fairy type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 80.5 kilograms. This artificial Pokemon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak. Magearna does not evolve.

magikarp.spoken: Magikarp! National Number 129. The Fish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 10.0 kilograms. In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today. Evolution: Magikarp to Gyarados.

magmar.spoken: Magmar! National Number 126. The Spitfire Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 44.5 kilograms. Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames. Evolution: Magby to Magmar to Magmortar.

magmortar.spoken: Magmortar! National Number 467. The Blast Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 68.0 kilograms. It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees F from the ends of its arms. It lives in volcanic craters. Evolution: Magby to Magmar to Magmortar.

magnemite.spoken: Magnemite! National Number 81. The Magnet Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Steel type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 6.0 kilograms. Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses Thunder Wave and similar moves. Evolution: Magnemite to Magneton to Magnezone.

magneton.spoken: Magneton! National Number 82. The Magnet Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Steel type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. Formed by several Magnemites linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up. Evolution: Magnemite to Magneton to Magnezone.

magnezone.spoken: Magnezone! National Number 462. The Magnet Area Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Steel type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 180.0 kilograms. It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism. Evolution: Magnemite to Magneton to Magnezone.

makuhita.spoken: Makuhita! National Number 296. The Guts Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 86.4 kilograms. Makuhita is tenacious - it will keep getting up and attacking its foe however many times it is knocked down. Every time it gets back up, this Pokemon stores more energy in its body for evolving. Evolution: Makuhita to Hariyama.

malamar.spoken: Malamar! National Number 687. The Overturning Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 47.0 kilograms. It wields the most compelling hypnotic powers of any Pokemon, and it forces others to do whatever it wants. Evolution: Inkay to Malamar.

mamoswine.spoken: Mamoswine! National Number 473. The Twin Tusk Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Ground type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 291.0 kilograms. Its impressive tusks are made of ice. The population thinned when it turned warm after the ice age. Evolution: Swinub to Piloswine to Mamoswine.

manaphy.spoken: Manaphy! National Number 490. The Seafaring Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.4 kilograms. Born on a cold seafloor, it will swim great distances to return to its birthplace. Evolution: Phione to Manaphy.

mandibuzz.spoken: Mandibuzz! National Number 630. The Bone Vulture Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Flying type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 39.5 kilograms. It makes a nest out of bones it finds. It grabs weakened prey in its talons and hauls it to its nest of bones. Evolution: Vullaby to Mandibuzz.

manectric.spoken: Manectric! National Number 310. The Discharge Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 40.2 kilograms. Manectric is constantly discharging electricity from its mane. The sparks sometimes ignite forest fires. When it enters a battle, this Pokemon creates thunderclouds. Evolution: Electrike to Manectric.

mankey.spoken: Mankey! National Number 56. The Pig Monkey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 28.0 kilograms. Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant. Evolution: Mankey to Primeape to Annihilape.

mantine.spoken: Mantine! National Number 226. The Kite Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Flying type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 220.0 kilograms. As it majestically swims, it doesn't care if Remoraid attach to it for scavenging its leftovers. Evolution: Mantyke to Mantine.

mantyke.spoken: Mantyke! National Number 458. The Kite Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Flying type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 65.0 kilograms. A friendly Pokemon that captures the subtle flows of seawater using its two antennae. Evolution: Mantyke to Mantine.

maractus.spoken: Maractus! National Number 556. The Cactus Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 28.0 kilograms. It uses an up-tempo song and dance to drive away the bird Pokemon that prey on its flower seeds. Maractus does not evolve.

mareanie.spoken: Mareanie! National Number 747. The Brutal Star Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 8.0 kilograms. It plunges the poison spike on its head into its prey. When the prey has weakened, Mareanie deals the finishing blow with its 10 tentacles. Evolution: Mareanie to Toxapex.

mareep.spoken: Mareep! National Number 179. The Wool Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 7.8 kilograms. If static elec­ tricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you. Evolution: Mareep to Flaaffy to Ampharos.

marill.spoken: Marill! National Number 183. The Aqua Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Fairy type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 8.5 kilograms. The tip of its tail, which con­ tains oil that is lighter than wa­ ter, lets it swim without drowning. Evolution: Azurill to Marill to Azumarill.

marowak.spoken: Marowak! National Number 105. The Bone Keeper Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 45.0 kilograms. The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to knock out targets. Evolution: Cubone to Marowak.

marshadow.spoken: Marshadow! National Number 802. The Gloomdweller Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Ghost type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 22.2 kilograms. Able to conceal itself in shadows, it never appears before humans, so its very existence was the stuff of myth. Marshadow does not evolve.

marshtomp.spoken: Marshtomp! National Number 259. The Mud Fish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ground type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 28.0 kilograms. The surface of Marshtomp's body is enveloped by a thin, sticky film that enables it to live on land. This Pokemon plays in mud on beaches when the ocean tide is low. Evolution: Mudkip to Marshtomp to Swampert.

maschiff.spoken: Maschiff! National Number 942. The Rascal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 16.0 kilograms. It always scowls in an attempt to make opponents take it seriously, but even crying children will burst into laughter when they see Maschiff's face. Evolution: Maschiff to Mabosstiff.

masquerain.spoken: Masquerain! National Number 284. The Eyeball Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 3.6 kilograms. Masquerain intimidates enemies with the eyelike patterns on its antennas. This Pokemon flaps its four wings to freely fly in any direction - even sideways and backwards - as if it were a helicopter. Evolution: Surskit to Masquerain.

maushold.spoken: Maushold! National Number 925. The Family Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.8 kilograms. The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokemon, but nobody knows for sure. Evolution: Tandemaus to Maushold.

mawile.spoken: Mawile! National Number 303. The Deceiver Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Fairy type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 11.5 kilograms. Mawhile's huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed. Its docile-looking face serves to lull its foe into letting down its guard. When the foe least expects it, Mawhile chomps it with its gaping jaws. Mawile does not evolve.

medicham.spoken: Medicham! National Number 308. The Meditate Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Psychic type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 31.5 kilograms. It is said that through meditation, Medicham heightens energy inside its body and sharpens its sixth sense. This Pokemon hides its presence by merging itself with fields and mountains. Evolution: Meditite to Medicham.

meditite.spoken: Meditite! National Number 307. The Meditate Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Psychic type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 11.2 kilograms. Meditite undertakes rigorous mental training deep in the mountains. However, whenever it meditates, this Pokemon always loses its concentration and focus. As a result, its training never ends. Evolution: Meditite to Medicham.

meganium.spoken: Meganium! National Number 154. The Herb Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 100.5 kilograms. The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings. Evolution: Chikorita to Bayleef to Meganium.

melmetal.spoken: Melmetal! National Number 809. The Hex Nut Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 800.0 kilograms. Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years. Melmetal does not evolve.

meloetta.spoken: Meloetta! National Number 648. The Melody Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Psychic type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it. Meloetta does not evolve.

meltan.spoken: Meltan! National Number 808. The Hex Nut Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 8.0 kilograms. It dissolves and eats metal. Circulating liquid metal within its body is how it generates energy. Meltan does not evolve.

meowscarada.spoken: Meowscarada! National Number 908. The Magician Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Dark type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 31.2 kilograms. This Pokemon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating. Evolution: Sprigatito to Floragato to Meowscarada.

meowstic.spoken: Meowstic! National Number 678. The Constraint Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 8.5 kilograms. When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust. Evolution: Espurr to Meowstic.

meowth.spoken: Meowth! National Number 52. The Scratch Cat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.2 kilograms. Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change. Evolution: Meowth to Persian to Perrserker.

mesprit.spoken: Mesprit! National Number 481. The Emotion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 0.3 kilograms. Known as “The Being of Emotion.” It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy. Mesprit does not evolve.

metagross.spoken: Metagross! National Number 376. The Iron Leg Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Psychic type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 550.0 kilograms. Metagross has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can breeze through difficult calculations faster than a supercomputer. This Pokemon can float in the air by tucking in its four legs. Evolution: Beldum to Metang to Metagross.

metang.spoken: Metang! National Number 375. The Iron Claw Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Psychic type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 202.5 kilograms. When two Beldum fuse together, Metang is formed. The brains of the Beldum are joined by a magnetic nervous system. By linking its brains magnetically, this Pokemon generates strong psychokinetic power. Evolution: Beldum to Metang to Metagross.

metapod.spoken: Metapod! National Number 11. The Cocoon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 9.9 kilograms. This Pokemon is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body. Evolution: Caterpie to Metapod to Butterfree.

mew.spoken: Mew! National Number 151. The New Species Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide. Mew does not evolve.

mewtwo.spoken: Mewtwo! National Number 150. The Genetic Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 122.0 kilograms. It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments. Mewtwo does not evolve.

mienfoo.spoken: Mienfoo! National Number 619. The Martial Arts Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 20.0 kilograms. In fights, they dominate with onslaughts of flowing, continuous attacks. With their sharp claws, they cut enemies. Evolution: Mienfoo to Mienshao.

mienshao.spoken: Mienshao! National Number 620. The Martial Arts Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 35.5 kilograms. It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen. Evolution: Mienfoo to Mienshao.

mightyena.spoken: Mightyena! National Number 262. The Bite Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 37.0 kilograms. It chases down prey in a pack. It will never disobey the commands of a skilled Trainer. Evolution: Poochyena to Mightyena.

milcery.spoken: Milcery! National Number 868. The Cream Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.3 kilograms. This Pokemon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream. Evolution: Milcery to Alcremie.

milotic.spoken: Milotic! National Number 350. The Tender Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 6.2 meters tall and weighing 162.0 kilograms. Milotic is breathtakingly beautiful. Those that see it are said to forget their combative spirits. Evolution: Feebas to Milotic.

miltank.spoken: Miltank! National Number 241. The Milk Cow Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 75.5 kilograms. Its milk is packed with nutrition, making it the ultimate beverage for the sick or weary. Miltank does not evolve.

mime-jr.spoken: Mime Jr.! National Number 439. The Mime Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Fairy type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 13.0 kilograms. In an attempt to confuse its enemy, it mimics the enemy's movements. Then it wastes no time in making itself scarce! Evolution: Mime Jr. to Mr. Mime to Mr. Rime.

mimikyu.spoken: Mimikyu! National Number 778. The Disguise Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Fairy type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.7 kilograms. Its actual appearance is unknown. A scholar who saw what was under its rag was overwhelmed by terror and died from the shock. Mimikyu does not evolve.

minccino.spoken: Minccino! National Number 572. The Chinchilla Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 5.8 kilograms. They greet one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean. Evolution: Minccino to Cinccino.

minior.spoken: Minior! National Number 774. The Meteor Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 40.0 kilograms. Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy. Minior does not evolve.

minun.spoken: Minun! National Number 312. The Cheering Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.2 kilograms. Minun is more concerned about cheering on its partners than its own safety. It shorts out the electricity in its body to create brilliant showers of sparks to cheer on its teammates. Minun does not evolve.

miraidon.spoken: Miraidon! National Number 1008. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Dragon type, standing 3.5 meters tall and weighing 240.0 kilograms. Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful. Miraidon does not evolve.

misdreavus.spoken: Misdreavus! National Number 200. The Screech Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. It likes playing mischievous tricks such as screaming and wailing to startle people at night. Evolution: Misdreavus to Mismagius.

mismagius.spoken: Mismagius! National Number 429. The Magical Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 4.4 kilograms. Its cries sound like incantations. Those hearing it are tormented by headaches and hallucinations. Evolution: Misdreavus to Mismagius.

moltres.spoken: Moltres! National Number 146. The Flame Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Flying type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames. Moltres does not evolve.

monferno.spoken: Monferno! National Number 391. The Playful Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Fighting type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 22.0 kilograms. To intimidate attackers, it stretches the fire on its tail to make itself appear bigger. Evolution: Chimchar to Monferno to Infernape.

morelull.spoken: Morelull! National Number 755. The Illuminating Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Fairy type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 1.5 kilograms. It scatters spores that flicker and glow. Anyone seeing these lights falls into a deep slumber. Evolution: Morelull to Shiinotic.

morgrem.spoken: Morgrem! National Number 860. The Devious Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Fairy type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 12.5 kilograms. When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it's trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair. Evolution: Impidimp to Morgrem to Grimmsnarl.

morpeko.spoken: Morpeko! National Number 877. The Two-Sided Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Dark type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.0 kilograms. As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokemon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It's also generating electricity. Morpeko does not evolve.

mothim.spoken: Mothim! National Number 414. The Moth Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 23.3 kilograms. It loves the honey of flowers and steals honey collected by Combee. Evolution: Burmy to Wormadam to Mothim.

mr-mime.spoken: Mr. Mime! National Number 122. The Barrier Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Fairy type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 54.5 kilograms. If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands. Evolution: Mime Jr. to Mr. Mime to Mr. Rime.

mr-rime.spoken: Mr. Rime! National Number 866. The Comedian Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 58.2 kilograms. It's highly skilled at tap-dancing. It waves its cane of ice in time with its graceful movements. Evolution: Mime Jr. to Mr. Mime to Mr. Rime.

mudbray.spoken: Mudbray! National Number 749. The Donkey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 110.0 kilograms. The mud stuck to Mudbray's hooves enhances its grip and its powerful running gait. Evolution: Mudbray to Mudsdale.

mudkip.spoken: Mudkip! National Number 258. The Mud Fish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 7.6 kilograms. The fin on Mudkip's head acts as highly sensitive radar. Using this fin to sense movements of water and air, this Pokemon can determine what is taking place around it without using its eyes. Evolution: Mudkip to Marshtomp to Swampert.

mudsdale.spoken: Mudsdale! National Number 750. The Draft Horse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 920.0 kilograms. It spits a mud that provides resistance to both wind and rain, so the walls of old houses were often coated with it. Evolution: Mudbray to Mudsdale.

muk.spoken: Muk! National Number 89. The Sludge Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison. Evolution: Grimer to Muk.

munchlax.spoken: Munchlax! National Number 446. The Big Eater Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 105.0 kilograms. It wolfs down its weight in food once a day, swallowing food whole with almost no chewing. Evolution: Munchlax to Snorlax.

munkidori.spoken: Munkidori! National Number 1015. The Retainer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Psychic type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 12.2 kilograms. The chain is made from toxins that enhance capabilities. It stimulated Munkidori's brain and caused the Pokemon's psychic powers to bloom. Munkidori does not evolve.

munna.spoken: Munna! National Number 517. The Dream Eater Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 23.3 kilograms. Munna always float in the air. People whose dreams are eaten by them forget what the dreams had been about. Evolution: Munna to Musharna.

murkrow.spoken: Murkrow! National Number 198. The Darkness Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Flying type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 2.1 kilograms. Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night. Evolution: Murkrow to Honchkrow.

musharna.spoken: Musharna! National Number 518. The Drowsing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 60.5 kilograms. The mist emanating from their foreheads is packed with the dreams of people and Pokemon. Evolution: Munna to Musharna.

nacli.spoken: Nacli! National Number 932. The Rock Salt Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 16.0 kilograms. It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt. Evolution: Nacli to Naclstack to Garganacl.

naclstack.spoken: Naclstack! National Number 933. The Rock Salt Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 105.0 kilograms. This Pokemon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey's body. Evolution: Nacli to Naclstack to Garganacl.

naganadel.spoken: Naganadel! National Number 804. The Poison Pin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Dragon type, standing 3.6 meters tall and weighing 150.0 kilograms. It stores hundreds of liters of poisonous liquid inside its body. It is one of the organisms known as Ubs. Evolution: Poipole to Naganadel.

natu.spoken: Natu! National Number 177. The Tiny Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Flying type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 2.0 kilograms. Because its wings aren't yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always star­ ing at something. Evolution: Natu to Xatu.

necrozma.spoken: Necrozma! National Number 800. The Prism Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 2.4 meters tall and weighing 230.0 kilograms. Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times. Necrozma does not evolve.

nickit.spoken: Nickit! National Number 827. The Fox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 8.9 kilograms. Aided by the soft pads on its feet, it silently raids the food stores of other Pokemon. It survives off its ill-gotten gains. Evolution: Nickit to Thievul.

nidoking.spoken: Nidoking! National Number 34. The Drill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Ground type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 62.0 kilograms. It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey's bones. Evolution: Nidoran male to Nidorino to Nidoking.

nidoqueen.spoken: Nidoqueen! National Number 31. The Drill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Ground type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves. Evolution: Nidoran female to Nidorina to Nidoqueen.

nidoran-f.spoken: Nidoran female! National Number 29. The Poison Pin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 7.0 kilograms. Although small, its venomous barbs render this Pokemon dangerous. The female has smaller horns. Evolution: Nidoran female to Nidorina to Nidoqueen.

nidoran-m.spoken: Nidoran male! National Number 32. The Poison Pin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.0 kilograms. Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom. Evolution: Nidoran male to Nidorino to Nidoking.

nidorina.spoken: Nidorina! National Number 30. The Poison Pin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 20.0 kilograms. The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting. Evolution: Nidoran female to Nidorina to Nidoqueen.

nidorino.spoken: Nidorino! National Number 33. The Poison Pin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 19.5 kilograms. An aggressive Pokemon that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom. Evolution: Nidoran male to Nidorino to Nidoking.

nihilego.spoken: Nihilego! National Number 793. The Parasite Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Poison type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 55.5 kilograms. One of several mysterious Ultra Beasts. People on the street report observing those infested by it suddenly becoming violent. Nihilego does not evolve.

nincada.spoken: Nincada! National Number 290. The Trainee Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Ground type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 5.5 kilograms. Nincada lives underground for many years in complete darkness. This Pokemon absorbs nutrients from the roots of trees. It stays motionless as it waits for evolution. Evolution: Nincada to Ninjask to Shedinja.

ninetales.spoken: Ninetales! National Number 38. The Fox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 19.9 kilograms. Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse. Evolution: Vulpix to Ninetales.

ninjask.spoken: Ninjask! National Number 291. The Ninja Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 12.0 kilograms. Ninjask moves around at such a high speed that it cannot be seen, even while its crying can be clearly heard. For that reason, this Pokemon was long believed to be invisible. Evolution: Nincada to Ninjask to Shedinja.

noctowl.spoken: Noctowl! National Number 164. The Owl Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 40.8 kilograms. Its eyes are specially adapted. They concentrate even faint light and enable it to see in the dark. Evolution: Hoothoot to Noctowl.

noibat.spoken: Noibat! National Number 714. The Sound Wave Pokemon. This Pokemon is Flying / Dragon type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 8.0 kilograms. They live in pitch-black caves. Their enormous ears can emit ultrasonic waves of 200,000 hertz. Evolution: Noibat to Noivern.

noivern.spoken: Noivern! National Number 715. The Sound Wave Pokemon. This Pokemon is Flying / Dragon type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 85.0 kilograms. They fly around on moonless nights and attack careless prey. Nothing can beat them in a battle in the dark. Evolution: Noibat to Noivern.

nosepass.spoken: Nosepass! National Number 299. The Compass Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 97.0 kilograms. Nosepass's magnetic nose is always pointed to the north. If two of these Pokemon meet, they cannot turn their faces to each other when they are close because their magnetic noses repel one another. Evolution: Nosepass to Probopass.

numel.spoken: Numel! National Number 322. The Numb Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Ground type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 24.0 kilograms. Numel is extremely dull witted - it doesn't notice being hit. However, it can't stand hunger for even a second. This Pokemon's body is a seething cauldron of boiling magma. Evolution: Numel to Camerupt.

nuzleaf.spoken: Nuzleaf! National Number 274. The Wily Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Dark type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 28.0 kilograms. Nuzleaf live in densely overgrown forests. They occasionally venture out of the forest to startle people. This Pokemon dislikes having its long nose pinched. Evolution: Seedot to Nuzleaf to Shiftry.

nymble.spoken: Nymble! National Number 919. The Grasshopper Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. It has its third set of legs folded up. When it's in a tough spot, this Pokemon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs. Evolution: Nymble to Lokix.

obstagoon.spoken: Obstagoon! National Number 862. The Blocking Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Normal type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 46.0 kilograms. Its voice is staggering in volume. Obstagoon has a tendency to take on a threatening posture and shout—this move is known as Obstruct. Evolution: Zigzagoon to Linoone to Obstagoon.

octillery.spoken: Octillery! National Number 224. The Jet Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 28.5 kilograms. It traps enemies with its suction- cupped tentacles then smashes them with its rock-hard head. Evolution: Remoraid to Octillery.

oddish.spoken: Oddish! National Number 43. The Weed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 5.4 kilograms. During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds. Evolution: Oddish to Gloom to Vileplume to Bellossom.

ogerpon.spoken: Ogerpon! National Number 1017. The Mask Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 39.8 kilograms. This Pokemon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks. Ogerpon does not evolve.

oinkologne.spoken: Oinkologne! National Number 916. The Hog Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail. Evolution: Lechonk to Oinkologne.

okidogi.spoken: Okidogi! National Number 1014. The Retainer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Fighting type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 92.2 kilograms. After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique. Okidogi does not evolve.

omanyte.spoken: Omanyte! National Number 138. The Spiral Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 7.5 kilograms. Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils. Evolution: Omanyte to Omastar.

omastar.spoken: Omastar! National Number 139. The Spiral Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Water type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 35.0 kilograms. A prehistoric Pokemon that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible to catch prey. Evolution: Omanyte to Omastar.

onix.spoken: Onix! National Number 95. The Rock Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ground type, standing 8.8 meters tall and weighing 210.0 kilograms. It burrows through the ground at a speed of 50 mph while feeding on large boulders. Evolution: Onix to Steelix.

oranguru.spoken: Oranguru! National Number 765. The Sage Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 76.0 kilograms. Known for its extreme intelligence, this Pokemon will look down on inexperienced Trainers, so it's best suited to veteran Trainers. Oranguru does not evolve.

orbeetle.spoken: Orbeetle! National Number 826. The Seven Spot Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Psychic type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 40.8 kilograms. It's famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power. Evolution: Blipbug to Dottler to Orbeetle.

oricorio.spoken: Oricorio! National Number 741. The Dancing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Flying type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 3.4 kilograms. It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames. Oricorio does not evolve.

orthworm.spoken: Orthworm! National Number 968. The Earthworm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 310.0 kilograms. When attacked, this Pokemon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches. Orthworm does not evolve.

oshawott.spoken: Oshawott! National Number 501. The Sea Otter Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 5.9 kilograms. It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing. Evolution: Oshawott to Dewott to Samurott.

overqwil.spoken: Overqwil! National Number 904. The Pin Cluster Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Poison type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 60.5 kilograms. Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname ”sea fiend.” It slurps up poison to nourish itself. Evolution: Qwilfish to Overqwil.

pachirisu.spoken: Pachirisu! National Number 417. The EleSquirrel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 3.9 kilograms. It makes fur balls that crackle with static electricity. It stores them with berries in tree holes. Pachirisu does not evolve.

palafin.spoken: Palafin! National Number 964. The Dolphin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 60.2 kilograms. This Pokemon changes its appearance if it hears its allies calling for help. Palafin will never show anybody its moment of transformation. Evolution: Finizen to Palafin.

palkia.spoken: Palkia! National Number 484. The Spatial Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Dragon type, standing 4.2 meters tall and weighing 336.0 kilograms. It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology. Palkia does not evolve.

palossand.spoken: Palossand! National Number 770. The Sand Castle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Ground type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 250.0 kilograms. Possessed people controlled by this Pokemon transformed its sand mound into a castle. As it evolved, its power to curse grew ever stronger. Evolution: Sandygast to Palossand.

palpitoad.spoken: Palpitoad! National Number 536. The Vibration Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ground type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 17.0 kilograms. When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land. Evolution: Tympole to Palpitoad to Seismitoad.

pancham.spoken: Pancham! National Number 674. The Playful Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 8.0 kilograms. It does its best to be taken seriously by its enemies, but its glare is not sufficiently intimidating. Chewing on a leaf is its trademark. Evolution: Pancham to Pangoro.

pangoro.spoken: Pangoro! National Number 675. The Daunting Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Dark type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 136.0 kilograms. From the slight twitches of its bamboo leaf, it deduces its opponent's movements. It's eager to tussle but kindhearted toward its companions. Evolution: Pancham to Pangoro.

panpour.spoken: Panpour! National Number 515. The Spray Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 13.5 kilograms. The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large. Evolution: Panpour to Simipour.

pansage.spoken: Pansage! National Number 511. The Grass Monkey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 10.5 kilograms. This Pokemon dwells deep in the forest. Eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic. Evolution: Pansage to Simisage.

pansear.spoken: Pansear! National Number 513. The High Temp Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 11.0 kilograms. When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600° F. It uses its tuft to roast berries. Evolution: Pansear to Simisear.

paras.spoken: Paras! National Number 46. The Mushroom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Grass type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 5.4 kilograms. Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by draw­ ing nutrients from the bug host. Evolution: Paras to Parasect.

parasect.spoken: Parasect! National Number 47. The Mushroom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Grass type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 29.5 kilograms. It stays mostly in dark, damp places, the preference not of the bug, but of the big mush­ rooms on its back. Evolution: Paras to Parasect.

passimian.spoken: Passimian! National Number 766. The Teamwork Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 82.8 kilograms. They form groups of roughly 20 individuals. Their mutual bond is remarkable—they will never let down a comrade. Passimian does not evolve.

patrat.spoken: Patrat! National Number 504. The Scout Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 11.6 kilograms. Using food stored in cheek pouches, they can keep watch for days. They use their tails to communicate with others. Evolution: Patrat to Watchog.

pawmi.spoken: Pawmi! National Number 921. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.5 kilograms. It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws. Evolution: Pawmi to Pawmo to Pawmot.

pawmo.spoken: Pawmo! National Number 922. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Fighting type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks. Evolution: Pawmi to Pawmo to Pawmot.

pawmot.spoken: Pawmot! National Number 923. The Hands-On Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Fighting type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 41.0 kilograms. This Pokemon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements. Evolution: Pawmi to Pawmo to Pawmot.

pawniard.spoken: Pawniard! National Number 624. The Sharp Blade Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Steel type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 10.2 kilograms. Blades comprise this Pokemon's entire body. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river. Evolution: Pawniard to Bisharp to Kingambit.

pecharunt.spoken: Pecharunt! National Number 1025. The Subjugation Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Ghost type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 0.3 kilograms. It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt's control, chained to its will. Pecharunt does not evolve.

pelipper.spoken: Pelipper! National Number 279. The Water Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Flying type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 28.0 kilograms. Pelipper is a flying transporter that carries small Pokemon and eggs inside its massive bill. This Pokemon builds its nest on steep cliffs facing the sea. Evolution: Wingull to Pelipper.

perrserker.spoken: Perrserker! National Number 863. The Viking Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 28.0 kilograms. What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokemon lives for the thrill of battle. Evolution: Meowth to Persian to Perrserker.

persian.spoken: Persian! National Number 53. The Classy Cat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 32.0 kilograms. Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness. Evolution: Meowth to Persian to Perrserker.

petilil.spoken: Petilil! National Number 548. The Bulb Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 6.6 kilograms. The leaves on its head are very bitter. Eating one of these leaves is known to refresh a tired body. Evolution: Petilil to Lilligant.

phanpy.spoken: Phanpy! National Number 231. The Long Nose Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 33.5 kilograms. It swings its long snout around play­ fully, but because it is so strong, that can be dan­ gerous. Evolution: Phanpy to Donphan.

phantump.spoken: Phantump! National Number 708. The Stump Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Grass type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 7.0 kilograms. These Pokemon are created when spirits possess rotten tree stumps. They prefer to live in abandoned forests. Evolution: Phantump to Trevenant.

pheromosa.spoken: Pheromosa! National Number 795. The Lissome Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Fighting type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 25.0 kilograms. One of the dangerous Ultra Beasts, it has been spotted running across the land at terrific speeds. Pheromosa does not evolve.

phione.spoken: Phione! National Number 489. The Sea Drifter Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 3.1 kilograms. A Pokemon that lives in warm seas. It inflates the flotation sac on its head to drift and search for food. Evolution: Phione to Manaphy.

pichu.spoken: Pichu! National Number 172. The Tiny Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.0 kilograms. It is not yet skilled at storing electricity. It may send out a jolt if amused or startled. Evolution: Pichu to Pikachu to Raichu.

pidgeot.spoken: Pidgeot! National Number 18. The Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 39.5 kilograms. When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as Magikarp. Evolution: Pidgey to Pidgeotto to Pidgeot.

pidgeotto.spoken: Pidgeotto! National Number 17. The Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this Pokemon will fiercely peck at any intruder. Evolution: Pidgey to Pidgeotto to Pidgeot.

pidgey.spoken: Pidgey! National Number 16. The Tiny Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.8 kilograms. A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand. Evolution: Pidgey to Pidgeotto to Pidgeot.

pidove.spoken: Pidove! National Number 519. The Tiny Pigeon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.1 kilograms. Each follows its Trainer's orders as best it can, but they sometimes fail to understand complicated commands. Evolution: Pidove to Tranquill to Unfezant.

pignite.spoken: Pignite! National Number 499. The Fire Pig Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Fighting type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 55.5 kilograms. When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke. Evolution: Tepig to Pignite to Emboar.

pikachu.spoken: Pikachu! National Number 25. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 6.0 kilograms. When several of these Pokemon gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms. Evolution: Pichu to Pikachu to Raichu.

pikipek.spoken: Pikipek! National Number 731. The Woodpecker Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.2 kilograms. It can peck at a rate of 16 times a second to drill holes in trees. It uses the holes for food storage and for nesting. Evolution: Pikipek to Trumbeak to Toucannon.

piloswine.spoken: Piloswine! National Number 221. The Swine Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Ground type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 55.8 kilograms. Although its legs are short, its rugged hooves prevent it from slipping, even on icy ground. Evolution: Swinub to Piloswine to Mamoswine.

pincurchin.spoken: Pincurchin! National Number 871. The Sea Urchin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines. Pincurchin does not evolve.

pineco.spoken: Pineco! National Number 204. The Bagworm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 7.2 kilograms. It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn't bother it. Evolution: Pineco to Forretress.

pinsir.spoken: Pinsir! National Number 127. The Stag Beetle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 55.0 kilograms. If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard. Pinsir does not evolve.

piplup.spoken: Piplup! National Number 393. The Penguin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 5.2 kilograms. Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold. Evolution: Piplup to Prinplup to Empoleon.

plusle.spoken: Plusle! National Number 311. The Cheering Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.2 kilograms. Plusle always acts as a cheerleader for its partners. Whenever a teammate puts out a good effort in battle, this Pokemon shorts out its body to create the crackling noises of sparks to show its joy. Plusle does not evolve.

poipole.spoken: Poipole! National Number 803. The Poison Pin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 1.8 kilograms. This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world. Evolution: Poipole to Naganadel.

politoed.spoken: Politoed! National Number 186. The Frog Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 33.9 kilograms. If Poliwag and Poliwhirl hear its echoing cry, they respond by gather­ ing from far and wide. Evolution: Poliwag to Poliwhirl to Poliwrath to Politoed.

poliwag.spoken: Poliwag! National Number 60. The Tadpole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 12.4 kilograms. Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming than trying to stand. Evolution: Poliwag to Poliwhirl to Poliwrath to Politoed.

poliwhirl.spoken: Poliwhirl! National Number 61. The Tadpole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 20.0 kilograms. Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy. Evolution: Poliwag to Poliwhirl to Poliwrath to Politoed.

poliwrath.spoken: Poliwrath! National Number 62. The Tadpole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Fighting type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 54.0 kilograms. An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breast stroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers. Evolution: Poliwag to Poliwhirl to Poliwrath to Politoed.

poltchageist.spoken: Poltchageist! National Number 1012. The Matcha Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Ghost type, standing 0.1 meters tall and weighing 1.1 kilograms. Supposedly, the regrets of a tea ceremony master who died before perfecting his craft lingered in some matcha and became a Pokemon. Evolution: Poltchageist to Sinistcha.

polteageist.spoken: Polteageist! National Number 855. The Black Tea Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.4 kilograms. This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found. Evolution: Sinistea to Polteageist.

ponyta.spoken: Ponyta! National Number 77. The Fire Horse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time. Evolution: Ponyta to Rapidash.

poochyena.spoken: Poochyena! National Number 261. The Bite Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 13.6 kilograms. At first sight, Poochyena takes a bite at anything that moves. This Pokemon chases after prey until the victim becomes exhausted. However, it may turn tail if the prey strikes back. Evolution: Poochyena to Mightyena.

popplio.spoken: Popplio! National Number 728. The Sea Lion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 7.5 kilograms. This Pokemon snorts body fluids from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It's famous for being a hard worker. Evolution: Popplio to Brionne to Primarina.

porygon.spoken: Porygon! National Number 137. The Virtual Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 36.5 kilograms. A Pokemon that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace. Evolution: Porygon to Porygon2 to Porygon-Z.

porygon-z.spoken: Porygon-Z! National Number 474. The Virtual Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 34.0 kilograms. Additional software was installed to make it a better Pokemon. It began acting oddly, however. Evolution: Porygon to Porygon2 to Porygon-Z.

porygon2.spoken: Porygon2! National Number 233. The Virtual Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 32.5 kilograms. This upgraded version of Porygon is designed for space exploration. It can't fly, though. Evolution: Porygon to Porygon2 to Porygon-Z.

primarina.spoken: Primarina! National Number 730. The Soloist Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Fairy type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 44.0 kilograms. It controls its water balloons with song. The melody is learned from others of its kind and is passed down from one generation to the next. Evolution: Popplio to Brionne to Primarina.

primeape.spoken: Primeape! National Number 57. The Pig Monkey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 32.0 kilograms. Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught. Evolution: Mankey to Primeape to Annihilape.

prinplup.spoken: Prinplup! National Number 394. The Penguin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 23.0 kilograms. It lives alone, away from others. Apparently, every one of them believes it is the most important. Evolution: Piplup to Prinplup to Empoleon.

probopass.spoken: Probopass! National Number 476. The Compass Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Steel type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 340.0 kilograms. It freely controls three units called Mini-Noses using magnetic force. Evolution: Nosepass to Probopass.

psyduck.spoken: Psyduck! National Number 54. The Duck Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 19.6 kilograms. While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily Pokemon will use psychokinetic powers. Evolution: Psyduck to Golduck.

pumpkaboo.spoken: Pumpkaboo! National Number 710. The Pumpkin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Grass type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 5.0 kilograms. The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active. Evolution: Pumpkaboo to Gourgeist.

pupitar.spoken: Pupitar! National Number 247. The Hard Shell Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ground type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 152.0 kilograms. Its shell is as hard as sheet rock, and it is also very strong. Its Thrashing can topple a mountain. Evolution: Larvitar to Pupitar to Tyranitar.

purrloin.spoken: Purrloin! National Number 509. The Devious Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 10.1 kilograms. They steal from people for fun, but their victims can't help but forgive them. Their deceptively cute act is perfect. Evolution: Purrloin to Liepard.

purugly.spoken: Purugly! National Number 432. The Tiger Cat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 43.8 kilograms. It is a brazen brute that barges its way into another Pokemon's nest and claims it as its own. Evolution: Glameow to Purugly.

pyroar.spoken: Pyroar! National Number 668. The Royal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Normal type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 81.5 kilograms. The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride. Evolution: Litleo to Pyroar.

pyukumuku.spoken: Pyukumuku! National Number 771. The Sea Cucumber Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.2 kilograms. It lives in shallow seas, such as areas near a beach. It can eject its internal organs, which it uses to engulf its prey or battle enemies. Pyukumuku does not evolve.

quagsire.spoken: Quagsire! National Number 195. The Water Fish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ground type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 75.0 kilograms. This carefree Pokemon has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls. Evolution: Wooper to Quagsire to Clodsire.

quaquaval.spoken: Quaquaval! National Number 914. The Dancer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Fighting type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 61.9 kilograms. A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. This Pokemon uses its powerful legs to perform striking dances from far-off lands. Evolution: Quaxly to Quaxwell to Quaquaval.

quaxly.spoken: Quaxly! National Number 912. The Duckling Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 6.1 kilograms. This Pokemon migrated to Paldea from distant lands long ago. The gel secreted by its feathers repels water and grime. Evolution: Quaxly to Quaxwell to Quaquaval.

quaxwell.spoken: Quaxwell! National Number 913. The Practicing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 21.5 kilograms. These Pokemon constantly run through shallow waters to train their legs, then compete with each other to see which of them kicks most gracefully. Evolution: Quaxly to Quaxwell to Quaquaval.

quilava.spoken: Quilava! National Number 156. The Volcano Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 19.0 kilograms. Be careful if it turns its back during battle. It means that it will attack with the fire on its back. Evolution: Cyndaquil to Quilava to Typhlosion.

quilladin.spoken: Quilladin! National Number 651. The Spiny Armor Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 29.0 kilograms. It relies on its sturdy shell to deflect predators' attacks. It counterattacks with its sharp quills. Evolution: Chespin to Quilladin to Chesnaught.

qwilfish.spoken: Qwilfish! National Number 211. The Balloon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Poison type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 3.9 kilograms. To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once. Evolution: Qwilfish to Overqwil.

raboot.spoken: Raboot! National Number 814. The Rabbit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 9.0 kilograms. Its thick and fluffy fur protects it from the cold and enables it to use hotter fire moves. Evolution: Scorbunny to Raboot to Cinderace.

rabsca.spoken: Rabsca! National Number 954. The Rolling Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Psychic type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.5 kilograms. The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokemon is actually inside the ball. Evolution: Rellor to Rabsca.

raging-bolt.spoken: Raging Bolt! National Number 1021. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Dragon type, standing 5.2 meters tall and weighing 480.0 kilograms. It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature. Raging Bolt does not evolve.

raichu.spoken: Raichu! National Number 26. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high voltage power. Evolution: Pichu to Pikachu to Raichu.

raikou.spoken: Raikou! National Number 243. The Thunder Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 178.0 kilograms. The rain clouds it carries let it fire thunderbolts at will. They say that it descended with lightning. Raikou does not evolve.

ralts.spoken: Ralts! National Number 280. The Feeling Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Fairy type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 6.6 kilograms. Ralts senses the emotions of people using the horns on its head. This Pokemon rarely appears before people. But when it does, it draws closer if it senses that the person has a positive disposition. Evolution: Ralts to Kirlia to Gardevoir to Gallade.

rampardos.spoken: Rampardos! National Number 409. The Head Butt Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 102.5 kilograms. Its powerful head butt has enough power to shatter even the most durable things upon impact. Evolution: Cranidos to Rampardos.

rapidash.spoken: Rapidash! National Number 78. The Fire Horse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 95.0 kilograms. Very competitive, this Pokemon will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it. Evolution: Ponyta to Rapidash.

raticate.spoken: Raticate! National Number 20. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 18.5 kilograms. It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off. Evolution: Rattata to Raticate.

rattata.spoken: Rattata! National Number 19. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.5 kilograms. Living wherever there is food available, it ceaselessly scav­ enges for edibles the entire day. Evolution: Rattata to Raticate.

rayquaza.spoken: Rayquaza! National Number 384. The Sky High Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Flying type, standing 7.0 meters tall and weighing 206.5 kilograms. Rayquaza lived for hundreds of millions of years in the earth's ozone layer, never descending to the ground. This Pokemon appears to feed on water and particles in the atmosphere. Rayquaza does not evolve.

regice.spoken: Regice! National Number 378. The Iceberg Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 175.0 kilograms. Regice's body was made during an ice age. The deep-frozen body can't be melted, even by fire. This Pokemon controls frigid air of minus 328 degrees F. Regice does not evolve.

regidrago.spoken: Regidrago! National Number 895. The Dragon Orb Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 200.0 kilograms. An academic theory proposes that Regidrago's arms were once the head of an ancient dragon Pokemon. The theory remains unproven. Regidrago does not evolve.

regieleki.spoken: Regieleki! National Number 894. The Electron Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 145.0 kilograms. This Pokemon is a cluster of electrical energy. It's said that removing the rings on Regieleki's body will unleash the Pokemon's latent power. Regieleki does not evolve.

regigigas.spoken: Regigigas! National Number 486. The Colossal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 3.7 meters tall and weighing 420.0 kilograms. There is an enduring legend that states this Pokemon towed continents with ropes. Regigigas does not evolve.

regirock.spoken: Regirock! National Number 377. The Rock Peak Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 230.0 kilograms. Regirock was sealed away by people long ago. If this Pokemon's body is damaged in battle, it is said to seek out suitable rocks on its own to repair itself. Regirock does not evolve.

registeel.spoken: Registeel! National Number 379. The Iron Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 205.0 kilograms. Registeel has a body that is harder than any kind of metal. Its body is apparently hollow. No one has any idea what this Pokemon eats. Registeel does not evolve.

relicanth.spoken: Relicanth! National Number 369. The Longevity Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Rock type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 23.4 kilograms. Relicanth is a Pokemon species that existed for a hundred million years without ever changing its form. This ancient Pokemon feeds on microscopic organisms with its toothless mouth. Relicanth does not evolve.

rellor.spoken: Rellor! National Number 953. The Rolling Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. This Pokemon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life. Evolution: Rellor to Rabsca.

remoraid.spoken: Remoraid! National Number 223. The Jet Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 12.0 kilograms. It has superb ac­ curacy. The water it shoots out can strike even moving prey from more than 300 feet. Evolution: Remoraid to Octillery.

reshiram.spoken: Reshiram! National Number 643. The Vast White Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Fire type, standing 3.2 meters tall and weighing 330.0 kilograms. This Pokemon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it. Reshiram does not evolve.

reuniclus.spoken: Reuniclus! National Number 579. The Multiplying Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 20.1 kilograms. They use psychic power to control their arms, which are made of a special liquid. They can crush boulders psychically. Evolution: Solosis to Duosion to Reuniclus.

revavroom.spoken: Revavroom! National Number 966. The Multi-Cyl Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Poison type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders—now numbering eight—to generate energy. Evolution: Varoom to Revavroom.

rhydon.spoken: Rhydon! National Number 112. The Drill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Rock type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees. Evolution: Rhyhorn to Rhydon to Rhyperior.

rhyhorn.spoken: Rhyhorn! National Number 111. The Spikes Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Rock type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 115.0 kilograms. Its massive bones are 1000 times harder than human bones. It can easily knock a trailer flying. Evolution: Rhyhorn to Rhydon to Rhyperior.

rhyperior.spoken: Rhyperior! National Number 464. The Drill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Rock type, standing 2.4 meters tall and weighing 282.8 kilograms. It puts rocks in holes in its palms and uses its muscles to shoot them. Geodude are shot at rare times. Evolution: Rhyhorn to Rhydon to Rhyperior.

ribombee.spoken: Ribombee! National Number 743. The Bee Fly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Fairy type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.5 kilograms. It rolls up pollen into puffs. It makes many different varieties, some used as food and others used in battle. Evolution: Cutiefly to Ribombee.

rillaboom.spoken: Rillaboom! National Number 812. The Drummer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 90.0 kilograms. By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle. Evolution: Grookey to Thwackey to Rillaboom.

riolu.spoken: Riolu! National Number 447. The Emanation Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 20.2 kilograms. The aura that emanates from its body intensifies to alert others if it is afraid or sad. Evolution: Riolu to Lucario.

roaring-moon.spoken: Roaring Moon! National Number 1005. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Dark type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 380.0 kilograms. It is possible that this is the creature listed as Roaring Moon in an expedition journal that still holds many mysteries. Roaring Moon does not evolve.

rockruff.spoken: Rockruff! National Number 744. The Puppy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.2 kilograms. It's considered to be a good Pokemon for beginners because of its friendliness, but its disposition grows rougher as it grows up. Evolution: Rockruff to Lycanroc.

roggenrola.spoken: Roggenrola! National Number 524. The Mantle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 18.0 kilograms. Its ear is hexagonal in shape. Compressed underground, its body is as hard as steel. Evolution: Roggenrola to Boldore to Gigalith.

rolycoly.spoken: Rolycoly! National Number 837. The Coal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 12.0 kilograms. Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokemon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago. Evolution: Rolycoly to Carkol to Coalossal.

rookidee.spoken: Rookidee! National Number 821. The Tiny Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Flying type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 1.8 kilograms. It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokemon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit. Evolution: Rookidee to Corvisquire to Corviknight.

roselia.spoken: Roselia! National Number 315. The Thorn Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.0 kilograms. Roselia shoots sharp thorns as projectiles at any opponent that tries to steal the flowers on its arms. The aroma of this Pokemon brings serenity to living things. Evolution: Budew to Roselia to Roserade.

roserade.spoken: Roserade! National Number 407. The Bouquet Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 14.5 kilograms. It attracts prey with a sweet aroma, then downs it with thorny whips hidden in its arms. Evolution: Budew to Roselia to Roserade.

rotom.spoken: Rotom! National Number 479. The Plasma Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Ghost type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 0.3 kilograms. Research continues on this Pokemon, which could be the power source of a unique motor. Rotom does not evolve.

rowlet.spoken: Rowlet! National Number 722. The Grass Quill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.5 kilograms. This wary Pokemon uses photosynthesis to store up energy during the day, while becoming active at night. Evolution: Rowlet to Dartrix to Decidueye.

rufflet.spoken: Rufflet! National Number 627. The Eaglet Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 10.5 kilograms. They crush berries with their talons. They bravely stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong it is. Evolution: Rufflet to Braviary.

runerigus.spoken: Runerigus! National Number 867. The Grudge Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Ghost type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 66.6 kilograms. A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing the spirit of a Yamask, the painting began to move. Evolution: Yamask to Cofagrigus to Runerigus.

sableye.spoken: Sableye! National Number 302. The Darkness Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Ghost type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 11.0 kilograms. Sableye lead quiet lives deep inside caverns. They are feared, however, because these Pokemon are thought to steal the spirits of people when their eyes burn with a sinister glow in the darkness. Sableye does not evolve.

salamence.spoken: Salamence! National Number 373. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Flying type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 102.6 kilograms. Salamence came about as a result of a strong, long-held dream of growing wings. It is said that this powerful desire triggered a sudden mutation in this Pokemon's cells, causing it to sprout its magnificent wings. Evolution: Bagon to Shelgon to Salamence.

salandit.spoken: Salandit! National Number 757. The Toxic Lizard Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Fire type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 4.8 kilograms. It burns its bodily fluids to create a poisonous gas. When its enemies become disoriented from inhaling the gas, it attacks them. Evolution: Salandit to Salazzle.

salazzle.spoken: Salazzle! National Number 758. The Toxic Lizard Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Fire type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 22.2 kilograms. For some reason, only females have been found. It creates a reverse harem of male Salandit that it lives with. Evolution: Salandit to Salazzle.

samurott.spoken: Samurott! National Number 503. The Formidable Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 94.6 kilograms. One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody. Evolution: Oshawott to Dewott to Samurott.

sandaconda.spoken: Sandaconda! National Number 844. The Sand Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 3.8 meters tall and weighing 65.5 kilograms. When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened. Evolution: Silicobra to Sandaconda.

sandile.spoken: Sandile! National Number 551. The Desert Croc Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Dark type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 15.2 kilograms. They live buried in the sands of the desert. The sun-warmed sands prevent their body temperature from dropping. Evolution: Sandile to Krokorok to Krookodile.

sandshrew.spoken: Sandshrew! National Number 27. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 12.0 kilograms. Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food. Evolution: Sandshrew to Sandslash.

sandslash.spoken: Sandslash! National Number 28. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 29.5 kilograms. Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape. Evolution: Sandshrew to Sandslash.

sandy-shocks.spoken: Sandy Shocks! National Number 989. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Ground type, standing 2.3 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. It slightly resembles a Magneton that lived for 10,000 years and was featured in an article in a paranormal magazine. Sandy Shocks does not evolve.

sandygast.spoken: Sandygast! National Number 769. The Sand Heap Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Ground type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 70.0 kilograms. Born from a sand mound playfully built by a child, this Pokemon embodies the grudges of the departed. Evolution: Sandygast to Palossand.

sawk.spoken: Sawk! National Number 539. The Karate Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 51.0 kilograms. The sound of Sawk punching boulders and trees can be heard all the way from the mountains where they train. Sawk does not evolve.

sawsbuck.spoken: Sawsbuck! National Number 586. The Season Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Grass type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 92.5 kilograms. They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck's horns. Evolution: Deerling to Sawsbuck.

scatterbug.spoken: Scatterbug! National Number 664. The Scatterdust Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.5 kilograms. When under attack from bird Pokemon, it spews a poisonous black powder that causes paralysis on contact. Evolution: Scatterbug to Spewpa to Vivillon.

sceptile.spoken: Sceptile! National Number 254. The Forest Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 52.2 kilograms. The leaves growing on Sceptile's body are very sharp edged. This Pokemon is very agile - it leaps all over the branches of trees and jumps on its foe from above or behind. Evolution: Treecko to Grovyle to Sceptile.

scizor.spoken: Scizor! National Number 212. The Pincer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Steel type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 118.0 kilograms. It swings its eye- patterned pincers up to scare its foes. This makes it look like it has three heads. Evolution: Scyther to Scizor to Kleavor.

scolipede.spoken: Scolipede! National Number 545. The Megapede Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 200.5 kilograms. With quick movements, it chases down its foes, attacking relentlessly with its horns until it prevails. Evolution: Venipede to Whirlipede to Scolipede.

scorbunny.spoken: Scorbunny! National Number 813. The Rabbit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 4.5 kilograms. A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokemon's body. Once that happens, it's ready to fight at full power. Evolution: Scorbunny to Raboot to Cinderace.

scovillain.spoken: Scovillain! National Number 952. The Spicy Pepper Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Fire type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame. Evolution: Capsakid to Scovillain.

scrafty.spoken: Scrafty! National Number 560. The Hoodlum Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Fighting type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth. Evolution: Scraggy to Scrafty.

scraggy.spoken: Scraggy! National Number 559. The Shedding Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Fighting type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 11.8 kilograms. Its skin has a rubbery elasticity, so it can reduce damage by defensively pulling its skin up to its neck. Evolution: Scraggy to Scrafty.

scream-tail.spoken: Scream Tail! National Number 985. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy / Psychic type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 8.0 kilograms. There has been only one reported sighting of this Pokemon. It resembles a mysterious creature depicted in an old expedition journal. Scream Tail does not evolve.

scyther.spoken: Scyther! National Number 123. The Mantis Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 56.0 kilograms. With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one. Evolution: Scyther to Scizor to Kleavor.

seadra.spoken: Seadra! National Number 117. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 25.0 kilograms. Capable of swim­ ming backwards by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail. Evolution: Horsea to Seadra to Kingdra.

seaking.spoken: Seaking! National Number 119. The Goldfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 39.0 kilograms. In autumn, its body becomes more fatty in preparing to propose to a mate. It takes on beautiful colors. Evolution: Goldeen to Seaking.

sealeo.spoken: Sealeo! National Number 364. The Ball Roll Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Water type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 87.6 kilograms. It has a very sensitive nose. It touches new things with its nose to examine them. Evolution: Spheal to Sealeo to Walrein.

seedot.spoken: Seedot! National Number 273. The Acorn Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. Seedot attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. It sucks moisture from the tree while hanging off the branch. The more water it drinks, the glossier this Pokemon's body becomes. Evolution: Seedot to Nuzleaf to Shiftry.

seel.spoken: Seel! National Number 86. The Sea Lion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 90.0 kilograms. The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice. Evolution: Seel to Dewgong.

seismitoad.spoken: Seismitoad! National Number 537. The Vibration Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ground type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 62.0 kilograms. They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents. Evolution: Tympole to Palpitoad to Seismitoad.

sentret.spoken: Sentret! National Number 161. The Scout Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 6.0 kilograms. It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas. Evolution: Sentret to Furret.

serperior.spoken: Serperior! National Number 497. The Regal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 3.3 meters tall and weighing 63.0 kilograms. It can stop its opponents' movements with just a glare. It takes in solar energy and boosts it internally. Evolution: Snivy to Servine to Serperior.

servine.spoken: Servine! National Number 496. The Grass Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 16.0 kilograms. It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with a vine whip. Evolution: Snivy to Servine to Serperior.

seviper.spoken: Seviper! National Number 336. The Fang Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 2.7 meters tall and weighing 52.5 kilograms.
