Seviper shares a generations-long feud with Zangoose. The scars on its body are evidence of vicious battles. This Pokemon attacks using its sword- edged tail. Seviper does not evolve.

sewaddle.spoken: Sewaddle! National Number 540. The Sewing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Grass type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.5 kilograms. Leavanny dress it in clothes they made for it when it hatched. It hides its head in its hood while it is sleeping. Evolution: Sewaddle to Swadloon to Leavanny.

sharpedo.spoken: Sharpedo! National Number 319. The Brutal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Dark type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 88.8 kilograms. Nicknamed “the bully of the sea,” Sharpedo is widely feared. Its cruel fangs grow back immediately if they snap off. Just one of these Pokemon can thoroughly tear apart a supertanker. Evolution: Carvanha to Sharpedo.

shaymin.spoken: Shaymin! National Number 492. The Gratitude Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 2.1 kilograms. It lives in flower patches and avoids detection by curling up to look like a flowering plant. Shaymin does not evolve.

shedinja.spoken: Shedinja! National Number 292. The Shed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Ghost type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 1.2 kilograms. Shedinja's hard body doesn't move - not even a twitch. In fact, its body appears to be merely a hollow shell. It is believed that this Pokemon will steal the spirit of anyone peering into its hollow body from its back. Evolution: Nincada to Ninjask to Shedinja.

shelgon.spoken: Shelgon! National Number 372. The Endurance Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 110.5 kilograms. Inside Shelgon's armor-like shell, cells are in the midst of transformation to create an entirely new body. This Pokemon's shell is extremely heavy, making its movements sluggish. Evolution: Bagon to Shelgon to Salamence.

shellder.spoken: Shellder! National Number 90. The Bivalve Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open. Evolution: Shellder to Cloyster.

shellos.spoken: Shellos! National Number 422. The Sea Slug Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 6.3 kilograms. Its colors and shapes differ from region to region. In the Sinnoh region, two types are confirmed. Evolution: Shellos to Gastrodon.

shelmet.spoken: Shelmet! National Number 616. The Snail Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 7.7 kilograms. When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell. It can spit a sticky, poisonous liquid. Evolution: Shelmet to Accelgor.

shieldon.spoken: Shieldon! National Number 410. The Shield Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Steel type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 57.0 kilograms. A Pokemon that lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its facial hide is extremely hard. Evolution: Shieldon to Bastiodon.

shiftry.spoken: Shiftry! National Number 275. The Wicked Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Dark type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 59.6 kilograms. Shiftry is a mysterious Pokemon that is said to live atop towering trees dating back over a thousand years. It creates terrific windstorms with the fans it holds. Evolution: Seedot to Nuzleaf to Shiftry.

shiinotic.spoken: Shiinotic! National Number 756. The Illuminating Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Fairy type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 11.5 kilograms. Forests where Shiinotic live are treacherous to enter at night. People confused by its strange lights can never find their way home again. Evolution: Morelull to Shiinotic.

shinx.spoken: Shinx! National Number 403. The Flash Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.5 kilograms. All of its fur dazzles if danger is sensed. It flees while the foe is momentarily blinded. Evolution: Shinx to Luxio to Luxray.

shroodle.spoken: Shroodle! National Number 944. The Toxic Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Normal type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.7 kilograms. Though usually a mellow Pokemon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire. Evolution: Shroodle to Grafaiai.

shroomish.spoken: Shroomish! National Number 285. The Mushroom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.5 kilograms. Shroomish live in damp soil in the dark depths of forests. They are often found keeping still under fallen leaves. This Pokemon feeds on compost that is made up of fallen, rotted leaves. Evolution: Shroomish to Breloom.

shuckle.spoken: Shuckle! National Number 213. The Mold Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Rock type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 20.5 kilograms. The Berries it stores in its vase-like shell decompose and become a gooey liquid. Shuckle does not evolve.

shuppet.spoken: Shuppet! National Number 353. The Puppet Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 2.3 kilograms. Shuppet is attracted by feelings of jealousy and vindictiveness. If someone develops strong feelings of vengeance, this Pokemon will appear in a swarm and line up beneath the eaves of that person's home. Evolution: Shuppet to Banette.

sigilyph.spoken: Sigilyph! National Number 561. The Avianoid Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Flying type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 14.0 kilograms. They never vary the route they fly, because their memories of guarding an ancient city remain steadfast. Sigilyph does not evolve.

silcoon.spoken: Silcoon! National Number 266. The Cocoon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 10.0 kilograms. Silcoon tethers itself to a tree branch using silk to keep from falling. There, this Pokemon hangs quietly while it awaits evolution. It peers out of the silk cocoon through a small hole. Evolution: Wurmple to Silcoon to Beautifly to Cascoon to Dustox.

silicobra.spoken: Silicobra! National Number 843. The Sand Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 7.6 kilograms. As it digs, it swallows sand and stores it in its neck pouch. The pouch can hold more than 17 pounds of sand. Evolution: Silicobra to Sandaconda.

silvally.spoken: Silvally! National Number 773. The Synthetic Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 2.3 meters tall and weighing 100.5 kilograms. Its trust in its partner is what awakens it. This Pokemon is capable of changing its type, a flexibility that is well displayed in battle. Evolution: Type: Null to Silvally.

simipour.spoken: Simipour! National Number 516. The Geyser Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 29.0 kilograms. The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail. Evolution: Panpour to Simipour.

simisage.spoken: Simisage! National Number 512. The Thorn Monkey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 30.5 kilograms. Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter. Evolution: Pansage to Simisage.

simisear.spoken: Simisear! National Number 514. The Ember Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 28.0 kilograms. It loves sweets because they become energy for the fire burning inside its body. Evolution: Pansear to Simisear.

sinistcha.spoken: Sinistcha! National Number 1013. The Matcha Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Ghost type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 2.2 kilograms. It pretends to be tea, trying to fool people into drinking it so it can drain their life-force. Its ruse is generally unsuccessful. Evolution: Poltchageist to Sinistcha.

sinistea.spoken: Sinistea! National Number 854. The Black Tea Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 0.1 meters tall and weighing 0.2 kilograms. This Pokemon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea. Evolution: Sinistea to Polteageist.

sirfetchd.spoken: Sirfetch'd! National Number 865. The Wild Duck Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 117.0 kilograms. Only Farfetch'd that have survived many battles can attain this evolution. When this Pokemon's leek withers, it will retire from combat. Evolution: Farfetch'd to Sirfetch'd.

sizzlipede.spoken: Sizzlipede! National Number 850. The Radiator Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Bug type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get particularly hot. Evolution: Sizzlipede to Centiskorch.

skarmory.spoken: Skarmory! National Number 227. The Armor Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Flying type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 50.5 kilograms. Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky. Skarmory does not evolve.

skeledirge.spoken: Skeledirge! National Number 911. The Singer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Ghost type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 326.5 kilograms. The fiery bird changes shape when Skeledirge sings. Rumor has it that the bird was born when the fireball on Skeledirge's head gained a soul. Evolution: Fuecoco to Crocalor to Skeledirge.

skiddo.spoken: Skiddo! National Number 672. The Mount Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 31.0 kilograms. Thought to be one of the first Pokemon to live in harmony with humans, it has a placid disposition. Evolution: Skiddo to Gogoat.

skiploom.spoken: Skiploom! National Number 188. The Cottonweed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Flying type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluc­ tuates up and down. Evolution: Hoppip to Skiploom to Jumpluff.

skitty.spoken: Skitty! National Number 300. The Kitten Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 11.0 kilograms. Skitty has the habit of becoming fascinated by moving objects and chasing them around. This Pokemon is known to chase after its own tail and become dizzy. Evolution: Skitty to Delcatty.

skorupi.spoken: Skorupi! National Number 451. The Scorpion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Bug type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 12.0 kilograms. It grips prey with its tail claws and injects poison. It tenaciously hangs on until the poison takes. Evolution: Skorupi to Drapion.

skrelp.spoken: Skrelp! National Number 690. The Mock Kelp Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 7.3 kilograms. Camouflaged as rotten kelp, they spray liquid poison on prey that approaches unawares and then finish it off. Evolution: Skrelp to Dragalge.

skuntank.spoken: Skuntank! National Number 435. The Skunk Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Dark type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 38.0 kilograms. It sprays a vile-smelling fluid from the tip of its tail to attack. Its range is over 160 feet. Evolution: Stunky to Skuntank.

skwovet.spoken: Skwovet! National Number 819. The Cheeky Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.5 kilograms. Found throughout the Galar region, this Pokemon becomes uneasy if its cheeks are ever completely empty of berries. Evolution: Skwovet to Greedent.

slaking.spoken: Slaking! National Number 289. The Lazy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 130.5 kilograms. Slaking spends all day lying down and lolling about. It eats grass growing within its reach. If it eats all the grass it can reach, this Pokemon reluctantly moves to another spot. Evolution: Slakoth to Vigoroth to Slaking.

slakoth.spoken: Slakoth! National Number 287. The Slacker Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 24.0 kilograms. Slakoth lolls around for over twenty hours every day. Because it moves so little, it does not need much food. This Pokemon's sole daily meal consists of just three leaves. Evolution: Slakoth to Vigoroth to Slaking.

sliggoo.spoken: Sliggoo! National Number 705. The Soft Tissue Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 17.5 kilograms. It drives away opponents by excreting a sticky liquid that can dissolve anything. Its eyes devolved, so it can't see anything. Evolution: Goomy to Sliggoo to Goodra.

slither-wing.spoken: Slither Wing! National Number 988. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Fighting type, standing 3.2 meters tall and weighing 92.0 kilograms. This mysterious Pokemon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing. Slither Wing does not evolve.

slowbro.spoken: Slowbro! National Number 80. The Hermit Crab Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Psychic type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 78.5 kilograms. The Shellder that is latched onto Slowpoke's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps. Evolution: Slowpoke to Slowbro to Slowking.

slowking.spoken: Slowking! National Number 199. The Royal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Psychic type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 79.5 kilograms. It has incredible intellect and in­ tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected. Evolution: Slowpoke to Slowbro to Slowking.

slowpoke.spoken: Slowpoke! National Number 79. The Dopey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Psychic type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 36.0 kilograms. It is always so absent-minded that it won't react, even if its flavorful tail is bitten. Evolution: Slowpoke to Slowbro to Slowking.

slugma.spoken: Slugma! National Number 218. The Lava Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 35.0 kilograms. Its body is made of magma. If it doesn't keep moving, its body will cool and harden. Evolution: Slugma to Magcargo.

slurpuff.spoken: Slurpuff! National Number 685. The Meringue Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 5.0 kilograms. It can distinguish the faintest of scents. It puts its sensitive sense of smell to use by helping pastry chefs in their work. Evolution: Swirlix to Slurpuff.

smeargle.spoken: Smeargle! National Number 235. The Painter Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 58.0 kilograms. A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory. Smeargle does not evolve.

smoliv.spoken: Smoliv! National Number 928. The Olive Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Normal type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch. Evolution: Smoliv to Dolliv to Arboliva.

smoochum.spoken: Smoochum! National Number 238. The Kiss Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Psychic type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 6.0 kilograms. Its lips are the most sensitive parts on its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things. Evolution: Smoochum to Jynx.

sneasel.spoken: Sneasel! National Number 215. The Sharp Claw Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Ice type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 28.0 kilograms. Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it sud­ denly extends the claws and startles its enemy. Evolution: Sneasel to Weavile to Sneasler.

sneasler.spoken: Sneasler! National Number 903. The Free Climb Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Poison type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 43.0 kilograms. Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs. Evolution: Sneasel to Weavile to Sneasler.

snivy.spoken: Snivy! National Number 495. The Grass Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 8.1 kilograms. It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements swifter. Evolution: Snivy to Servine to Serperior.

snom.spoken: Snom! National Number 872. The Worm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Bug type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.8 kilograms. It spits out thread imbued with a frigid sort of energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps. Evolution: Snom to Frosmoth.

snorlax.spoken: Snorlax! National Number 143. The Sleeping Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 460.0 kilograms. Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful. Evolution: Munchlax to Snorlax.

snorunt.spoken: Snorunt! National Number 361. The Snow Hat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 16.8 kilograms. Snorunt live in regions with heavy snowfall. In seasons without snow, such as spring and summer, this Pokemon steals away to live quietly among stalactites and stalagmites deep in caverns. Evolution: Snorunt to Glalie to Froslass.

snover.spoken: Snover! National Number 459. The Frost Tree Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Ice type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 50.5 kilograms. It lives on snowy mountains. Having had little contact with humans, it is boldly inquisitive. Evolution: Snover to Abomasnow.

snubbull.spoken: Snubbull! National Number 209. The Fairy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 7.8 kilograms. Although it looks frightening, it is actually kind and affectionate. It is very popular among women. Evolution: Snubbull to Granbull.

sobble.spoken: Sobble! National Number 816. The Water Lizard Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. When scared, this Pokemon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won't be able to resist weeping. Evolution: Sobble to Drizzile to Inteleon.

solgaleo.spoken: Solgaleo! National Number 791. The Sunne Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Steel type, standing 3.4 meters tall and weighing 230.0 kilograms. It is said to live in another world. The intense light it radiates from the surface of its body can make the darkest of nights light up like midday. Evolution: Cosmog to Cosmoem to Solgaleo to Lunala.

solosis.spoken: Solosis! National Number 577. The Cell Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others. Evolution: Solosis to Duosion to Reuniclus.

solrock.spoken: Solrock! National Number 338. The Meteorite Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Psychic type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 154.0 kilograms. Solrock is a new species of Pokemon that is said to have fallen from space. It floats in air and moves silently. In battle, this Pokemon releases intensely bright light. Solrock does not evolve.

spearow.spoken: Spearow! National Number 21. The Tiny Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.0 kilograms. Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speed to stay airborne. Evolution: Spearow to Fearow.

spectrier.spoken: Spectrier! National Number 897. The Swift Horse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 44.5 kilograms. It probes its surroundings with all its senses save one—it doesn't use its sense of sight. Spectrier's kicks are said to separate soul from body. Spectrier does not evolve.

spewpa.spoken: Spewpa! National Number 665. The Scatterdust Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 8.4 kilograms. It lives hidden within thicket shadows. When predators attack, it quickly bristles the fur covering its body in an effort to threaten them. Evolution: Scatterbug to Spewpa to Vivillon.

spheal.spoken: Spheal! National Number 363. The Clap Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Water type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 39.5 kilograms. Spheal is much faster rolling than walking to get around. When groups of this Pokemon eat, they all clap at once to show their pleasure. Because of this, their mealtimes are noisy. Evolution: Spheal to Sealeo to Walrein.

spidops.spoken: Spidops! National Number 918. The Trap Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 16.5 kilograms. It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it. Evolution: Tarountula to Spidops.

spinarak.spoken: Spinarak! National Number 167. The String Spit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 8.5 kilograms. It lies still in the same pose for days in its web, waiting for its unsuspecting prey to wander close. Evolution: Spinarak to Ariados.

spinda.spoken: Spinda! National Number 327. The Spot Panda Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 5.0 kilograms. All the Spinda that exist in the world are said to have utterly unique spot patterns. The shaky, tottering steps of this Pokemon give it the appearance of dancing. Spinda does not evolve.

spiritomb.spoken: Spiritomb! National Number 442. The Forbidden Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Dark type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 108.0 kilograms. A Pokemon that was formed by 108 spirits. It is bound to a fissure in an odd keystone. Spiritomb does not evolve.

spoink.spoken: Spoink! National Number 325. The Bounce Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 30.6 kilograms. Spoink bounces around on its tail. The shock of its bouncing makes its heart pump. As a result, this Pokemon cannot afford to stop bouncing - if it stops, its heart will stop. Evolution: Spoink to Grumpig.

sprigatito.spoken: Sprigatito! National Number 906. The Grass Cat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.1 kilograms. Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokemon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out. Evolution: Sprigatito to Floragato to Meowscarada.

spritzee.spoken: Spritzee! National Number 682. The Perfume Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.5 kilograms. It emits a scent that enraptures those who smell it. This fragrance changes depending on what it has eaten. Evolution: Spritzee to Aromatisse.

squawkabilly.spoken: Squawkabilly! National Number 931. The Parrot Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 2.4 kilograms. These Pokemon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory. Squawkabilly does not evolve.

squirtle.spoken: Squirtle! National Number 7. The Tiny Turtle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.0 kilograms. After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth. Evolution: Squirtle to Wartortle to Blastoise.

stakataka.spoken: Stakataka! National Number 805. The Rampart Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Steel type, standing 5.5 meters tall and weighing 820.0 kilograms. It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other. Stakataka does not evolve.

stantler.spoken: Stantler! National Number 234. The Big Horn Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 71.2 kilograms. The curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where real­ ity is distorted. Evolution: Stantler to Wyrdeer.

staraptor.spoken: Staraptor! National Number 398. The Predator Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 24.9 kilograms. It has a savage nature. It will courageously challenge foes that are much larger. Evolution: Starly to Staravia to Staraptor.

staravia.spoken: Staravia! National Number 397. The Starling Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 15.5 kilograms. It flies around forests and fields in search of bug Pokemon. It stays within a huge flock. Evolution: Starly to Staravia to Staraptor.

starly.spoken: Starly! National Number 396. The Starling Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.0 kilograms. They flock in great numbers. Though small, they flap their wings with great power. Evolution: Starly to Staravia to Staraptor.

starmie.spoken: Starmie! National Number 121. The Mysterious Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Psychic type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 80.0 kilograms. Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem. Evolution: Staryu to Starmie.

staryu.spoken: Staryu! National Number 120. The Star Shape Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 34.5 kilograms. An enigmatic Pokemon that can effortlessly regenerate any appendage it loses in battle. Evolution: Staryu to Starmie.

steelix.spoken: Steelix! National Number 208. The Iron Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Ground type, standing 9.2 meters tall and weighing 400.0 kilograms. Its body has been compressed deep under the ground. As a result, it is even harder than a diamond. Evolution: Onix to Steelix.

steenee.spoken: Steenee! National Number 762. The Fruit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 8.2 kilograms. The sepals on its head developed to protect its body. These are quite hard, so even if pecked by bird Pokemon, this Pokemon is totally fine. Evolution: Bounsweet to Steenee to Tsareena.

stonjourner.spoken: Stonjourner! National Number 874. The Big Rock Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 520.0 kilograms. It stands in grasslands, watching the sun's descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokemon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks. Stonjourner does not evolve.

stoutland.spoken: Stoutland! National Number 508. The Big-Hearted Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 61.0 kilograms. It rescues people stranded by blizzards in the mountains. Its shaggy fur shields it from the cold. Evolution: Lillipup to Herdier to Stoutland.

stufful.spoken: Stufful! National Number 759. The Flailing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Fighting type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 6.8 kilograms. Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry and flails about, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling. Evolution: Stufful to Bewear.

stunfisk.spoken: Stunfisk! National Number 618. The Trap Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Electric type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 11.0 kilograms. Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity. Stunfisk does not evolve.

stunky.spoken: Stunky! National Number 434. The Skunk Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Dark type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 19.2 kilograms. It protects itself by spraying a noxious fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours. Evolution: Stunky to Skuntank.

sudowoodo.spoken: Sudowoodo! National Number 185. The Imitation Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 38.0 kilograms. Despite appearing to be a tree, its body is closer to rocks and stones. It is very weak to water. Evolution: Bonsly to Sudowoodo.

suicune.spoken: Suicune! National Number 245. The Aurora Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 187.0 kilograms. Said to be the reincarnation of north winds, it can instantly purify filthy, murky water. Suicune does not evolve.

sunflora.spoken: Sunflora! National Number 192. The Sun Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 8.5 kilograms. It converts sun­ light into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still. Evolution: Sunkern to Sunflora.

sunkern.spoken: Sunkern! National Number 191. The Seed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.8 kilograms. It may drop out of the sky suddenly. If attacked by a Spearow, it will violently shake its leaves. Evolution: Sunkern to Sunflora.

surskit.spoken: Surskit! National Number 283. The Pond Skater Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 1.7 kilograms. From the tips of its feet, Surskit secretes an oil that enables it to walk on water as if it were skating. This Pokemon feeds on microscopic organisms in ponds and lakes. Evolution: Surskit to Masquerain.

swablu.spoken: Swablu! National Number 333. The Cotton Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 1.2 kilograms. Swablu has light and fluffy wings that are like cottony clouds. This Pokemon is not frightened of people. It lands on the heads of people and sits there like a cotton-fluff hat. Evolution: Swablu to Altaria.

swadloon.spoken: Swadloon! National Number 541. The Leaf-Wrapped Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Grass type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 7.3 kilograms. Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life. Evolution: Sewaddle to Swadloon to Leavanny.

swalot.spoken: Swalot! National Number 317. The Poison Bag Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 80.0 kilograms. When Swalot spots prey, it spurts out a hideously toxic fluid from its pores and sprays the target. Once the prey has weakened, this Pokemon gulps it down whole with its cavernous mouth. Evolution: Gulpin to Swalot.

swampert.spoken: Swampert! National Number 260. The Mud Fish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ground type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 81.9 kilograms. Swampert is very strong. It has enough power to easily drag a boulder weighing more than a ton. This Pokemon also has powerful vision that lets it see even in murky water. Evolution: Mudkip to Marshtomp to Swampert.

swanna.spoken: Swanna! National Number 581. The White Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Flying type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 24.2 kilograms. Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock. Evolution: Ducklett to Swanna.

swellow.spoken: Swellow! National Number 277. The Swallow Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 19.8 kilograms. Swellow flies high above our heads, making graceful arcs in the sky. This Pokemon dives at a steep angle as soon as it spots its prey. The hapless prey is tightly grasped by Swellow's clawed feet, preventing escape. Evolution: Taillow to Swellow.

swinub.spoken: Swinub! National Number 220. The Pig Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Ground type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs. Evolution: Swinub to Piloswine to Mamoswine.

swirlix.spoken: Swirlix! National Number 684. The Cotton Candy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 3.5 kilograms. To entangle its opponents in battle, it extrudes white threads as sweet and sticky as cotton candy. Evolution: Swirlix to Slurpuff.

swoobat.spoken: Swoobat! National Number 528. The Courting Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Flying type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 10.5 kilograms. It emits sound waves of various frequencies from its nose, including some powerful enough to destroy rocks. Evolution: Woobat to Swoobat.

sylveon.spoken: Sylveon! National Number 700. The Intertwining Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 23.5 kilograms. It sends a soothing aura from its ribbonlike feelers to calm fights. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

tadbulb.spoken: Tadbulb! National Number 938. The EleTadpole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 0.4 kilograms. Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies. Evolution: Tadbulb to Bellibolt.

taillow.spoken: Taillow! National Number 276. The Tiny Swallow Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.3 kilograms. Taillow courageously stands its ground against foes, however strong they may be. This gutsy Pokemon will remain defiant even after a loss. On the other hand, it cries loudly if it becomes hungry. Evolution: Taillow to Swellow.

talonflame.spoken: Talonflame! National Number 663. The Scorching Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Flying type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 24.5 kilograms. In the fever of an exciting battle, it showers embers from the gaps between its feathers and takes to the air. Evolution: Fletchling to Fletchinder to Talonflame.

tandemaus.spoken: Tandemaus! National Number 924. The Couple Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.8 kilograms. Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them. Evolution: Tandemaus to Maushold.

tangela.spoken: Tangela! National Number 114. The Vine Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 35.0 kilograms. The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to sea­ weed. Its vines shake as it walks. Evolution: Tangela to Tangrowth.

tangrowth.spoken: Tangrowth! National Number 465. The Vine Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 128.6 kilograms. It ensnares prey by extending arms made of vines. Losing arms to predators does not trouble it. Evolution: Tangela to Tangrowth.

tapu-bulu.spoken: Tapu Bulu! National Number 787. The Land Spirit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Fairy type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 45.5 kilograms. It pulls large trees up by the roots and swings them around. It causes vegetation to grow, and then it absorbs energy from the growth. Tapu Bulu does not evolve.

tapu-fini.spoken: Tapu Fini! National Number 788. The Land Spirit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Fairy type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 21.2 kilograms. The dense fog it creates brings the downfall and destruction of its confused enemies. Ocean currents are the source of its energy. Tapu Fini does not evolve.

tapu-koko.spoken: Tapu Koko! National Number 785. The Land Spirit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Fairy type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 20.5 kilograms. This guardian deity of Melemele is brimming with curiosity. It summons thunderclouds and stores their lightning inside its body. Tapu Koko does not evolve.

tapu-lele.spoken: Tapu Lele! National Number 786. The Land Spirit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Fairy type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 18.6 kilograms. This guardian deity of Akala is guilelessly cruel. The fragrant aroma of flowers is the source of its energy. Tapu Lele does not evolve.

tarountula.spoken: Tarountula! National Number 917. The String Ball Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokemon's natural enemy. Evolution: Tarountula to Spidops.

tatsugiri.spoken: Tatsugiri! National Number 978. The Mimicry Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Water type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 8.0 kilograms. This is a small dragon Pokemon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside. Tatsugiri does not evolve.

tauros.spoken: Tauros! National Number 128. The Wild Bull Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 88.4 kilograms. When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails. Tauros does not evolve.

teddiursa.spoken: Teddiursa! National Number 216. The Little Bear Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 8.8 kilograms. If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they are soaked with honey. Evolution: Teddiursa to Ursaring to Ursaluna.

tentacool.spoken: Tentacool! National Number 72. The Jellyfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Poison type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 45.5 kilograms. Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stinging acid. Evolution: Tentacool to Tentacruel.

tentacruel.spoken: Tentacruel! National Number 73. The Jellyfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Poison type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 55.0 kilograms. The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey. Evolution: Tentacool to Tentacruel.

tepig.spoken: Tepig! National Number 498. The Fire Pig Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.9 kilograms. It can deftly dodge its foe's attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them. Evolution: Tepig to Pignite to Emboar.

terapagos.spoken: Terapagos! National Number 1024. The Tera Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokemon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon. Terapagos does not evolve.

terrakion.spoken: Terrakion! National Number 639. The Cavern Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Fighting type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 260.0 kilograms. This Pokemon came to the defense of Pokemon that had lost their homes in a war among humans. Terrakion does not evolve.

thievul.spoken: Thievul! National Number 828. The Fox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 19.9 kilograms. It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it. Evolution: Nickit to Thievul.

throh.spoken: Throh! National Number 538. The Judo Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 55.5 kilograms. When it tightens its belt, it becomes stronger. Wild Throh use vines to weave their own belts. Throh does not evolve.

thundurus.spoken: Thundurus! National Number 642. The Bolt Strike Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Flying type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 61.0 kilograms. Countless charred remains mar the landscape of places through which Thundurus has passed. Thundurus does not evolve.

thwackey.spoken: Thwackey! National Number 811. The Beat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 14.0 kilograms. The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers. Evolution: Grookey to Thwackey to Rillaboom.

timburr.spoken: Timburr! National Number 532. The Muscular Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 12.5 kilograms. It fights by swinging a piece of lumber around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the lumber without difficulty. Evolution: Timburr to Gurdurr to Conkeldurr.

ting-lu.spoken: Ting-Lu! National Number 1003. The Ruinous Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Ground type, standing 2.7 meters tall and weighing 699.7 kilograms. The fear poured into an ancient ritual vessel has clad itself in rocks and dirt to become a Pokemon. Ting-Lu does not evolve.

tinkatink.spoken: Tinkatink! National Number 957. The Metalsmith Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy / Steel type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 8.9 kilograms. It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokemon that eat metal. Evolution: Tinkatink to Tinkatuff to Tinkaton.

tinkaton.spoken: Tinkaton! National Number 959. The Hammer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy / Steel type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 112.8 kilograms. This intelligent Pokemon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight. Evolution: Tinkatink to Tinkatuff to Tinkaton.

tinkatuff.spoken: Tinkatuff! National Number 958. The Hammer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy / Steel type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 59.1 kilograms. This Pokemon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer. Evolution: Tinkatink to Tinkatuff to Tinkaton.

tirtouga.spoken: Tirtouga! National Number 564. The Prototurtle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Rock type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 16.5 kilograms. Restored from a fossil, this Pokemon can dive to depths beyond half a mile. Evolution: Tirtouga to Carracosta.

toedscool.spoken: Toedscool! National Number 948. The Woodear Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Grass type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 33.0 kilograms. Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious. Evolution: Toedscool to Toedscruel.

toedscruel.spoken: Toedscruel! National Number 949. The Woodear Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Grass type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 58.0 kilograms. These Pokemon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach. Evolution: Toedscool to Toedscruel.

togedemaru.spoken: Togedemaru! National Number 777. The Roly-Poly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Steel type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.3 kilograms. The spiny fur on its back is normally at rest. When this Pokemon becomes agitated, its fur stands on end and stabs into its attackers. Togedemaru does not evolve.

togekiss.spoken: Togekiss! National Number 468. The Jubilee Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy / Flying type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 38.0 kilograms. It will never appear where there is strife. Its sightings have become rare recently. Evolution: Togepi to Togetic to Togekiss.

togepi.spoken: Togepi! National Number 175. The Spike Ball Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.5 kilograms. The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly. Evolution: Togepi to Togetic to Togekiss.

togetic.spoken: Togetic! National Number 176. The Happiness Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy / Flying type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 3.2 kilograms. To share its happiness, it flies around the world seeking kind- hearted people. Evolution: Togepi to Togetic to Togekiss.

torchic.spoken: Torchic! National Number 255. The Chick Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 2.5 kilograms. Torchic sticks with its Trainer, following behind with unsteady steps. This Pokemon breathes fire of over 1,800 degrees F, including fireballs that leave the foe scorched black. Evolution: Torchic to Combusken to Blaziken.

torkoal.spoken: Torkoal! National Number 324. The Coal Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 80.4 kilograms. Torkoal digs through mountains in search of coal. If it finds some, it fills hollow spaces on its shell with the coal and burns it. If it is attacked, this Pokemon spouts thick black smoke to beat a retreat. Torkoal does not evolve.

tornadus.spoken: Tornadus! National Number 641. The Cyclone Pokemon. This Pokemon is Flying type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 63.0 kilograms. The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph. Tornadus does not evolve.

torracat.spoken: Torracat! National Number 726. The Fire Cat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 25.0 kilograms. At its throat, it bears a bell of fire. The bell rings brightly whenever this Pokemon spits fire. Evolution: Litten to Torracat to Incineroar.

torterra.spoken: Torterra! National Number 389. The Continent Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Ground type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 310.0 kilograms. Some Pokemon are born on a Torterra's back and spend their entire life there. Evolution: Turtwig to Grotle to Torterra.

totodile.spoken: Totodile! National Number 158. The Big Jaw Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 9.5 kilograms. Its well-developed jaws are powerful and capable of crushing anything. Even its trainer must be careful. Evolution: Totodile to Croconaw to Feraligatr.

toucannon.spoken: Toucannon! National Number 733. The Cannon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 26.0 kilograms. When it battles, its beak heats up. The temperature can easily exceed 212 degrees Fahrenheit, causing severe burns when it hits. Evolution: Pikipek to Trumbeak to Toucannon.

toxapex.spoken: Toxapex! National Number 748. The Brutal Star Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Water type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 14.5 kilograms. Toxapex crawls along the ocean floor on its 12 legs. It leaves a trail of Corsola bits scattered in its wake. Evolution: Mareanie to Toxapex.

toxel.spoken: Toxel! National Number 848. The Baby Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Poison type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 11.0 kilograms. It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokemon, a tingling sensation follows. Evolution: Toxel to Toxtricity.

toxicroak.spoken: Toxicroak! National Number 454. The Toxic Mouth Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Fighting type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 44.4 kilograms. Its knuckle claws secrete a toxin so vile that even a scratch could prove fatal. Evolution: Croagunk to Toxicroak.

toxtricity.spoken: Toxtricity! National Number 849. The Punk Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Poison type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 40.0 kilograms. When this Pokemon sounds as if it's strumming a guitar, it's actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity. Evolution: Toxel to Toxtricity.

tranquill.spoken: Tranquill! National Number 520. The Wild Pigeon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. It can return to its Trainer's location regardless of the distance separating them. Evolution: Pidove to Tranquill to Unfezant.

trapinch.spoken: Trapinch! National Number 328. The Ant Pit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. Trapinch's nest is a sloped, bowl-like pit dug in sand. This Pokemon patiently waits for prey to tumble down the pit. Its giant jaws have enough strength to crush even boulders. Evolution: Trapinch to Vibrava to Flygon.

treecko.spoken: Treecko! National Number 252. The Wood Gecko Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 5.0 kilograms. Treecko has small hooks on the bottom of its feet that enable it to scale vertical walls. This Pokemon attacks by slamming foes with its thick tail. Evolution: Treecko to Grovyle to Sceptile.

trevenant.spoken: Trevenant! National Number 709. The Elder Tree Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Grass type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 71.0 kilograms. It can control trees at will. It will trap people who harm the forest, so they can never leave. Evolution: Phantump to Trevenant.

tropius.spoken: Tropius! National Number 357. The Fruit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Flying type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 100.0 kilograms. It lives in tropical jungles. The bunch of fruit around its neck is delicious. The fruit grows twice a year. Tropius does not evolve.

trubbish.spoken: Trubbish! National Number 568. The Trash Bag Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 31.0 kilograms. Inhaling the gas they belch will make you sleep for a week. They prefer unsanitary places. Evolution: Trubbish to Garbodor.

trumbeak.spoken: Trumbeak! National Number 732. The Bugle Beak Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 14.8 kilograms. It eats berries and stores their seeds in its beak. When it encounters enemies or prey, it fires off all the seeds in a burst. Evolution: Pikipek to Trumbeak to Toucannon.

tsareena.spoken: Tsareena! National Number 763. The Fruit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 21.4 kilograms. Its long, striking legs aren't just for show but to be used to kick with skill. In victory, it shows off by kicking the defeated, laughing boisterously. Evolution: Bounsweet to Steenee to Tsareena.

turtonator.spoken: Turtonator! National Number 776. The Blast Turtle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Dragon type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 212.0 kilograms. The shell on its back is chemically unstable and explodes violently if struck. The hole in its stomach is its weak point. Turtonator does not evolve.

turtwig.spoken: Turtwig! National Number 387. The Tiny Leaf Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 10.2 kilograms. Made from soil, the shell on its back hardens when it drinks water. It lives along lakes. Evolution: Turtwig to Grotle to Torterra.

tympole.spoken: Tympole! National Number 535. The Tadpole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 4.5 kilograms. They warn others of danger by vibrating their cheeks to create a high-pitched sound. Evolution: Tympole to Palpitoad to Seismitoad.

tynamo.spoken: Tynamo! National Number 602. The EleFish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.3 kilograms. While one alone doesn't have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning. Evolution: Tynamo to Eelektrik to Eelektross.

type-null.spoken: Type: Null! National Number 772. The Synthetic Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 120.5 kilograms. The heavy control mask it wears suppresses its intrinsic capabilities. This Pokemon has some hidden special power. Evolution: Type: Null to Silvally.

typhlosion.spoken: Typhlosion! National Number 157. The Volcano Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 79.5 kilograms. If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames. Evolution: Cyndaquil to Quilava to Typhlosion.

tyranitar.spoken: Tyranitar! National Number 248. The Armor Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Dark type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 202.0 kilograms. Its body can't be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies. Evolution: Larvitar to Pupitar to Tyranitar.

tyrantrum.spoken: Tyrantrum! National Number 697. The Despot Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Dragon type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 270.0 kilograms. Thanks to its gargantuan jaws, which could shred thick metal plates as if they were paper, it was invincible in the ancient world it once inhabited. Evolution: Tyrunt to Tyrantrum.

tyrogue.spoken: Tyrogue! National Number 236. The Scuffle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 21.0 kilograms. It is always bursting with en­ ergy. To make it­ self stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses. Evolution: Tyrogue to Hitmonlee to Hitmonchan to Hitmontop.

tyrunt.spoken: Tyrunt! National Number 696. The Royal Heir Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Dragon type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 26.0 kilograms. This Pokemon was restored from a fossil. If something happens that it doesn't like, it throws a tantrum and runs wild. Evolution: Tyrunt to Tyrantrum.

umbreon.spoken: Umbreon! National Number 197. The Moonlight Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 27.0 kilograms. When agitated, this Pokemon pro­ tects itself by spraying poisonous sweat from its pores. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

unfezant.spoken: Unfezant! National Number 521. The Proud Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 29.0 kilograms. Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females' flying abilities surpass those of the males. Evolution: Pidove to Tranquill to Unfezant.

unown.spoken: Unown! National Number 201. The Symbol Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 5.0 kilograms. Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tab­ lets. It is said that the two are somehow related. Unown does not evolve.

ursaluna.spoken: Ursaluna! National Number 901. The Peat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Normal type, standing 2.4 meters tall and weighing 290.0 kilograms. I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will. Evolution: Teddiursa to Ursaring to Ursaluna.

ursaring.spoken: Ursaring! National Number 217. The Hibernator Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 125.8 kilograms. Although it is a good climber, it prefers to snap trees with its forelegs and eat fallen Berries. Evolution: Teddiursa to Ursaring to Ursaluna.

urshifu.spoken: Urshifu! National Number 892. The Wushu Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting / Dark type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 105.0 kilograms. This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit knock out. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist. Evolution: Kubfu to Urshifu.

uxie.spoken: Uxie! National Number 480. The Knowledge Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 0.3 kilograms. Known as “The Being of Knowledge.” It is said that it can wipe out the memory of those who see its eyes. Uxie does not evolve.

vanillish.spoken: Vanillish! National Number 583. The Icy Snow Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 41.0 kilograms. Snowy mountains are this Pokemon's habitat. During an ancient ice age, they moved to southern areas. Evolution: Vanillite to Vanillish to Vanilluxe.

vanillite.spoken: Vanillite! National Number 582. The Fresh Snow Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 5.7 kilograms. The temperature of their breath is -58° F. They create snow crystals and make snow fall in the areas around them. Evolution: Vanillite to Vanillish to Vanilluxe.

vanilluxe.spoken: Vanilluxe! National Number 584. The Snowstorm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 57.5 kilograms. Swallowing large amounts of water, they make snow clouds inside their bodies and attack their foes with violent blizzards. Evolution: Vanillite to Vanillish to Vanilluxe.

vaporeon.spoken: Vaporeon! National Number 134. The Bubble Jet Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 29.0 kilograms. Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

varoom.spoken: Varoom! National Number 965. The Single-Cyl Pokemon. This Pokemon is Steel / Poison type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 35.0 kilograms. It is said that this Pokemon was born when an unknown poison Pokemon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory. Evolution: Varoom to Revavroom.

veluza.spoken: Veluza! National Number 976. The Jettison Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Psychic type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 90.0 kilograms. When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor. Veluza does not evolve.

venipede.spoken: Venipede! National Number 543. The Centipede Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 5.3 kilograms. Its bite injects a potent poison, enough to paralyze large bird Pokemon that try to prey on it. Evolution: Venipede to Whirlipede to Scolipede.

venomoth.spoken: Venomoth! National Number 49. The Poison Moth Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 12.5 kilograms. The dust-like scales covering its wings are color coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has. Evolution: Venonat to Venomoth.

venonat.spoken: Venonat! National Number 48. The Insect Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Its big eyes are actually clusters of tiny eyes. At night, its kind is drawn by light. Evolution: Venonat to Venomoth.

venusaur.spoken: Venusaur! National Number 3. The Seed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 100.0 kilograms. The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight. Evolution: Bulbasaur to Ivysaur to Venusaur.

vespiquen.spoken: Vespiquen! National Number 416. The Beehive Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 38.5 kilograms. Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by Combee. Evolution: Combee to Vespiquen.

vibrava.spoken: Vibrava! National Number 329. The Vibration Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Dragon type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 15.3 kilograms. To make prey faint, Vibrava generates ultrasonic waves by vigorously making its two wings vibrate. This Pokemon's ultrasonic waves are so powerful, they can bring on headaches in people. Evolution: Trapinch to Vibrava to Flygon.

victini.spoken: Victini! National Number 494. The Victory Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Fire type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. This Pokemon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter. Victini does not evolve.

victreebel.spoken: Victreebel! National Number 71. The Flycatcher Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 15.5 kilograms. Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there. Evolution: Bellsprout to Weepinbell to Victreebel.

vigoroth.spoken: Vigoroth! National Number 288. The Wild Monkey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 46.5 kilograms. Vigoroth is always itching and agitated to go on a wild rampage. It simply can't tolerate sitting still for even a minute. This Pokemon's stress level rises if it can't be moving constantly. Evolution: Slakoth to Vigoroth to Slaking.

vikavolt.spoken: Vikavolt! National Number 738. The Stag Beetle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Electric type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 45.0 kilograms. It zips around, on sharp lookout for an opening. It concentrates electrical energy within its large jaws and uses it to zap its enemies. Evolution: Grubbin to Charjabug to Vikavolt.

vileplume.spoken: Vileplume! National Number 45. The Flower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 18.6 kilograms. The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up. Evolution: Oddish to Gloom to Vileplume to Bellossom.

virizion.spoken: Virizion! National Number 640. The Grassland Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Fighting type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 200.0 kilograms. This Pokemon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down. Virizion does not evolve.

vivillon.spoken: Vivillon! National Number 666. The Scale Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 17.0 kilograms. Vivillon with many different patterns are found all over the world. These patterns are affected by the climate of their habitat. Evolution: Scatterbug to Spewpa to Vivillon.

volbeat.spoken: Volbeat! National Number 313. The Firefly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 17.7 kilograms. With the arrival of night, Volbeat emits light from its tail. It communicates with others by adjusting the intensity and flashing of its light. This Pokemon is attracted by the sweet aroma of Illumise. Volbeat does not evolve.

volcanion.spoken: Volcanion! National Number 721. The Steam Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Water type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 195.0 kilograms. It lets out billows of steam and disappears into the dense fog. It's said to live in mountains where humans do not tread. Volcanion does not evolve.

volcarona.spoken: Volcarona! National Number 637. The Sun Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Fire type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 46.0 kilograms. When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona's fire provided a replacement for the sun. Evolution: Larvesta to Volcarona.

voltorb.spoken: Voltorb! National Number 100. The Ball Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 10.4 kilograms. Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a Poke Ball, they have zapped many people. Evolution: Voltorb to Electrode.

vullaby.spoken: Vullaby! National Number 629. The Diapered Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Flying type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.0 kilograms. Its wings are too tiny to allow it to fly. As the time approaches for it to evolve, it discards the bones it was wearing. Evolution: Vullaby to Mandibuzz.

vulpix.spoken: Vulpix! National Number 37. The Fox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 9.9 kilograms. At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older. Evolution: Vulpix to Ninetales.

wailmer.spoken: Wailmer! National Number 320. The Ball Whale Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 130.0 kilograms. Wailmer's nostrils are located above its eyes. This playful Pokemon loves to startle people by forcefully snorting out seawater it stores inside its body out of its nostrils. Evolution: Wailmer to Wailord.

wailord.spoken: Wailord! National Number 321. The Float Whale Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 14.5 meters tall and weighing 398.0 kilograms. Wailord is the largest of all identified Pokemon up to now. This giant Pokemon swims languorously in the vast open sea, eating massive amounts of food at once with its enormous mouth. Evolution: Wailmer to Wailord.

walking-wake.spoken: Walking Wake! National Number 1009. The Paradox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Dragon type, standing 3.5 meters tall and weighing 280.0 kilograms. This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal. Walking Wake does not evolve.

walrein.spoken: Walrein! National Number 365. The Ice Break Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Water type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 150.6 kilograms. Walrein's two massively developed tusks can totally shatter blocks of ice weighing ten tons with one blow. This Pokemon's thick coat of blubber insulates it from subzero temperatures. Evolution: Spheal to Sealeo to Walrein.

wartortle.spoken: Wartortle! National Number 8. The Turtle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 22.5 kilograms. Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance. Evolution: Squirtle to Wartortle to Blastoise.

watchog.spoken: Watchog! National Number 505. The Lookout Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 27.0 kilograms. When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches. Evolution: Patrat to Watchog.

wattrel.spoken: Wattrel! National Number 940. The Storm Petrel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Flying type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 3.6 kilograms. When its wings catch the wind, the bones within produce electricity. This Pokemon dives into the ocean, catching prey by electrocuting them. Evolution: Wattrel to Kilowattrel.

weavile.spoken: Weavile! National Number 461. The Sharp Claw Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Ice type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 34.0 kilograms. They communicate by clawing signs in boulders and work together to surround enemies. Evolution: Sneasel to Weavile to Sneasler.

weedle.spoken: Weedle! National Number 13. The Hairy Bug Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.2 kilograms. Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp venomous stinger on its head. Evolution: Weedle to Kakuna to Beedrill.

weepinbell.spoken: Weepinbell! National Number 70. The Flycatcher Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 6.4 kilograms. A Pokemon that appears to be a plant. It captures unwary prey by dousing them with a toxic powder. Evolution: Bellsprout to Weepinbell to Victreebel.

weezing.spoken: Weezing! National Number 110. The Poison Gas Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 9.5 kilograms. Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 Koffings can fuse into a Weezing over many years. Evolution: Koffing to Weezing.

whimsicott.spoken: Whimsicott! National Number 547. The Windveiled Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Fairy type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 6.6 kilograms. Like the wind, it can slip through any gap, no matter how small. It leaves balls of white fluff behind. Evolution: Cottonee to Whimsicott.

whirlipede.spoken: Whirlipede! National Number 544. The Curlipede Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 58.5 kilograms. Protected by a hard shell, it spins its body like a wheel and crashes furiously into its enemies. Evolution: Venipede to Whirlipede to Scolipede.

whiscash.spoken: Whiscash! National Number 340. The Whiskers Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ground type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 23.6 kilograms. Whiscash is extremely territorial. Just one of these Pokemon will claim a large pond as its exclusive territory. If a foe approaches it, it thrashes about and triggers a massive earthquake. Evolution: Barboach to Whiscash.

whismur.spoken: Whismur! National Number 293. The Whisper Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 16.3 kilograms. Normally, Whismur's voice is very quiet - it is barely audible even if one is paying close attention. However, if this Pokemon senses danger, it starts crying at an earsplitting volume. Evolution: Whismur to Loudred to Exploud.

wigglytuff.spoken: Wigglytuff! National Number 40. The Balloon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Fairy type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 12.0 kilograms. The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size. Evolution: Igglybuff to Jigglypuff to Wigglytuff.

wiglett.spoken: Wiglett! National Number 960. The Garden Eel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 1.8 kilograms. This Pokemon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand. Evolution: Wiglett to Wugtrio.

wimpod.spoken: Wimpod! National Number 767. The Turn Tail Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 12.0 kilograms. This Pokemon is a coward. As it desperately dashes off, the flailing of its many legs leaves a sparkling clean path in its wake. Evolution: Wimpod to Golisopod.

wingull.spoken: Wingull! National Number 278. The Seagull Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Flying type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 9.5 kilograms. Wingull has the habit of carrying prey and valuables in its beak and hiding them in all sorts of locations. This Pokemon rides the winds and flies as if it were skating across the sky. Evolution: Wingull to Pelipper.

wishiwashi.spoken: Wishiwashi! National Number 746. The Small Fry Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.3 kilograms. When it's in trouble, its eyes moisten and begin to shine. The shining light attracts its comrades, and they stand together against their enemies. Wishiwashi does not evolve.

wo-chien.spoken: Wo-Chien! National Number 1001. The Ruinous Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Grass type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 74.2 kilograms. The grudge of a person punished for writing the king's evil deeds upon wooden tablets has clad itself in dead leaves to become a Pokemon. Wo-Chien does not evolve.

wobbuffet.spoken: Wobbuffet! National Number 202. The Patient Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 28.5 kilograms. It hates light and shock. If attack­ ed, it inflates its body to pump up its counter­ strike. Evolution: Wynaut to Wobbuffet.

woobat.spoken: Woobat! National Number 527. The Bat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Flying type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 2.1 kilograms. Its habitat is dark forests and caves. It emits ultrasonic waves from its nose to learn about its surroundings. Evolution: Woobat to Swoobat.

wooloo.spoken: Wooloo! National Number 831. The Sheep Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 6.0 kilograms. Its curly fleece is such an effective cushion that this Pokemon could fall off a cliff and stand right back up at the bottom, unharmed. Evolution: Wooloo to Dubwool.

wooper.spoken: Wooper! National Number 194. The Water Fish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ground type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 8.5 kilograms. This Pokemon lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside. Evolution: Wooper to Quagsire to Clodsire.

wormadam.spoken: Wormadam! National Number 413. The Bagworm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Grass type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. When Burmy evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokemon's body. The cloak is never shed. Evolution: Burmy to Wormadam to Mothim.

wugtrio.spoken: Wugtrio! National Number 961. The Garden Eel Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 5.4 kilograms. It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den. Evolution: Wiglett to Wugtrio.

wurmple.spoken: Wurmple! National Number 265. The Worm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.6 kilograms. Using the spikes on its rear end, Wurmple peels the bark off trees and feeds on the sap that oozes out. This Pokemon's feet are tipped with suction pads that allow it to cling to glass without slipping. Evolution: Wurmple to Silcoon to Beautifly to Cascoon to Dustox.

wynaut.spoken: Wynaut! National Number 360. The Bright Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 14.0 kilograms. Wynaut can always be seen with a big, happy smile on its face. Look at its tail to determine if it is angry. When angered, this Pokemon will be slapping the ground with its tail. Evolution: Wynaut to Wobbuffet.

wyrdeer.spoken: Wyrdeer! National Number 899. The Big Horn Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Psychic type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 95.1 kilograms. The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokemon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing. Evolution: Stantler to Wyrdeer.

xatu.spoken: Xatu! National Number 178. The Mystic Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Flying type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time. Evolution: Natu to Xatu.

xerneas.spoken: Xerneas! National Number 716. The Life Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 3.0 meters tall and weighing 215.0 kilograms. Legends say it can share eternal life. It slept for a thousand years in the form of a tree before its revival. Xerneas does not evolve.

xurkitree.spoken: Xurkitree! National Number 796. The Glowing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 3.8 meters tall and weighing 100.0 kilograms. One of the mysterious life-forms known as Ultra Beasts. Astonishing electric shocks emanate from its entire body, according to witnesses. Xurkitree does not evolve.

yamask.spoken: Yamask! National Number 562. The Spirit Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 1.5 kilograms. Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry. Evolution: Yamask to Cofagrigus to Runerigus.

yamper.spoken: Yamper! National Number 835. The Puppy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 13.5 kilograms. This Pokemon is very popular as a herding dog in the Galar region. As it runs, it generates electricity from the base of its tail. Evolution: Yamper to Boltund.

yanma.spoken: Yanma! National Number 193. The Clear Wing Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 38.0 kilograms. If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter win­ dows in the area. Evolution: Yanma to Yanmega.

yanmega.spoken: Yanmega! National Number 469. The Ogre Darner Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 51.5 kilograms. By churning its wings, it creates shock waves that inflict critical internal injuries to foes. Evolution: Yanma to Yanmega.

yungoos.spoken: Yungoos! National Number 734. The Loitering Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 6.0 kilograms. With its sharp fangs, it will bite anything. It did not originally live in Alola but was imported from another region. Evolution: Yungoos to Gumshoos.

yveltal.spoken: Yveltal! National Number 717. The Destruction Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Flying type, standing 5.8 meters tall and weighing 203.0 kilograms. When this legendary Pokemon's wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures. Yveltal does not evolve.

zacian.spoken: Zacian! National Number 888. The Warrior Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 2.8 meters tall and weighing 110.0 kilograms. Known as a legendary hero, this Pokemon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle. Zacian does not evolve.

zamazenta.spoken: Zamazenta! National Number 889. The Warrior Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 2.9 meters tall and weighing 210.0 kilograms. In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal that it then uses in battle. Zamazenta does not evolve.

zangoose.spoken: Zangoose! National Number 335. The Cat Ferret Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 40.3 kilograms. It has feuded with Seviper for many generations. Its sharp claws are its biggest weapons. Zangoose does not evolve.

zapdos.spoken: Zapdos! National Number 145. The Electric Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Flying type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 52.6 kilograms. A legendary bird Pokemon that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts. Zapdos does not evolve.

zarude.spoken: Zarude! National Number 893. The Rogue Monkey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Grass type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 70.0 kilograms. Within dense forests, this Pokemon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It's incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokemon of the forest fear it. Zarude does not evolve.

zebstrika.spoken: Zebstrika! National Number 523. The Thunderbolt Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 79.5 kilograms. They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates. Evolution: Blitzle to Zebstrika.

zekrom.spoken: Zekrom! National Number 644. The Deep Black Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Electric type, standing 2.9 meters tall and weighing 345.0 kilograms. Concealing itself in lightning clouds, it flies throughout the Unova region. It creates electricity in its tail. Zekrom does not evolve.

zeraora.spoken: Zeraora! National Number 807. The Thunderclap Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 44.5 kilograms. It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, they'll be electrocuted by the flying sparks. Zeraora does not evolve.

zigzagoon.spoken: Zigzagoon! National Number 263. The Tiny Raccoon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 17.5 kilograms. Zigzagoon restlessly wanders everywhere at all times. This Pokemon does so because it is very curious. It becomes interested in anything that it happens to see. Evolution: Zigzagoon to Linoone to Obstagoon.

zoroark.spoken: Zoroark! National Number 571. The Illusion Fox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 81.1 kilograms. Bonds between these Pokemon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents. Evolution: Zorua to Zoroark.

zorua.spoken: Zorua! National Number 570. The Tricky Fox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 12.5 kilograms. It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child. Evolution: Zorua to Zoroark.

zubat.spoken: Zubat! National Number 41. The Bat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Flying type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 7.5 kilograms. It has no eyes. Instead, it relies on its ultrasonic cries for echolocation to flit about in darkness. Evolution: Zubat to Golbat to Crobat.

zweilous.spoken: Zweilous! National Number 634. The Hostile Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dark / Dragon type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 50.0 kilograms. After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along. Evolution: Deino to Zweilous to Hydreigon.

zygarde.spoken: Zygarde! National Number 718. The Order Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Ground type, standing 5.0 meters tall and weighing 305.0 kilograms. When the Kalos region's ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power. Zygarde does not evolve.
